post_body: # Photograph of a 100-year-old Armenian mansion in the north of the country Hello friends, I hope you are well, today I have prepared new photos of this beautiful area and beautiful and old mansion We were on our trip when my husband pinned a 100-year-old mansion on a map, and then we agreed to go and see it and we were ready to continue the trip When we arrived, there was a village on the top of the hill. We used a phone number that was on the door and we called, and that gentleman came to open the door for us so we could see inside. It was two floors and had a beautiful view. We visited there and I thought about what happened there in this 100-year history and what those doors and walls have witnessed Traveling is interesting because we go to new places and get to know the history and culture of each region I hope that the situation in my country will be better soon and we will be able to travel again Living in the difficult conditions that we are in has destroyed all of us mentally and we are all waiting and sad, I hope that the situation will improve and we can live in peace

#### #### _This is the English version of the post , originally published in Italian in the ITALY community._ #### --- Let’s start with a question: in which country would direct accusations — complete with first and last names — made by a journalist and writer specialized in mafia matters like **Roberto Saviano** be virtually ignored by newspapers and television? In which country would the management of any company, recognized by courts as being subordinate to unsavory individuals, remain in place as if nothing had happened? In which country would the judiciary fail to immediately launch an investigation in the face of such harsh and detailed words as those spoken by **Saviano** when he essentially pointed to the president of **Inter**, **Beppe Marotta**, as the cause of the total loss of credibility of Italian football? In which country would the words of a mafia turncoat, directly accusing the same **Marotta** of collaboration and criminal association, not be considered worthy of attention by the justice system? Because it must be one or the other: either a turncoat is always credible and entitled to witness protection (as is the case with Marotta’s accuser), or he never is. Well, my friends, I don’t believe there’s any need to provide the answer to these rhetorical questions, because we are talking about the same country in which, for at least twenty years, one club has never been made to pay for its wrongdoing, always finding some scapegoat to sacrifice in its place (mostly always the same one). The most “recent” proof concerns the **Bastoni**–**Kalulu** case, with the inclusion of the other great “roller” par excellence, **Barella**. During last Saturday’s **Inter**–**Juventus** match, the Juventus defender was shown two yellow cards as a result of two blatant simulations by opponents, with the second one going around the world for the disgraceful celebration by **Bastoni** himself. The whole world saw the images and condemned them — except for the “hawks” in the style of **La Russa** — in almost unanimous fashion. Yet instead of demanding disciplinary action through video evidence against the two divers, the sports judge moved to suspend the “poor” **Kalulu**. For “foul play,” a masterpiece. The apotheosis of the grotesque times we are living in came with the additional sanctions imposed on two Juventus executives, CEO **Damien Comolli** and Director of Football Strategy **Giorgio Chiellini**, guilty of having directed insulting expressions at the referee in the San Siro tunnel at the end of the first half. Nothing to object to in terms of regulations, except that this is, _ça va sans dire_, the longest suspension (over one month) ever imposed in the history of Italian football for similar incidents. A warning more than a punishment. In short, **Inter** “misbehaves” and **Juventus** pays: this seems to remain the main theme of Italian football since 2006. But let’s return to **Saviano**, because some of his words deserve to be reported with great precision: > When you hear seasoned politicians say that football is just football, or that a booking is just a booking, I think: are you serious or are you mocking us? When it comes to football and fandom, it must be remembered that Inter is a victim. Its players and its fans are, but not its management, which was entirely compromised by the subservience referenced in the conviction issued last December as part of the so-called ultras investigation. How that management was allowed to remain in place has long been a mystery to me. To which management that had contact with extremely dangerous individuals, after admitting it did not report them and after reaching a settlement with sports justice, is it permitted to remain at the top? > It is hard to understand how one can tell a poor individual — for example a small entrepreneur lacking any state protection — to report criminal organizations, if at the same time red carpets are rolled out for those who could have acted and did nothing. Nothing. For those who, despite being able to obtain protection and support, chose to remain silent. This clumsy sweeping of dirt under the rug has completely destroyed the image of Italian football. > Through football as well, we have ended up normalizing mafia presence in our country. It was not just a mafia-tainted championship, but an entire league distorted at its ethical foundations. As long as Inter’s management remains in place, Italian football will never regain the essential dignity required to build a virtuous example. #### 👉 👈 #### **Inter** and **Marotta** have one path ahead of them: to report **Saviano**’s words as defamatory — yet for some reason they have not done so, probably fearing the evidence that might be presented in court. The measure is full, the cork has popped: for everyone’s sake, it is time to put an end to this disgrace. Or not? #### ## I'm part of ITALYGAME Team **together with: @girolamomarotta, @sardrt, @mikitaly, @mad-runner, @famigliacurione** 👉 VOTA PER NOI COME WITNESS👈 .jpg)

Hi Few pictures are so beautiful and attractive we just loved it though it doesn't have specific or special moments but still it had memories and beauty of life. Yeah the picture of my little princess she is looking cute in blue dress and had a beautiful hairstyle which I had made with great difficulties. Kids don't allow to touch their hair but I guess she looked more beautiful so I make a cute pony oho how lovely she is looking. Her mood was off I said please smile but she refused and she was in silent mood but I just loved her the way she was posing. Perhaps she is missing dad as he is out of station and she is papa Rani princess, baby girls are more attached with the papa. I always try to save beautiful moments and see the pictures later on and smile the beauty of the moment which I have captured. I developed the habit of photography now and I wanted to be good in it and capture different mood and angles, my kids are naughtiness and I always try to capture random clicks. Kind regards

# নমস্কার বন্ধুরা, সময়ের পালাবদলে একটা প্রশ্ন থেকে যায়,আমরা আসলেই কি ঠিক ছিলাম?আজকে এই ব্যস্ততম জীবনে দাঁড়িয়ে ফেরার তো আসলেই কোনো পথ নেই তবুও ভাবনারা আসে। Image created by OpenAI *** সে বিষ পান করেছিল— কোনো কাচের গ্লাসে নয়, কোনো আচার অনুষ্ঠানে নয়, বরং খুব ধীরে, প্রতিদিনের অভ্যাসের মতো। প্রথম দিনটা ছিল অপমানের স্বাদে তিক্ত, দ্বিতীয় দিনটা নীরবতার। তৃতীয় দিনে সে শিখে গেল— সবাইকে ক্ষমা করতে হয় না, কিন্তু নিজেকে বাঁচাতে কিছু বিষ গিলে ফেলতে হয়। মানুষ ভাবে বিষ মানেই মৃত্যু, কিন্তু সব বিষ মারে না। কিছু বিষ মানুষকে অস্বাভাবিকভাবে পরিণত করে দেয়। চোখের জল শুকিয়ে যায়, কথাগুলো কূটনৈতিক হয়ে ওঠে, হৃদয় একটা আদালত খুলে বসে— যেখানে দোষী আর নির্দোষ দুজনেই একই চেয়ারে বসে থাকে। সে বিষ পান করেছিল ভালোবাসার নামে, বিশ্বাসের নামে, একটা স্বপ্ন বাঁচিয়ে রাখার নামে। কারণ সব যুদ্ধ বাইরে হয় না, অনেক যুদ্ধ ভিতরে হয়— আর ভিতরের যুদ্ধে রক্তপাত দেখা যায় না। বছর শেষে কেউ জিজ্ঞেস করলো— “তুমি এত শান্ত কিভাবে?” সে হেসে বললো, “আমি বিষের সঙ্গে সহবাস করেছি, এখন তিক্ততাও আমাকে ভয় পায়।” বিষ পানের এই গল্পে কোনো নাটকীয় মৃত্যু নেই, কোনো করতালি নেই। আছে শুধু এক মানুষ— যে ধীরে ধীরে বিষকে ওষুধে পরিণত করতে শিখেছে। ** @bangla.witness as witness** **OR** ** @rme as your proxy** ______ ** Support @heroism Initiative by Delegating your Steem Power ** | | | | | | | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | | | | | | _____ ** || || ** *** | **ধন্যবাদ।সবাই ভালো থাকবেন।** | |-| ** || | || ** *** Posted using PUSS COIN:BUY/SELL

让我们回到 1913 年 8 月 18 日，摩纳哥的蒙地卡罗赌场。那天晚上，在一个轮盘赌桌上，发生了一件令人毛骨悚然的事情：轮盘上的小球连续停在了“黑色”上。连续 5 次，连续 10 次，连续 15 次……整个赌场的赌徒都疯了。大家疯狂地把筹码押在“红色”上，因为所有人的大脑都在尖叫：“已经连续 15 次黑色了，下一次绝对、必须、必定是红色！”结果，第 16 次是黑色。第 20 次，还是黑色。人们借钱、抵押手表，疯狂地加注“红色”。直到第 27 次，小球终于停在了“红色”上。但在那之前，无数的赌徒已经输得倾家荡产。赌场那一晚赚翻了。这就是“赌徒谬误”的最惨烈演示。人们错误地认为，如果在某段时间内一个随机事件发生的频率比平常高，那么它在未来发生的频率就会降低（反之亦然），以此来“平衡”整个概率。为什么我们会这么蠢 ？因为人类的大脑是用来在丛林里找规律的（草丛动了可能是老虎），而不是用来处理概率论的。我们极度渴望“确定性”和“因果关系”。但在严谨的数学概率中，对于“相互独立的事件”（比如抛硬币、掷骰子、轮盘赌），我们必须引入一个冰冷的公式——条件概率下的独立性定义：$P(A|B) = P(A)$这意味着，在事件 B（前 26 次都是黑色）已经发生的条件下，事件 A（第 27 次是黑色）发生的概率，依然等于事件 A 本身的概率。哪怕你抛出了 99 次正面，第 100 次抛出正面的概率依然是绝对的 0.5。硬币没有记忆，它不知道自己前 99 次干了什么。这个谬误如何摧毁你的人生？股市里的“马丁格尔策略”（Martingale）： 一直跌，一直按倍数加仓补入，坚信“只要反弹一次我就能回本”。但在现实中，股票可以跌到退市，或者你的资金链在反弹到来之前就已经断裂了。市场可以保持非理性的时间，远比你保持不破产的时间长。沉没成本的死循环： 因为觉得自己“倒霉太久了，快要转运了”，所以拒绝离开一张输钱的牌桌、一份没有希望的工作、或者一段糟糕的感情。这篇文字想告诉你：永远不要向概率“讨债”。随机性是最无情的杀手，它不会因为你输得太惨，就对你网开一面。如何彻底拔除脑子里的“赌徒谬误”？ 1. 建立“无记忆模型”（The Memoryless Mindset）：当你面对任何独立随机事件时。强迫自己按下脑子里的“重置键”。在抛下一次硬币前、在做下一次短线交易前，告诉自己：“这是第一把。以前发生的一切都归零了。”不要用过去的连败来预测未来的胜利。每一天、每一次出手，都是一个完全崭新的 50/50。 2. 区分“独立事件”与“相关事件”：赌徒谬误只适用于“独立事件”（抛硬币）。如果你在打扑克（比如 21 点），你记住了前面出过什么牌，那这叫“相关事件”（牌堆里的牌变少了），这时候概率是会变的。如果你在职场上连续三次搞砸了项目，第四次搞砸的概率可能会更高（因为你的自信心受挫，或者老板不再给你好资源），这绝不是“触底反弹”。看清楚你所在的牌桌。不要在需要实力的相关游戏里，去求助于独立的玄学概率。3. 设定死线，切断“补仓本能”：如果你在投资或赌博中连输。绝对不要加注。给自己设定一个铁血的止损线：“只要连输三把，立刻离场。”离场不是因为“今天运气不好”，而是因为你的心态已经崩了，你的大脑开始产生“下一把一定赢”的幻觉了。只要你还在桌上，你就是那只被算法和概率玩弄的鸽子。别再盯着那个轮盘发呆了。哪怕它已经开出了一百次黑色。下一个结果，依然与你无关。不要用你有限的生命和金钱，去跟宇宙那无穷的随机性对赌。

আজকে আমি এসেছি আপনাদের সকলের সাথে একটি জেনারেল রাইটিং পোস্ট শেয়ার করতে। আমার লেখার মাধ্যমে আমার চিন্তা ভাবনা গুলো আপনাদের কাছে পৌঁছানোর লক্ষ্যে এই লেখাগুলো শেয়ার করা। ----------------------- ----------------------- আশা করছি যে আপনারা আপনাদের মূল্যবান মন্তব্যের মাধ্যমেই আমার এই লেখাটি সৌন্দর্য বৃদ্ধি করবেন এবং আপনাদের মতামত ব্যক্ত করবেন। আমি যদি কোনো কিছু ভুল বলে থাকি। তাহলে অবশ্যই আমাকে শুধরে দিতে ভুলবেন না। নিজেকে হারিয়ে ফেলা এক ধরনের নীরব বিপ্লব, যেটা অনেক সময় আমরা নিজের মধ্যেই করি কিন্তু বুঝতে পারি না। আমরা যে মানুষ, তার সঙ্গে লড়াই করে নিজের পুরনো স্বরূপ, পুরনো চিন্তা, পুরনো ধারণাগুলোকে ছেড়ে দেয়া এটাই আসল বিপ্লব। এই বিপ্লব হয় কোনো দাঙ্গা-হাঙ্গামা ছাড়াই, কিন্তু এর প্রভাব অনেক গভীর।আমরা যখন নিজের পরিচয়কে, অহংকারকে, কিংবা স্বার্থকে একটু পিছনে রেখে অন্যরকম একটা নতুন দিক খুঁজে বের করার চেষ্টা করি, তখনই ‘নিজেকে হারিয়ে ফেলা’ ঘটে। এটি কোনো পরাজয় নয়, বরং নিজের পুরনো খুঁটিনাটি জিনিস থেকে মুক্তি পাওয়া। নিজের মধ্যে এমন একটা পরিবর্তন আনা, যা হয়তো বাইরের চোখে ছোট দেখায়, কিন্তু অভ্যন্তরে বড় শক্তি নিয়ে আসে। এই নীরব বিপ্লবের মাধ্যমে আমরা সমাজের যে নিয়ম-কানুন, প্রত্যাশা, এবং নিজের ভিতরের ভয়গুলোকে ভেঙে ফেলি। আর তখনই আমাদের মন ও জীবন সত্যিকারের স্বাধীনতা পায়। আমরা বুঝতে শুরু করি, জীবনের আসল মানে একে অন্যকে প্রভাবিত করা নয়, নিজের সঙ্গে শান্তিতে থাকা।নিজেকে হারিয়ে ফেলা মানে নিজেকে নতুন রূপে আবিষ্কার করা। এটা হতে পারে নিজের আত্মমর্যাদা ও অহংকার থেকে দূরে সরে যাওয়া, এমনকি নিজের কিছু স্বপ্ন বা বিশ্বাসকে ছেড়ে দেওয়া, যাতে নতুন কিছু গড়ে ওঠে। অনেক সময় এই প্রক্রিয়া কঠিন লাগে, কারণ নিজের পুরনো সত্তাকে ছেড়ে দেয়া মানে এক ধরনের অজানা ভয়কে সম্মুখীন হওয়া। তবে এই নীরব বিপ্লব আমাদের জীবনে নতুন দিগন্ত খুলে দেয়। নিজের ভেতরের গণ্ডি ভেঙে নতুন সম্ভাবনা খুঁজে পাওয়ার শক্তি এনে দেয়। তাই নিজেকে হারিয়ে ফেলা কোনো পরাজয় নয় বরং এক গভীর যাত্রা, যেখানে আমরা সত্যিকার অর্থেই নিজের জীবনের অধিকারী হই।

The new thread-shaped chips Image source: They are microcomputers wound into a thread. Historically, microchips were built under an almost unquestionable rule, they must be rigid planes and made on silicon wafers, now, researchers from Fundan University in Shanghai decided to break that logic, instead of trying to adapt traditional chips to tissues, they did something more radical, they transformed the tissue itself into a computational system. The result is ultra-fine fibers, as fine as a human hair, capable of incorporating complete electronic circuits in their structure. We are not just talking about sensors or conductive threads, we are talking about microcomputers wound in the form of a thread, led by Pwiisan of the Chinese Academy of Sciences. The result is surprising The team spent more than a decade developing what they call FICs, fiber integrated circuits. The process begins with an extendable polymer sheet winged until it reaches a roughness of less than 1 nanometer. On that flexible base, traditional lithography techniques are applied to build transistors, receivers, capacitors and diodes, exactly as in a conventional chip. Then, that flat chip is rolled like a sushi roll, forming a compact spiral that becomes a sealed fiber, the result is surprising. Each centimeter of fiber can contain about 100,000 transistors, a single millimeter already includes tens of thousands and a full meter can reach millions, approaching the scale of traditional CPUs. But perhaps the most impressive fact is not the computational power, it is the resistance, they withstood up to 10,000 bending and abrasion cycles. They stretched up to 30%, were twisted up to 180º per cm, withstood more than 100 machine washes, withstood temperatures up to 100º and survived being run over by a 15-ton truck. All this while maintaining full functionality, unlike previous generations of fiber electronics that focused only on energy conduction or simple sensors, this new technology integrates power, sensing, processing, and even display in a single filament, processes digital and analog signals, executes basic image recognition with architecture inspired by neural networks. Operating as a complete but flexible computing system, this completely changes the game for wearable technologies, clothing that processes data locally, surgical gloves capable of transmitting tactile sensation in remote surgeries, brain-computer interfaces compatible with soft tissues of the human body, virtual reality devices that do not need external rigid modules. According to the team, this is the key to the next generation of electronics integrated into the human body, because the body is not made of silicon, it is made of soft tissue, and now for the first time computing begins to speak that same physical language. When processing, sensors and intelligence become part of the fabric we wear, the border between technology and biology begins to become increasingly tenuous. If computing can already be sewn into clothes and folded like a hair, the next step is inevitable, bringing the mind even closer. ***There are flowers that whisper, and there are flowers that blaze. The bougainvillea belongs to the latter — a cascade of color that spills over walls, fences, and rooftops like living confetti. Scientifically known as Bougainvillea, this vibrant climber is less about delicate fragility and more about bold expression. Its brilliant pinks, purples, reds, oranges, and whites feel like nature celebrating out loud.What many people mistake for petals are actually papery bracts — thin, leaf-like structures that surround the tiny white flowers at the center. These bracts catch the sunlight and seem almost translucent, glowing warmly in the afternoon heat. In tropical and subtropical regions, bougainvillea thrives effortlessly, draping over balconies and archways, transforming ordinary streets into corridors of color. It asks for little — plenty of sun and well-drained soil — yet gives so much visual drama in return.There is something deeply human about bougainvillea’s resilience. It flourishes in harsh conditions where other plants hesitate. Even in dry seasons, when the earth cracks and the air feels heavy, bougainvillea continues to bloom with fearless intensity. Its thorny stems may surprise the unwary hand, but they speak of protection — a reminder that strength often accompanies beauty.*** ---- ### Device Information ---- Device | Redmi 14 Pro Plus -|-| **Lens** | **No Lens** **Edit** | **Lightroom CC** **Captured by** | **@pioneerjeff** --- ### Thanks for Visiting My Blog ❤️ ----

Na rynku pojawiają się nazwy, które brzmią poważnie, wręcz korporacyjnie – np. **Siła Finoblia / JBG Capital S.A.**. Problem w tym, że czasami pod takimi nazwami kryją się projekty, które **nie są tym, czym się wydają**. Poniżej znajdziesz analizę projektu działającego pod tym brandem oraz powiązanych stron i paneli: * **Strona informacyjna:** sila-finoblia.com * **Panel użytkownika:** user.myaccountgateway.net --- ## Brzmi poważnie, ale czy takie jest w praktyce? Nazwa „JBG Capital S.A.” może sugerować, że mamy do czynienia z tradycyjną spółką akcyjną prowadzącą działalność finansową. „Siła Finoblia” też brzmi jak marka z misją i doświadczeniem. Tylko że to **zwyczajnie nazwy**, które nie muszą mieć nic wspólnego z faktycznym nadzorem, regulacją czy odpowiedzialnym biznesem. Na stronie i w panelu często nie ma: * realnych danych o spółce (nazwa, adres, numer rejestracyjny), * informacji o tym, kto prowadzi działalność i gdzie jest zarejestrowany, * numerów nadzorców lub licencji (KNF, FCA, CySEC itp.). To są elementy, które w prawdziwych firmach inwestycyjnych są jasno podane. --- ## Dwie domeny = jedna niejasność W przypadku tego projektu mamy rozdzielenie na: * **Stronę informacyjną:** sila-finoblia.com * **Panel logowania:** user.myaccountgateway.net W legalnie działających instytucjach inwestycyjnych panel klienta jest **częścią jednej platformy z pełną identyfikacją**. Rozdzielanie domen w sposób niespójny może być sygnałem, że: * platforma przenosi się między adresami, * chce ukrywać jednoznaczny podmiot odpowiedzialny, * utrudnia identyfikację operatora. To nie jest standardowa praktyka w regulowanym biznesie finansowym. --- ## Jak wygląda ścieżka „inwestora”? Z doświadczeń związanych z podobnymi projektami wynika, że często: 1. kontaktujesz się z kimś, kto wygląda jak „opiekun inwestora”, 2. wpłacasz swoje pierwsze środki, 3. panel pokazuje zyski, które wyglądają dobrze na wykresie, 4. przy próbie wypłaty pojawiają się „dodatkowe opłaty”, 5. wszystko zaczyna się komplikować. Zyski widoczne w panelu nie zawsze oznaczają, że Twoje środki **działają na realnym rynku**. To może być tylko wizualizacja. --- ## A co z regulacjami? W praktyce: * na stronach nie ma informacji o tym, że podmiot jest regulowany przez KNF, FCA czy inne nadzorujące instytucje, * nie ma numerów licencji, * nie ma referencji do funduszy gwarantowanych. Dla inwestora to kluczowe: jeśli broker nie ma licencji, to **nie podlega nadzorowi, nie ma ochrony środków i nie ma procedur reklamacyjnych**. --- ## Jeżeli już coś wpłaciłeś Jeśli masz konto i środki na panelu, pamiętaj o kilku rzeczach: * **nie wpłacaj kolejnych pieniędzy tylko dlatego, że „trzeba coś uzupełnić”,** * dobrze zabezpiecz wszystkie dowody: potwierdzenia przelewów, maile, zrzuty ekranu, historię logowań, * nie podejmuj decyzji pod presją telefoniczną lub pod wpływem emocji. W takich sytuacjach najczęściej najbardziej szkodzi się sobie samemu, robiąc kolejne wpłaty. --- ## Co robić zamiast „ratować konto”? Najgorszym impulsem jest „spróbuję jeszcze raz, bo może się uda”. Takie podejście często pogłębia stratę. Jeśli chcesz: * **sprawdzić, co realnie możesz zrobić,** * **dowiedzieć się, jakie masz opcje w ramach prawa,** * **zrozumieć, jakie kroki mają sens**, możesz uzyskać **informacje i wstępną analizę Twojej sytuacji** pod numerem: 📞 **722//359//640** To nie jest obietnica błyskawicznego odzyskania pieniędzy. To **ktoś, kto pomoże Ci ocenić, co faktycznie da się zrobić**, zanim straty będą jeszcze większe. --- ## Podsumowanie Projekt reklamowany jako *Siła Finoblia / JBG Capital S.A.*: * nie przedstawia jasnej informacji o regulacji, * rozdziela stronę i panel na różne domeny, * wykazuje typowe sygnały ostrzegawcze, jakie pojawiają się przy platformach wysokiego ryzyka. Zanim zrobisz kolejny przelew, warto **zatrzymać się i przemyśleć, czy ryzyko jest tego warte**.

It’s is known colloquially as Chinese hibiscus, China rose, Hawaiian hibiscus, rose mallow & shoeblack plant which is a species of tropical hibiscus, a flowering plant in the Hibisceae tribe belonging to the family of Malvaceae. It’s widely cultivated as an ornamental plant in the tropics & subtropics, but its native range is Vanuatu. Hibiscus is commonly consumed in teas made from its flowers, leaves, and roots. In addition to casual consumption, Hibiscus is also used as an herbal medicine to treat hypertension, cholesterol production & cancer progression. Hibiscus, particularly Hibiscus sabdariffa, is known for its diverse medicinal properties and is used in traditional medicine for various purposes. Some of its key medicinal uses include: lowering blood pressure, reducing cholesterol, managing blood sugar levels, acting as an antioxidant and anti-inflammatory agent, promoting liver health, aiding in weight management, supporting gut health, acting as a diuretic, and potentially offering antibacterial and anticancer properties. **The pink rose flower carries a softness that feels almost like a whisper. Unlike the bold drama of red roses, pink roses speak in gentle tones—of admiration, gratitude, and quiet affection. Their petals unfold in delicate layers, each one holding a shade that ranges from the palest blush to a vibrant fuchsia. In every garden they grace, pink roses bring an atmosphere of tenderness and calm.** **There is something timeless about watching a pink rose bloom. From a tightly wrapped bud to a full, open blossom, the transformation feels like a slow, graceful dance. Morning dew resting on its petals makes it glow under the early sun, while the faint fragrance drifting through the air creates a moment of stillness. It is not just a flower; it is a pause in the rush of daily life.** **Pink roses often symbolize appreciation and heartfelt thanks. They are the flowers we give to friends, mentors, and loved ones when words feel too small. A bouquet of pink roses can brighten hospital rooms, celebrate birthdays, or quietly say, “I am thinking of you.” Their color carries warmth without intensity, making them perfect messengers of sincere emotion.** **In gardens, pink roses stand as symbols of care and patience. They require attention—pruning, sunlight, nourishment—but reward that devotion with breathtaking beauty. আজকে আমি এসেছি আপনাদের সকলের সাথে একটি জেনারেল রাইটিং পোস্ট শেয়ার করতে। আমার লেখার মাধ্যমে আমার চিন্তা ভাবনা গুলো আপনাদের কাছে পৌঁছানোর লক্ষ্যে এই লেখাগুলো শেয়ার করা। ----------------------- ----------------------- আশা করছি যে আপনারা আপনাদের মূল্যবান মন্তব্যের মাধ্যমেই আমার এই লেখাটি সৌন্দর্য বৃদ্ধি করবেন এবং আপনাদের মতামত ব্যক্ত করবেন। আমি যদি কোনো কিছু ভুল বলে থাকি। তাহলে অবশ্যই আমাকে শুধরে দিতে ভুলবেন না। মানুষের বিশ্বাস সবচেয়ে হালকা একটা ব্যাপার কিংবা হালকা একটা অনুভূতি বলে আমি মনে করি, কারণ পৃথিবীর সবকিছু আসলে জোড়া লাগানো গেলেও বিশ্বাস এমন একটা জিনিস সেটা হয়তো অল্প কয়েকবার জোড়া লাগানো যায়, তবুও সেই যে ক্ষতস্থান তৈরি হয়, সেটা কিন্তু কখনোই মুছে ফেলা যায় না। অর্থাৎ, একটা কাচের গ্লাসকে আপনি যদি ভেঙে ফেলেন এবং এরপরে যদি জোড়া লাগান, তবে হয়তো আপনি সাময়িকভাবে জোড়া লাগাতে পারবেন, কিন্তু তার যে ভেঙে যাওয়া দাগ থাকে, সেটা কিন্তু কখনোই আপনি চিরতরে মুছে ফেলতে পারবেন না। আমাদের বিশ্বাসটাও ঠিক তেমন, কিন্তু কাচের গ্লাসের সাথে আমাদের বিশ্বাসের একটা তফাৎ ঠিকই রয়েছে। সেটা হলো, কাঁচের গ্লাস ভেঙে গেলে তো ভেঙেই যায়, ঠিক একইভাবে বিশ্বাস ভেঙে গেলেও ভেঙে যায়। কিন্তু কাচের গ্লাস ভেঙে গেলে অনেক প্রচণ্ড শব্দ হয়, কিন্তু বিশ্বাস ভেঙে গেলে কোনো শব্দ হয় না। নিরবে আমাদের সবকিছু শেষ করে দিয়ে, বিশেষ করে আমাদের মনকে একেবারে দুমড়ে-মুচড়ে দিয়ে এমন একটা পরিস্থিতিতে আমাদের দাঁড় করায়, যেখানে আসলে আমরা এমন অনেক মানুষকেই আর বিশ্বাস করতে পারি না যে মানুষগুলোকে অবিশ্বাস করার কারণ নেই। কারণ, বিশ্বাস একবার যদি ভেঙে যায়, তবে সেটাকে আবার ফিরিয়ে আনাটা অনেক কষ্টকর। আসলে, আমাদের চারপাশে এমন অনেক মানুষ থাকে, যারা বিশ্বাস ভাঙতে সবচেয়ে বেশি পছন্দ করে। আর এই আঘাতটা, আসলে যারা দেয়, তারা কখনো উপলব্ধিও হয়তো করতে পারে না আমাদের দিচ্ছে, সেটা প্রভাব আমাদের উপর কেমন পড়তে পারে। আসলে এগুলো আমাদের নিয়তি বলা চলে। কিন্তু সবকিছু নিয়তির দোষ দিলেই তো শেষ হয়ে যায় না, কিংবা দায় সারা যায় না। আসলে, আমাদের সবচেয়ে কষ্টকর জায়গা, যেটা আমার মনে হয়, সেটা হলো আমাদের প্রিয় মানুষেরাই আমাদের সবচেয়ে বেশি আঘাত দেয়। এবং তাদের এই আঘাত আমরা সহ্য করতে পারি না, এবং তারা দিনের পর দিন আমাদের আঘাত করতেই থাকে।

When you think of a flower that screams “exotic,” the Canna lily (genus Canna) instantly comes to mind. With its towering, glossy foliage and bold, trumpet‑shaped blooms, this tropical favorite has earned a spot in borders, water gardens, and even indoor containers across the globe. In this post we’ll explore what makes the Canna lily such a captivating plant, how to grow it successfully, and why it continues to inspire gardeners and designers alike. A Quick Look at the Plant Height & Form – Most Canna varieties reach 3–7 feet tall, though dwarf selections stay under 2 feet. The stems are sturdy, topped with a crown of large, sword‑shaped leaves that range from deep green to bronze, and sometimes sport striking variegation. Flowers – Blooms appear in late spring and can persist into early fall, depending on climate. Each flower is a vivid, open‑mouth trumpet, often 2–4 inches across, in shades of red, orange, yellow, pink, purple, and even bi‑colored blends. The petals are technically “tepals,” a single whorl that gives the flower its sleek silhouette. Fruit – After pollination, the plant produces small, nut‑like seeds encased in a fleshy aril. While not commonly harvested for culinary use, the seeds are an easy way to propagate new plants. Growing Canna Lilies Successfully Step |What to Do |Why It Matters -|-|- Location |Plant in full sun (6‑8 hrs). |Sunlight fuels the massive foliage and flower production. Soil |Well‑draining, fertile soil with organic matter. Add compost or aged manure. |Canna roots are shallow but hungry; nutrients promote robust growth. Water |Keep soil consistently moist, especially during hot spells. Mulch to retain humidity. |The plant thrives in wet conditions—think of it as a “water‑lover.” Planting Depth |Set rhizomes 2–3 inches deep, spaced 12–18 inches apart. |Proper depth protects rhizomes from frost and encourages upright stems. Feeding |Apply a balanced 10‑10‑10 fertilizer every 4‑6 weeks during the growing season. Heavy bloomers require steady nutrient supply. Winter Care |In USDA zones 8‑10, mulch heavily; in colder zones, dig up rhizomes, dry them, and store in a frost‑free container. |Rhizomes are tender; overwintering preserves the plant for next year. Popular Varieties to Consider ‘Raspberry Ice’ – Bright magenta petals with a creamy edge, perfect for cutting gardens. ‘Tropic Snow’ – A pure white flower that stands out against dark foliage. ‘Musa’ – Known for its unusually broad leaves and deep orange blossoms. ‘Fascination’ – A compact dwarf that works well in containers or small borders. Beyond Beauty: Uses & Symbolism Canna lilies are more than decorative foliage. In tropical regions, the rhizomes are a food source, boiled or ground into flour. The large leaves serve as natural wrappers for cooking, while the flowers have been used in traditional medicine for their anti‑inflammatory properties. Symbolically, the Canna represents pride, vitality, and the triumph of the human spirit—a fitting motif for any space that aims to feel uplifting. Final Thoughts Whether you’re a seasoned horticulturist or a weekend‑garden enthusiast, the Canna lily offers a rewarding blend of low‑maintenance vigor and dramatic visual impact. With a little sun, moisture, and a pinch of fertilizer, you’ll soon have a living sculpture that sways in the breeze, draws admiring glances, and reminds you why gardens are the ultimate canvas for nature’s artistry. Plant a few rhizomes this spring and let the tropical drama unfold in your own backyard. ***

There was heartbreak at the Principality Stadium today as Wales national rugby union team came agonisingly close to ending their long losing run, only to see victory slip away late against Scotland national rugby union team. For much of the afternoon it felt like something had finally clicked. From the opening whistle Wales played with an intensity and clarity that has been missing in recent months. The early try from Rhys Carre set the tone and the red shirts dominated large periods of the contest, controlling possession, winning the physical battle and asking serious questions of a Scottish side that looked rattled. Captain Dewi Lake summed up the mood perfectly after the match, describing the defeat as gut wrenching. It was hard to disagree. Wales delivered on the plans they had spoken about all week. The first half in particular showed a team playing with confidence, patience and belief, applying pressure and attacking with purpose. It felt like a turning point was finally within reach. Even after the break, Wales continued to build. They led comfortably at times and for the first time in a long while looked like a side in control of their own destiny. But rugby has a cruel habit of punishing small lapses, and Wales were unable to stay locked into the moment for the full eighty minutes. Scotland stayed in touch and eventually found the late score that broke Welsh hearts.

Executive Summary UK-based mental health charity Mind has announced a year-long inquiry into artificial intelligence and its impact on mental health, following a Guardian investigation that found Google’s AI Overviews provided misleading and potentially dangerous medical advice. The inquiry aims to evaluate risks, safeguards, and regulatory frameworks as AI systems increasingly shape access to health information for millions of users globally. Part I — What Happened (Verified Information) The Investigation An investigation by The Guardian reported that Google AI Overviews — AI-generated summaries displayed above traditional search results — provided inaccurate or misleading medical information across various health topics, including: Mental health conditions such as psychosis and eating disorders Cancer and liver disease Women’s health issues Experts cited in the reporting described some outputs as “very dangerous” and potentially harmful, particularly if users delayed or avoided professional medical treatment. AI Overviews reportedly reach approximately 2 billion users per month. Following the investigation: Google removed AI Overviews for certain medical queries. Some mental health-related outputs reportedly remained active. Google stated that the “vast majority” of AI Overviews provide accurate information and emphasized ongoing investments in quality and safety mechanisms. Mind’s Response Mind announced: A year-long global commission into AI and mental health. Participation from clinicians, policymakers, individuals with lived experience, technology firms, and health providers. A goal of shaping regulatory standards and safeguards for digital mental health tools. The charity described this as the first initiative of its kind globally. Part II — Why It Matters (Strategic & Policy Analysis) 1. AI as a Frontline Health Gateway Search engines increasingly function as the first point of contact for individuals experiencing health symptoms. When AI-generated summaries replace curated links, the architecture of information access changes fundamentally. Instead of: Multiple perspectives Source attribution Contextual nuance Users receive: Concise, authoritative-sounding summaries Reduced visibility into provenance Fewer cues about evidentiary strength This shift compresses complexity into clarity—sometimes at the cost of accuracy. 2. The Illusion of Confidence Generative AI systems often present information in fluent, authoritative language. In mental health contexts, this presentation style can be particularly risky. Unlike physical ailments, mental health conditions involve: Stigma Emotional vulnerability Crisis risk An AI system that offers incorrect reassurance or discourages help-seeking behavior may unintentionally amplify harm. The risk is not merely factual inaccuracy, but misplaced trust. 3. Regulatory Vacuum Mental health information historically falls under medical governance frameworks. AI-generated summaries, however, exist in a hybrid zone: Not formally medical advice Yet delivered at mass scale With high perceived authority This creates a regulatory ambiguity. Mind’s inquiry may contribute to: Standards for AI-generated health content Clearer labeling requirements Structured escalation protocols for crisis-related queries Stronger oversight mechanisms 4. Platform Accountability vs. Innovation Google maintains that its AI Overviews are helpful and largely accurate. However, public scrutiny highlights a core dilemma: AI innovation rewards speed and scale. Mental health governance requires caution and accountability. As AI becomes embedded in everyday search infrastructure, content quality is no longer a secondary feature—it becomes a public health variable. Part III — Risk & Outlook Immediate Risks Vulnerable individuals relying on incomplete or misleading advice Erosion of trust in digital health information Increased legal and regulatory scrutiny of AI platforms Medium-Term Scenarios Scenario 1: Stronger Safeguards Mandatory labeling, licensing agreements with health institutions, and automatic crisis routing become industry norms. Scenario 2: Fragmented Regulation Different jurisdictions impose varying AI-health rules, complicating global platform deployment. Scenario 3: Public-Private Collaboration Charities, clinicians, and tech firms co-design ethical AI frameworks for mental health. Conclusion Mind’s inquiry signals a growing recognition that AI is no longer peripheral to healthcare information—it is structurally embedded within it. The controversy surrounding Google’s AI Overviews underscores a broader transition: digital systems are increasingly mediating vulnerable human moments. As AI systems move from productivity tools to health information gateways, the central question shifts from technical capability to governance responsibility.

The rover for weekend hikes Sentigent Technology presented a concept that shows the use of recreational technology, an explorer robot designed to accompany humans on outdoor adventures, the Rover X3 is not a humanoid, it is not industrial and it does not promise to replace anyone. It is 45 cm high and was designed as a robotic Sherpa capable of carrying equipment, climbing steep stairs and crossing rugged terrain while accompanying its owner's every step. The service it offers is simple, making days easier with the help of a machine. The rover can carry backpacks on weekend hikes, automatically follow its user, and even go into patrol mode, monitoring the campsite for small intruders such as forest animals. The company also suggests more daring uses, such as sending it to the playground as a kind of robotic babysitter, but that's where the line between usefulness and recklessness begins to blur. With a battery life of about 6 hours, X3 is far from being an epic explorer. What it really represents is something else: an attempt to integrate robotics into everyday recreation. It could be the first Duo Rover companion robot for outdoor use, a category that practically did not exist until now. And if machines are already coming to be by our side, they need to be safer, right? Sorry for my Ingles, it's not my main language. This article is a summary of a post originally published at - . **By Sunny Energy RX** A lot of Arizona solar systems don’t underperform because “solar doesn’t work” — they underperform because the system was sized, designed, or configured for the sale, not for long-term performance in desert heat. If you’ve ever felt buried under inverter jargon, confusing financing terms, or “too-good-to-be-true” production promises, solar system consultation is the shortcut to clarity. Instead of guessing, a qualified consultant helps you make decisions like a long-term owner—so your system keeps producing through brutal summers, utility rule changes, and the reality that many installers don’t stay in business forever. **What solar consultation services actually do (in the real world)** A good consultation isn’t a sales pitch. It’s a practical evaluation that can include: - **Usage + roof/site assessment:** reviews 12–24 months of bills, checks roof condition, shading, orientation, and whether your home needs energy efficiency improvements first. * **System design + engineering review:** validates layout, inverter strategy, and future-ready planning (battery, EV charger, expansion). + **Equipment comparison (no brand bias):** panels, inverters, optimizers, batteries, racking—matched to your roof and Arizona conditions. - **Financial reality check:** payback timeline, lifetime savings, incentives, and a clear look at ownership vs lease/PPA tradeoffs. * **Installer vetting + bid review:** confirms licensing/insurance, compares quotes apples-to-apples, and flags “shortcut” installs. + **Permits + compliance support:** helps avoid delays and headaches with utility interconnection and local code requirements. As discussed in more detail on Sunny Energy RX, the goal is simple: **make sure the system you have (or the one you’re about to buy) performs the way it should—without nasty surprises later.** **How to choose the right solar consultant in Arizona** Before you hire anyone, look for these trust signals: - **Independence:** are they advising you, or steering you toward one installer’s products? * **Arizona experience:** desert heat, monsoons, dust, and local utility policies aren’t “nice to know”—they’re everything. + **Credentials that matter:** NABCEP and proven solar service expertise, not generic contracting claims. - **Transparent scope + fee:** clear deliverables, written analysis, and no vague “consulting package” fluff. **About Sunny Energy RX** **Sunny Energy RX** is a trusted Arizona solar repair, maintenance, and monitoring company. Executive Summary Microsoft has acknowledged a configuration error that caused its enterprise AI assistant, Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat, to access and summarise certain users’ confidential emails stored in Outlook draft and sent folders. The company stated that while no unauthorized users gained access to restricted data, the behavior did not align with intended privacy protections. A global update has been deployed to address the issue. Part I — What Happened (Verified Information) The Issue Microsoft confirmed that: Copilot Chat incorrectly processed some emails marked as confidential. The affected content was located in users’ Drafts and Sent Items folders within Outlook desktop. Sensitivity labels and data loss prevention policies were configured, yet Copilot still summarised the content. According to Microsoft, this resulted from a “code issue.” The problem was reportedly first identified in January and later referenced in service alerts, including notices visible on NHS IT support dashboards in England. Microsoft’s Response Microsoft stated: Access controls and data protection policies remained intact. Users did not gain access to information they were not already authorized to see. A configuration update has now been deployed globally for enterprise customers. The company emphasized that the issue involved Copilot summarizing content for the email author—not exposing it to third parties. Part II — Why It Matters (Strategic & Risk Analysis) 1. Enterprise AI Trust and Adoption Microsoft has positioned Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat as a secure, enterprise-grade AI assistant embedded within Outlook, Teams, and other workplace tools. Even if no cross-user data exposure occurred, the incident raises concerns about: AI behavior alignment with data governance policies Sensitivity label enforcement reliability Confidence in AI-driven automation within regulated sectors For industries such as healthcare, finance, and government, perception of control is as critical as actual containment. 2. The Governance Gap Experts cited in the reporting argue that rapid AI deployment increases the likelihood of configuration and integration errors. Unlike traditional software features, generative AI systems: Interact dynamically with multiple data sources Interpret and summarise content contextually Operate across layered security configurations This complexity makes perfect alignment between AI functionality and enterprise policy difficult to guarantee. 3. “Private by Default” as a Design Principle Cybersecurity specialists note that enterprise AI systems should be: Opt-in rather than default-enabled Restricted from accessing protected content unless explicitly permitted Designed with conservative exposure logic As AI capabilities expand, organizations may need stronger internal review protocols before activating new features. 4. AI Hype vs. Operational Readiness Industry analysts suggest that competitive pressure to deploy AI capabilities rapidly may outpace governance readiness. Organizations often face: Executive demand for AI integration Productivity expectations Marketing narratives emphasizing urgency This environment can reduce the time available for thorough security validation. Part III — Risk & Outlook Immediate Risks Reduced enterprise trust in embedded AI assistants Heightened scrutiny from regulated sectors Increased auditing of AI access controls Medium-Term Considerations Scenario 1: Strengthened AI Governance Frameworks Companies introduce clearer segregation between confidential data and AI processing layers. Scenario 2: Slower AI Rollouts in Sensitive Sectors Healthcare and government institutions adopt phased AI activation. Scenario 3: Regulatory Attention Authorities introduce stricter compliance standards for enterprise AI integrations. Conclusion The Copilot incident does not appear to involve external data breaches, but it underscores a critical issue in enterprise AI deployment: alignment between generative AI behavior and existing data protection frameworks. As AI tools become embedded across workplace infrastructure, even minor configuration errors can have outsized reputational consequences. The broader question is not whether AI errors will occur—but how effectively governance mechanisms evolve alongside rapid technological expansion.

A bowlful of small freshwater fish. Such fish are usually found in ponds, canals, beels and rivers and are very popular in the markets of rural Bangladesh. Although small, these fish are rich in nutrients. They contain high levels of protein, calcium, phosphorus and various vitamins, which are equally beneficial for children and adults. Especially small fish can be eaten with bones, which plays an important role in meeting the body's calcium needs . Small fish have a special place in the rural food culture of Bangladesh. They are used to make various delicious dishes such as fried, stewed, stewed or dried. Cooking them with mustard paste, garlic, green chilies and tomatoes enhances the taste. These fish are more available during the rainy season and are also relatively cheap in the market. Small fish are not only delicious, but also economically important. Many fishermen and small fish farmers make a living by selling these fish. If properly conserved and sustainably harvested, this resource can contribute to the country's nutrition and economy for a long time. Therefore, there is a need to raise awareness about conserving and cultivating local fish species.

人與人之間，像一張網。原以為彼此牽絆，足夠牢固。直到某個瞬間回頭，才發現許多聯結，早已在時光裡鬆動。不是斷了，只是淡了。悄無聲息，漸行漸遠 趁著清閒，整理一下通訊錄。劃過一串串名字，才發覺有些人，很久沒在聊天框裡出現。不知從何時起，也不再分享日常，不再主動問候。沒有告別，就這樣，淡出了彼此的生活 曾經，我會為這些安靜下來的關係耿耿於懷 會想，一段相遇為何不能長久 會在深夜反覆回想過往的細節，心有遺憾，问自己，是不是我哪裡做得不夠好 不是生氣，也不是難過。只是心裡輕輕知道了，有些人來到我的生命裡，本就是一程，不是一生 他們陪我走過一段風雨，給過我掌心溫熱，讓我在某段日子裡，覺得人間值得。那些真心，都是真的，無須懷疑 只是如今緣分到了散場的時候，誰也無法挽留。就像季節更迭，雲聚雲散。沒有對錯，只是自然而然，走到了這裡 所以，我不再追問，也不再強求 緣來時，認真相待；緣去後，安靜目送 那些溫暖過我的人，一起走過的路，藏在心底的溫柔，我都好好珍藏。它們沒有消失，只是化作了生命的一部分，讓我更柔軟，也更懂得珍惜 我不再執著永恆，也不再害怕離別。人生本就是一場不斷遇見，不斷告別的旅程。有人來，就有人走。我能做的，不過是擁有時用心，失去時坦然 一念緣起，我珍惜所有不期而遇 一念緣滅，我看淡所有不辭而別 我心安然 只願，曾經相遇的人，都平安順遂 只願，我自己，在這無常的人世間，溫柔，安靜，從容自在

I set out to the farmland, a place where I could possibly find many different insects that live around the woods. I arrived at noon, so I might have a lot of time to do shots. First off, I had to pass a narrow path that led me to the destination, but before I really reached there, I was caught up by two mating plain cupid on the little stalk. I decided to make a long stop to take their photos, and I was lucky they did not make a significant move, so that I had plenty of time to take shots. This butterfly is recognized as plains cupid (Luthrodes pandava)and includes small butterflies that look like Zizina otis. We commonly find this species in the woods, in the bus,h but sometimes they are busy flying during the daylight -------------- ------ Camera| Nikon D7000 -|-| Category| Insect Photography Lens| Tamron Tele-Macro 70-300

흐름을 보였을 것입니다. 귀금속 관련 ETF의 강세는 **실버, 골드, 팔라듐 채굴 및 정련 기업**들에게도 긍정적인 투자심리를 제공했을 것으로 판단됩니다. **4. 뉴스·매크로 연관 분석** 오늘 시장의 움직임은 뉴스 및 매크로 환경과 긴밀하게 연관되어 있습니다. * **AI 및 반도체 산업의 확고한 성장 기대:** 네이버 뉴스 상위권을 장악한 전력이 소모될 것이라는 예측과 맞물려 AI 전력 인프라 관련 ETF들의 강세를 설명합니다. * **글로벌 금리 인하 기대감:** "금리, 인하 기대감 7월 쏠림" (뉴스6) 등의 기사는 글로벌 유동성 확대를 기대하게 하며 증시 전반에 긍정적인 영향을 미치고 있습니다. 낮은 금리는 성장주 투자 매력을 높이고 자본 시장에 자금이 유입될 가능성을 높입니다. * **중국 경기 회복 조짐:** "중국 소비 회복 조짐" (뉴스10) 기사는 SOL 차이나소비트렌드 ETF의 상승과 직접적으로 연결됩니다. 이는 글로벌 경제의 한 축인 중국 경제의 회복이 가시화될 경우 국내외 기업들의 실적 개선에 긍정적인 영향을 미칠 수 있음을 시사합니다. * **암호화폐 랠리:** "비트코인 6만4000달러 돌파", "6만5000달러 육박" 등의 뉴스는 투자자들의 위험자산 선호 심리가 여전히 강함을 보여줍니다. 암호화폐 시장의 활황은 전반적인 기술 성장주 및 혁신 기술에 대한 투심을 간접적으로 지지할 수 있습니다. **5. 하락 섹터 동향** 오늘 하락세를 보인 ETF 리스트에서는 **미국 기술주 섹터, 특히 AI 소프트웨어 및 데이터센터 관련 부문에서 차익 실현 매물**이 강하게 출회된 것으로 보입니다. * **미국 AI/데이터센터/클라우드/소프트웨어:** **TIGER 미국AI데이터센터TOP4Plus(0142D0)가 -7.9%**로 가장 큰 하락률을 기록했으며, **RISE 미국AI클라우드인프라(0127R0) -5.14%**, **SOL 미국AI소프트웨어(481180) -4.1%** 등 미국 기반의 AI 솔루션 및 클라우드 서비스 관련 ETF들이 일제히 하락했습니다. 이는 국내외 AI 전력 인프라 ETF의 강세와 대비되며, AI 테마 내에서도 **'하드웨어/인프라'와 '소프트웨어/클라우드' 간의 투자금 이동**이 발생했거나, 미국 AI 소프트웨어 기업들의 **높은 밸류에이션에 대한 부담감**이 반영된 것으로 해석됩니다. * **미국 첨단 기술 (드론, 우주항공):** **KODEX 미국드론UAM TOP10(0144M0) -5.19%** 및 **1Q 미국우주항공테크(0131V0) -4.5%** 등 미래 기술 섹터에서도 조정이 나타났습니다. * **증권 섹터:** **TIGER 증권(157500)이 -4.38%**, **KODEX 증권(102970)이 -4.15%** 하락하며 시장 강세에도 불구하고 약세를 보였습니다. 이는 금리 인하 기대감에 따른 증권사들의 순이자마진(NIM) 축소 우려나, 브로커리지 수익성에 대한 단기적 불안감, 혹은 단순히 주도 섹터로의 자금 이동에 따른 차익실현 매물이 출회되었을 가능성을 시사합니다. **6. 투자 시사점 및 주의사항** 오늘 시장 분석을 통해 다음과 같은 투자 시사점과 주의사항을 도출할 수 있습니다. * **AI 테마의 세분화된 접근:** AI는 여전히 강력한 메가트렌드이지만, 투자 전략은 더욱 세분화되어야 합니다. **AI 구현에 필수적인 하드웨어 및 인프라(전력, 반도체 등)**에 대한 관심이 높은 반면, 이미 상당한 상승을 보인 미국 중심의 AI 소프트웨어 및 데이터센터 서비스 분야에서는 **차익실현과 밸류에이션 부담**이 나타나고 있습니다. 향후 AI 산업의 성장에 따라 어떤 부문이 더 큰 수혜를 입을지 면밀히 분석하고, **옥석 가리기**가 필요합니다. * **원자재 시장 변동성 주시:** 은, 금 등 귀금속의 강세는 다양한 거시 경제적 요인에 의해 좌우됩니다. **인플레이션 압력, 지정학적 위험, 글로벌 통화 정책 변화** 등을 종합적으로 고려하여 투자에 임해야 합니다. 선물 ETF는 높은 변동성을 가지므로 투자 시 주의가 필요합니다. * **금리 인하 시나리오 지속 모니터링:** 금리 인하 기대감은 시장에 긍정적인 영향을 미치지만, 실제 인하 시점과 폭은 계속 변동될 수 있습니다. 연준 및 한국은행의 통화정책 스탠스 변화에 대한 **지속적인 모니터링**이 중요합니다. * **증권 섹터의 특별한 약세:** 시장 전반의 강세에도 불구하고 증권 섹터가 하락한 것은 특이점입니다. 단기적인 악재나 우려가 있는지 추가적인 정보 확인이 필요하며, **섣부른 저가 매수는 지양**해야 합니다. * **포트폴리오 분산의 중요성:** 특정 테마에 쏠림 현상이 강한 만큼, **분산 투자 원칙**을 지키는 것이 중요합니다. 급등락하는 섹터에 대한 추격 매수보다는 장기적인 관점에서 성장 가능성이 높은 섹터와 안정적인 자산을 함께 고려하는 전략이 필요합니다. --- Paseando en el auto Hola querido Thediarygame, hoy tenía los exámenes de Iris, lo más aburridor es que ella es hambrienta y los exámenes se hacen en ayunas. Por eso cambiamos la rutina para adaptarnos y que Iris se estresara lo menos posible. Por eso me levanté a las siete de la mañana y la mandé a dormir un rato más con los abuelos, cómo lo hago cada fin de semana. Mientras ella dormía yo me duché y me alisté, antes de las ocho estaba lista para salir, ahora solo necesitaba que Iris bajara. A mí perrita le encanta dormir con mis papás y si te estás preguntando por qué no duerme con ellos, es porque dicen que es incómodo y es verdad. Yo que duermo con ella siempre, les aseguro que dormir con ella es darle más de media cama y a uno solo le queda la punta de la cama, dónde no se puede girar ni nada. Podría correrla para acomodarme mejor, pero, uno no quiere incomodarlos ja, ja, por eso duerme conmigo, ella se adueña del lugar. La idea era que mi mamá me acompañará, pero no la sentí y es que ella a veces tiene problemas para dormir y cuando logra descansar pasa de largo y no se da cuenta de nada. Iris bajó y como nadie dije nada, salí, pero por supuesto que no pude tomar la muestra de orina, es que no es fácil porque las perritas se agachan y esto complica el proceso. En Veterinaria Sana Sana Llegué 5 minutos antes de las ocho de la mañana, sé que abren a las ocho por lo que me quedé ahí parada esperando. Lo único malo es que Iris se estreso, ella odia la veterinaria, no la culpo, yo odio ir al médico y eso que soy un ser pensante. A las 8 abrió la puerta el veterinario Alejandro, él es quien hace los turnos nocturnos, a las 8 de la mañana abre, espera al veterinario y se marcha. Entre a la veterinaria y me senté a esperar, al rato llegó el secretario que es muy amable y me dijo que debíamos esperar a que llegara la doctora Greis. Ella llegó a las 8:15 de la mañana, a esta chica la conozco hace muchos años, de cuando ayudaba a animales en condición vulnerable, yo la conocí cuando estaba terminando la carrera de veterinaria y ahora nos encontramos de nuevo. Me dió alegría saludarla, Iris fue amable con ella, la saludó y a los pocos minutos pasamos para que le tomara los exámenes de sangre. Mi pequeña perrita es muy juiciosa, se pone muy nerviosa pero deja que le saquen la sangre sin problema, la doctora no demoró nada y en 10 minutos ya estábamos saliendo del consultorio y regresando a casa. En Tiendas Jumbo Desayunamos, mi mami nos tenía huevo cocinado a las dos, un premio para una pequeña tan juiciosa. Luego salimos en el auto, ayer había hecho una compra en tiendas Jumbo, es que sacan productos a muy bien precio y como vivimos cerca, vamos hasta allá y así no se paga domicilio, que por cierto, es bastante costoso. Nuestra compra era mayor a 50.000 pesos colombianos y por eso teníamos derecho a usar el parqueadero por 2 horas. Yo entré, reclamé las cosas, hoy se demoraron, no estaban los chicos que hacen las entregas y cuando llegaron, debían traer lo que se compró que necesitaba refrigeración. En conclusión, tardé más reclamando este pedido que lo que tarde en la sacada de sangre de Iris. Luego paseamos un rato por Unicentro, eran las 10 de la mañana y la mayoría de locales estaban abiertos, fuimos al cajero y también compramos algunos croissants para mañana el desayuno. Antes de las doce salimos, no queríamos que nos cobrarán el parqueadero y como habían unas vías cerradas, paseamos más en el carro con Iris. Mi perrita ama el auto, es gasolinera, cuando el auto va andando va en la ventana y si hay trancón, se duerme en mis piernas hasta que el carro arranca de nuevo. Casi a la una estábamos en casa almorzando y subimos a descansar, porque en la tarde saldríamos a dar una vuelta como siempre. Paseando en Unicentro Fue un buen sábado, aun no me entregan los resultados de Iris, quizás lo envíen el lunes, no hay afán, son exámenes de rutina, no porque este enferma y sé que saldrán bien porque es una chica muy sana. Evaluating Technical Competence Behind Cost-Efficiency in Sensor Selection Procuring industrial instrumentation involves more than simply comparing price tags on a spreadsheet. True cost-effectiveness emerges from the intersection of initial purchase price, operational longevity, and maintenance requirements. When seeking a high-performance GPT200 pressure sensor , vetting the technical competence of potential suppliers establishes the foundation for a successful partnership. Manufacturers who invest heavily in their research and development capabilities often provide superior value, even if the upfront cost appears marginally higher than bottom-tier competitors. The hidden costs of replacing failed units, halting production lines for unscheduled maintenance, and dealing with inaccurate data far outweigh the savings gained from selecting the cheapest option available. Engineers and procurement managers must scrutinize the technological underpinnings of the sensor itself. The GPT200 pressure sensor relies on advanced piezoresistive technology, known for its high stability and reliability. A supplier capable of explaining the intricacies of their MEMS (Micro-Electro-Mechanical Systems) integration demonstrates a level of expertise necessary for industrial-grade applications. This technical understanding suggests the supplier can troubleshoot complex installation scenarios and offer advice on optimal range selection. Assessing a vendor involves looking at their quality control metrics, material sourcing for the diaphragm, and signal conditioning circuitry. These elements dictate whether a sensor will drift over time or maintain its accuracy throughout its lifecycle. Supply chain transparency plays a pivotal role in establishing trust. Manufacturers who openly discuss their sourcing of raw materials, such as the 316L stainless steel used in housing, typically maintain better consistency across batches. Variations in steel quality can lead to premature corrosion in harsh environments, rendering the sensor useless. Asking potential suppliers about their material verification processes yields insight into their commitment to quality. A cost-effective solution is one that fits the environment perfectly, resisting chemical attacks and physical shocks without requiring frequent replacements. The dialogue with a supplier should center on these engineering values rather than just logistics. Integration capabilities define the modern industrial landscape. A sensor acts as the sensory organ of a larger automation system. Suppliers offering the GPT200 pressure sensor must understand how their device interacts with PLCs (Programmable Logic Controllers), SCADA systems, and IoT gateways. Compatibility checking prevents costly integration errors. Knowledgeable suppliers provide detailed data sheets, CAD models, and integration support, reducing the engineering hours required to commission the device. This reduction in labor cost contributes significantly to the overall financial feasibility of the project. Selecting a vendor who acts as a technical consultant adds tangible value beyond the hardware itself. Scrutinizing Calibration and Stability Metrics Calibration procedures dictate the trustworthiness of every measurement taken on the factory floor. High-quality GPT200 pressure sensor units undergo rigorous thermal compensation and aging tests before leaving the factory. This process ensures that the output signal remains linear and accurate despite fluctuations in ambient temperature. Suppliers skimping on this phase might offer lower prices, but their sensors often exhibit significant thermal drift. Ever scrolled through Instagram and thought, "Wait, is *this* the look now?" Or perhaps you've gazed upon an ancient statue and wondered if your gym routine is just, well, a little behind the times? If so, you're not alone! It turns out, what we consider the "ideal male physique" has done a complete U-turn, and frankly, it's making our biceps (or lack thereof) feel a bit out of sync. Think about it. Go back a few millennia, or even just a few centuries. What did "peak male" look like? We're talking chiseled gods, Roman gladiators, and those Greek statues with muscles that looked like they could bench-press a small car. Broad shoulders, powerful chests, arms that could chop wood all day – basically, if you looked like you could single-handedly win a wrestling match with a bear, you were pretty much the hot ticket. It was all about strength, power, and looking like you could protect a village from invading barbarians (or at least carry a lot of groceries). *Imagine this guy's gym routine!* Fast forward to today. What graces the covers of high-fashion magazines? What are the biggest pop stars rocking on stage, sending millions of fans into a frenzy? Often, it's a much leaner, almost ethereal look. We're talking slender frames, sharp jawlines, and a general vibe that suggests they might float away if a strong breeze comes along. Think K-pop idols, runway models, or pretty much anyone who can wear an impeccably tailored suit and make it look like art. The "bear wrestler" look? Not so much the vibe right now in many mainstream aesthetics. So, what gives? Why did we go from "Hulk smash!" to "Can I borrow your skinny jeans?" It's a fun thought experiment! Maybe it's fashion. Clothes often drape beautifully on a leaner silhouette, allowing designers to play with lines and structure without fighting against bulging muscles. Or perhaps it's a reflection of societal shifts – a move away from hyper-masculine stereotypes towards a more fluid, aesthetically driven expression of self. Maybe it's even got something to do with convenience; a lean physique might be perceived as easier to maintain than the Herculean effort required to look like you're perpetually training for the Olympics. Whatever the reason, this fascinating flip means that men, just like women, are constantly navigating a changing landscape of body ideals. One minute it's all about bulk, the next it's about being able to fit into a sample size. Ultimately, while it's fun to observe these historical trends, the real "ideal" body is the one that's healthy, happy, and makes *you* feel good. Because let's be real, trying to keep up with what's "in" is a full-time job – and our abs have enough to think about already! --- Inspired by:

半年之前就发现孩子脸上的痣越长越多，随便数一数就有六七个小痣，脖子上还有两个稍微大一点的。 我早就说要带他用激光点掉，一直因为上学没有时间。 这次趁寒假，天气温度比较低，也比较适合点痣，所以今天初五就带娃去武汉一家医院把痣点掉了。 我自己以前也点过痣，不过那都是20多年前的事情了，感觉也没用多久就点完了。 结果随便一问价格，一颗痣100块，我的天老爷！不是按痣的大小和部位收费，是按颗数算。网上搜了一下其他医院，差不多也是这个价格。 本来想去泰康同济医院，去年还是25元一颗，结果今年也涨价到六七十块了。 算了，既然已经到了选好的这家医院，就100就100吧，反正他还有商业保险，看看能不能报一半费用。 点之前孩子心里特别不安，非常怕疼，还问会不会激光没弄好，把脸上烧个洞。我安慰他说不会的，妈妈以前点过，一下就好，他还是将信将疑。 本来我们没要麻药，结果点痣前医生硬是让敷麻药，要敷半小时以上。好在点痣过程很顺利，一会就点完了，一颗痣也就五六秒、七八秒，因为孩子脸上的痣都比较小。 早早点掉，也是怕痣随着年龄和容貌越长越大，影响美观，所以就趁早处理了。因为痣小，恢复应该也快。 弄好之后，医生嘱咐这两天不要见水，前两三天每天擦红霉素眼膏，后面几天擦点生长因子凝胶就行。6个痣600。看看回去商业医保能报销多少。

If you’ve ever wandered through a meadow and spotted a spike of pink, white, or lavender blossoms that seem to stare back at you, there’s a good chance you were looking at Physostegia—commonly called the obedient plant. This modest yet striking perennial has been quietly stealing the spotlight in garden beds across North America, and for good reason. With its dramatic flower spikes, low‑maintenance habits, and surprising versatility, Physostegia is the perfect candidate for anyone who wants a splash of color without the hassle of high‑maintenance horticulture. What Makes Physostegia Unique? The name “obedient plant” comes from a playful garden trick: each individual flower can be gently nudged to one side, and it will stay put—a handy reminder that the plant is as forgiving as it is charming. Botanically, Physandria belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae), sharing a distant kinship with lavender and rosemary. Its upright stems can reach 3–5 feet, topped with dense racemes of tubular flowers that bloom from midsummer through early fall. The most common cultivar, Physostegia virginiana ‘Marge’, showcases a soft pink hue, but cultivars such as ‘Alba’ (pure white) and ‘Margarita’ (lavender‑purple) add a broader palette to the mix. Garden Placement & Companion Planting Because Physostegia thrives in full sun to part shade, it works beautifully at the back of perennial borders, along fence lines, or even in a meadow‑style planting where it can sway in the breeze. Its modest foliage—large, medium‑green, and slightly aromatic—provides a neutral backdrop, allowing the flower spikes to become the focal point. Pair the obedient plant with: Salvia ‘Blue Spruce’ – contrasting spike heights and complementary blues. Coneflower (Echinacea) – similar bloom time, making a dynamic summer display. Hostas – for a texture contrast in shaded corners. The vertical habit of Physostegia also makes it an excellent cut flower. A few stems in a vase will bring garden freshness indoors for weeks. Care Tips for a Healthy Display Soil: Well‑drained, loamy soil with a pH of 6.0–7.5. Though adaptable, the plant loves a modest amount of organic matter. Water: Establish roots with regular watering during the first two months; thereafter, moderate moisture suffices. Over‑watering can invite root rot. Mulch: A 2‑inch layer of shredded bark helps retain moisture and suppress weeds. Pruning: Cut back stems by one-third after the first flush of blooms. This encourages a second blooming cycle and prevents the plant from becoming leggy. Division: Every 3–4 years, dig up the clump in early spring, separate the crowns, and re‑plant. This rejuvenates vigor and controls spread. Symbolism & Edible Curiosity In the language of flowers, Physostegia represents obedience, fidelity, and devotion, making it a thoughtful addition to wedding bouquets or anniversary gardens. While the plant isn’t widely used in culinary contexts, its leaves emit a faint minty scent—an aromatic curiosity for experimental herb enthusiasts. The Bottom Line Whether you’re a seasoned horticulturist looking to fill a vertical niche or a beginner seeking a low‑maintenance burst of color, Physostegia delivers on both beauty and practicality. Its graceful spikes, adaptable growing conditions, and the whimsical “obedient” trait make it a conversation starter in any garden. Plant a few stems this spring, and watch as your landscape transforms into a living, breathing palette of pinks, whites, and purples—one obedient bloom at a time. ***

Perfection is a desired state for anyone, but is it a necessity From my own personal behavior I feel sometimes I waste too much energy on being perfect, which may not be necessary. A little flaw here and there is ok. Social media keeps bombarding us with images of perfection and these days you do not even know what is AI generated and what is real and when we look at it, it makes us feel like we are not good enough. When we see perfect images on social media it makes us feel inferior. A person on social media with a perfect figure, a perfect house, sometimes their families may also look perfect to us. But behind the scenes what's happening we never know. Last month while I was in India, at a social gathering I met one lady, she has been into extreme fitness regime since the last 2 years and her body looks perfect, and at that time I had a little belly coming out. She passed a comment on me saying, oh look you are having a bloated belly. At first I felt very bad and felt very conscious also. It's not that I am not in to fitness, but right now I am going through my menopause phase and no matter how much ever I am trying little belly is still there. For few days I kept worrying about it, but then I thought. Why am I getting so paranoid about it. That girl is in her 30s and I am in my 50s we both have different environments and conditions. In my 30s I was also that way, so it's ok for me to accept my current environment and myself in whatever I am. I am not unhealthy, nor am I overweight, so why am I stressing out myself so much. This was just on one front of life. As such there are so many other things in life where perfection is not important. Perfection can also be boring sometimes. As humans we are vulnerable and have our own weaknesses. We learn and grow. No one knows everything from birth, we keep pushing ourselves to keep opening to new experiences and learning and learning never stops. The moment we start believing that we are perfect then possibly the learning will also stop. In work or in self or in general life, the most successful people have also failed but they did not let their imperfection define them. Their failure was used as a stepping stone to grow, learn and become who they are. So it's ok to be out of shape, messy, and a little quirky. Most important is to be yourself. With all of that again it is not like perfection is never required. There are somethings in which perfection is important and one must not let that pass. ***Thank you for visiting my blog.*** 👼🏻👼🏻💖💖🌹🌺🌸 *** "Unlimited Abundance, Blissful Happiness and Unconditional Love"***

If you’ve ever walked through a garden where spikes of sapphire, violet, and pure white seem to reach for the sky, you’ve probably encountered a delphinium. Known affectionately as “larkspur” in some circles, delphiniums are the true show‑stoppers of the summer landscape—dramatic, tall, and undeniably regal. In this post we’ll explore why these plants have earned their lofty reputation, how to grow them successfully, and a few design tricks to let their beauty shine. A Brief Botanical History Delphinium belongs to the Ranunculaceae (buttercup) family and boasts over 300 species native to the temperate zones of Europe, Asia, and North America. The name “delphinium” derives from the Greek delphus, meaning “dolphin,” a nod to the flower’s curved, dolphin‑shaped spur. Historically, the genus was prized by Victorian gardeners for its dramatic verticality, and it even found a place in classic literature, symbolizing both pride and fleeting beauty. What Makes Delphinium So Captivating? Sky‑High Stature – Most cultivars reach 4 to 6 feet, with some hybrid varieties stretching up to 8 feet. Their towering stems create an instant focal point in any planting scheme. Color Spectrum – From deep indigo and royal purple to soft pastel pink, buttery yellow, and pristine white, the color range is astonishing. Many varieties also feature bi‑color blooms, where the upper petal is a contrasting hue to the lower sepals. Textural Drama – The dense spikes, sometimes bearing upwards of 100 individual flowers, give a lush, feathery texture that works beautifully alongside both formal hedges and informal cottage gardens. Growing Delphinium: The Essentials Requirement |Tips for Success -|- Soil |Well‑draining, fertile soil with a pH of 6.5‑7.5. Amend heavy clay with compost or coarse sand. Sunlight |Full sun (at least 6 hours) for vibrant color; light afternoon shade in hotter climates. Water |Keep soil consistently moist, especially during the first month after planting. Avoid water‑logging. Support |Sturdy stakes or a trellis are a must for taller varieties; wind can easily topple a 6‑foot stem. Feeding |Apply a balanced, slow‑release fertilizer at planting, then side‑dress with a high‑phosphorus “bloom booster” every 4‑6 weeks. Because delphiniums have relatively shallow root systems, mulching helps retain moisture and suppress weeds. In regions with harsh winters, consider digging up the tuberous roots and storing them in a cool, dry place to re‑plant in spring. Design Ideas to Make Delphiniums Shine Back‑of‑the‑Border Hero – Plant a row along the far edge of a flower bed; their height creates a natural “wall” that draws the eye deeper into the garden. Mixed‑Border Contrast – Pair delphiniums with lower‑growing perennials such as lavender, alyssum, or ornamental grasses for layered texture. Cut‑Flower Elegance – Harvest stems in the morning; they make stunning arrangements, especially when mixed with roses, peonies, and sprigs of greenery. Color Cascades – Plant a gradient of colors (e.g., white → light pink → deep purple) to mimic a sunrise or sunset effect across the bed. Final Thought Delphinium isn’t just a flower; it’s an architectural element that brings drama, color, and a touch of aristocratic charm to any garden. With a little patience and proper care, you can enjoy a summer display that feels both timeless and exhilarating. So, next time you’re planning a planting scheme, consider inviting the “dolphin‑spurred” queen of the garden to rule your borders—your eyes (and your guests) will thank you. ***

Привіт друзі. Сьогодні я хочу поділитися досить дивним сном. З метою, щоб хтось хто знається на «символізмі» залишив свою авторитетну думку під ним😅🤣 Але, перед тим як розповідати про сон розповім в яких умовах я сьогодні заснув. Це було досить комічно. Я розстелив двоспальне одіяло на полу в залі, ліг на одну частину і цим же ж одіялом вкрився, очікуючи того моменту поки доня таки ляже спатки а я зможу перебратися до спальні. Чи то втома за тиждень, чи просто зміна погодніх умов, подіяли таким чином що тверда рівна поверхня підлоги для мене була найм'якішою пириною, яка дала досить глибокий і гарний сон. Якщо перефразувати на більш зрозумілу, практичну мову – «поки дружина укладала доньку, я тупо задрих і проснувся вже майже під ранок без будильника». А наснилось мені цікава послідовність подій, які починаються в якійсь лавці, по типу магазина, невеликого, де є тьотя, яка торгує всім і ти приходиш до неї кажеш що тобі потрібно. Щось ми у неї вибирали рибу. Прийшов я разом з дружиною, але дружини видно не було. (Стосовно риби, це можливо якась така відголоска з вечора, бо вечером я також їв смачну селедочку і просив тьотю піти і дати мені ту сільодку). (картинка ніфіга не схожа на те, що я бачив у сні та для посту сгодиться). Далі мене перекидає в якийсь незрозумілий мені вимір. Я опиняюсь біля білого будинку із 18-19 століть з квадратною білою вежею. Щось схоже я бачив у Шарівському замку, коли відвідував Харків, але він був не білим а тут прямо білий-білий. Перебуваючи уже поряд з цим будинком я починаю бачити, досить дивну картину як можна сказати на потолку, на круглому виступі (типу навісного потолка) схожому на циферблат починають змінюватись тварини що там знаходяться. Я не запам'ятав усіх тварин, як і не запам'ятав їхнє розташування але чітко пам'ятаю одну із них, яка в мене асоціюється із Мантікорою («Герої меча та магії» не пройшли даремно) Це лев із крилами та довгим хвостом (без натяка на жало скорпіона, просто догий, дуже довгий хвіст), який якщо мені не зраджує пам'ять і не увімкнулись фантазії виліз зверху змія. Стоп, точніше, ось ця картина, коли мантікора вилізла зверху змія, була трохи раніше ніж з'явився циферблат у вигляді з тваринами. Спочатку матікора залізла на змія, а потім вже з’явився «циферблат» (картинка ніфіга не схожа на те, що я бачив у сні та для посту сгодиться). Стосовно циферблату, мені здалось саме так тому що всі тварини були розташовані майже як години в звичайному циферблаті, але коли почав рух то вони почали змінюватися хаотично один по відношенні до одного. Ніби перемішуючись ж між собою. Із усієї кількості тварин мені чому запам'яталось тільки мантікора і більше ніхто. Тварини також були білі-білі ніби з глини. (тоже ніфіга не схоже) І ще, напевно дуже важливо сказати що продивляючись цей сон я чітко розумів що це сон і насолоджувався цим переживаючи досить специфічне відчуття, яке в мене було тільки один раз в житті, коли я вважаю переживав своєрідний трансцедентний досвід. Ще згадав, що сон з цим цеферблатом з тварин снився і раніше, але тоді не було такого унікального емоційного наповнення. Ось такий от дивний сон виникає, якщо заснути на полу в залі. Не раджу повторювати, але ну якось так. Цікаво до чого може наснитись міфологічна тварина якої теоретично не існує? Дякую за увагу. Всім гарного дня. Ви найкращі! **Також мене можна знайти в:** | | | |-|-| | | | | | | | | |

Sometimes I sit and think about how strange the internet has become. We spend hours creating content — writing, editing, thinking, sharing — and in return we get… likes. Maybe a few comments. That’s it. The platform grows. The company earns. But the creator? Mostly invisible. That’s why Steemit feels different. It’s not just another blogging website. It’s a place where your words actually carry value. Real value. Not imaginary points. Not empty hearts. But cryptocurrency that sits in your wallet. That small difference changes your whole mindset as a writer. When I first understood how Steemit connects content with crypto, it honestly surprised me. Every upvote is not just someone saying “nice post.” It’s support backed by blockchain. It’s someone deciding that your effort deserves reward. That feels more meaningful than random engagement on traditional social media. Crypto itself is about independence. No central authority. No borders. Just people connected through technology. When you mix that idea with content creation, something powerful happens. You’re no longer just posting for attention. You’re building digital assets with your thoughts. But let’s be real — Steemit is not magic money. It doesn’t reward laziness. It rewards consistency. It rewards authenticity. It rewards people who actually care about what they write. And that’s what makes it interesting. On Steemit, your growth depends on community. You interact, you support others, you build relationships. Over time, your presence becomes stronger. It feels less like a competition and more like an ecosystem where everyone has a role. The connection between Steemit and crypto also teaches patience. Markets move up and down. Token values change. Some days feel exciting. Some days feel slow. But if you stay consistent, you start to see progress — not just financially, but creatively. There’s something motivating about knowing that your ideas can turn into digital value. It pushes you to think deeper. To write better. To research more. To show up regularly. Now let me ask you something honestly. Do you think platforms like Steemit are the future of content creation? Be real. 👍 Upvote for YES 👎 Downvote for NO Your vote isn’t just a reaction. It’s your opinion recorded on the blockchain. Maybe this is just the beginning. Maybe in a few years, more platforms will follow this model. Or maybe only true believers in decentralized systems will stay. Either way, one thing is clear — when crypto meets creativity, the internet feels a little more fair. And that’s worth talking about.

**Imagen propia, editada con Gemini.** Este es un tema bastante complejo de tocar pero me encanta la idea, de manera que me gustaría invitar a @helengutier2 y a @zhanavic69, a considerar esta dinámica, para lo cual, dejo el enlace de participación: . Y para comenzar a entrar en materia, me gustaría decir que también escuché sobre esa noticia en Brasil que estremeció al mundo. Un hombre, al descubrir la infidelidad de su esposa, tomó una decisión atroz que terminó con la vida de sus hijos y la suya. No quiero entrar en detalles pero si quiero decir que basta saber que fue un acto nacido del dolor mal gestionado y de una mente claramente fracturada. Nada más. Nada menos. Lo que sí me impactó, además del hecho en sí, fue leer comentarios justificándolo. Personas diciendo que “ella lo llevó a eso”, que “ahora que asuma las consecuencias”, incluso burlas crueles sobre su nueva libertad. Y me pregunté, con sinceridad: **¿qué tipo de salud mental hay detrás de esas palabras?** He vivido la infidelidad. No es teoría para mí ni tampoco la escuché en cuentos de camino. Es una herida que me dejó marcas profundas, tanto que, hasta hoy, si en una película aparece una mujer siendo infiel, prefiero apagar el televisor. No porque odie, sino porque duele. Y aun así, jamás he pensado que el dolor me dé derecho a destruir. En mi opinión, la infidelidad no es un problema de género, sino un problema de conciencia. Permítanme explicarme mejor: Durante años se normalizó la infidelidad masculina como “cosa de hombres”, mientras la femenina se condena con furia desproporcionada. Esa doble moral revela heridas culturales que aún no hemos sanado. Ahora, si en algo tenemos que estar de acuerdo es en esto: dentro del seno familiar, los mismos padres son los encargados de sembrar esta vaina. Fíjate bien... a los niños se les pregunta (hablando de su pequeño pene) ¿Y para quién es esto? Y la respuesta que ellos mismos le enseñan a repetir es: ¡Para las mujeres! Y me pregunto... ¿Acaso hacen lo mismo con las niñas? Entonces, aunque es una cultura heredada, sigue siendo sembrada dentro del núcleo familiar. A pesar de esto, y gracias al movimiento progresista, han querido normalizar lo indefendible, haciendo que algunas mujeres asuman la misma actitud perversa de los hombres de ser infiel, degradando los valores que nos diferencian de las bestias. Algo debe quedar claro: **la violencia nunca es consecuencia de la infidelidad**. Es consecuencia de una mente incapaz de gestionar el abandono, el ego herido y la frustración. El dolor explica muchas cosas, pero no justifica. Desde lo psicológico necesitamos aprender a regular emociones. Desde lo espiritual, recordar que nadie nos pertenece. Cuando el amor se rompe, la verdadera fuerza no está en vengarse, sino en saber retirarse con dignidad, siempre y cuando, ya sea una desición tomada por una o ambas partes y definitivamente ya no hay remedio. No necesitamos justificar monstruos para sostener nuestras heridas.
