#### Dalla Norvegia al Salento. E' questo il percorso compiuto negli ultimi tre giorni dall'**Inter** per disputare i propri impegni in competizioni quali **Champions League** e campionato. Oltre 4000 chilometri e due location completamente diverse, sotto il punto di vista geografico, ambientale, paesaggistico e sportivo. Eppure, Bodo e Lecce hanno mostrato agli appasisonati di calcio di tutto il mondo un'incredibile caratteristica comune: l'insofferenza per la presenza in campo di **Alessandro Bastoni**, il difensore dell'**Inter** reo di aver simulato in maniera plateale durante il match svolto a San Siro tra la sua squadra e la **Juventus**. Dal nord del Circolo Polare Artico al sud dell'Italia, i tifosi sembrano concordare su un aspetto fondamentale: nel calcio non ci deve essere spazio per gente come **Bastoni**. Fischi assordanti hanno accolto ogni giocata del difensore nerazzurro e lo scenario si ripresenterà verosimilmente in tutti gli stadi in cui andrà a dar calci ad un pallone. Alcuni rumors vogliono che, per il derby della ventottesima giornata, i tifosi del **Milan** stiano organizzando una grande coreografia con tema principale propio il sentimento antisportivo incarnato nel gesto di **Bastoni** e più in generale nei colori dell'**Inter**. Insomma, negli stadi italiani e tra le varie tifoserie sta montando un "sentimento popolare" di sdegno e rifiuto, rivolto principalmente nei confronti del difensore nerazzurro, ma in secondo luogo anche alla maglia che rappresenta. Una sorta di riedizione di quanto accaduto con Calciopoli, ma con una differenza profonda: questa volta il tutto non è stato fomentato dalla stampa e da narrazioni di parte, ma è nato spontaneamente sull'onda di fatti acclarati ed incontrovertibili. Ma tranquilli, sebbene se ne intravedano alcune analogie (e a mio modesto avviso ce ne sarebbero mille giustificati motivi) una nuova calciopoli non sembra affatto alle porte. Questa volta il potere istituzionale è tutto schierato con i "nemici" del popolo calcistico, così come l'informazione. Avete sentito come lo studio di **Dazn** (video precedente) ha fatto indecorosamente finta di cascare dal pero di fronte ai fischi del **Via del Mare**? Prima la vulgata generale era che la **Juventus** rubava e che il popolo e le testate coraggiose avevano contribuito a far saltare alla luce il malaffare del sistema Moggi, ora la questione è sostanzialmente diversa: tutti si sono accorti da che parte tira il vento, ma chi amministra la baracca, grazie anche all'appoggio/ricatto della malavita organizzata, non è minimamente interessato al cambiamento. E quindi che ne sarà del "povero" **Bastoni**? Possibile che la gente non si sia accorta del pentimento e non abbia nemmeno accettato le scuse rivolte in mondovisione? Beh, innanzitutto è difficile accettare le scuse di chi, in realtà, non si è mai scusato di un gesto ignobile nei confronti di un collega, ma ha solo espresso un vago sentimento di dispiacere. In secondo luogo, ancora più difficile è credere alla buona fede di chi, tra gomitate non viste e tuffi, invece che cercare di ripulirsi l'immagine aggiunge alla sua fedina penale sportiva un ulteriore gesto di antisportività: all'88° minuto della gara con il **Lecce** infatti, proprio **Bastoni** si è procurato un cartellino giallo in maniera del tutto volontaria, onde essere squalificato (era in diffida) nel prossimo match e non rischiare l'assenza nel derby della settimana dopo. Ancora una volta tutti hanno visto, ma nessuno ci può fare nulla. #### ## I'm part of ITALYGAME Team **together with: @girolamomarotta, @sardrt, @mikitaly, @mad-runner, @famigliacurione** 👉 VOTA PER NOI COME WITNESS👈 .jpg)

Que te viene a la memoria cuando ves una hermosa flor de cayena? Cuando salgo a caminar hay una vecina que tiene el borde de su casa con plantas de flor de cayena, yo cada vez que paso recuerdo a mi mamá mandándome a buscar flores de cayena para con sus pétalos preparar una infusión. En casa la tomamos por su efecto relajante ayuda con el insomnio y para calmar los nervios, mi abuela la usaba para el cabello según ella es un tónico capilar, les cuento que yo siempre las había visto rojas resulta que las hay en varios colores, pero la roja resalta con sus pétalos y su largo estambre, también las hay de doble pétalo esas son más lindas todavía. También recuerdo que en una oportunidad en estudios de la naturaleza nos pidieron llevar flores de cayena para estudiar sus pétalos y su pistilo, por aquí por mi casa hay varias casas que cultivan está planta, es pura resistencia las flores de cayena las puedes conseguir en cualquier estación del año son las regalos predilectos de los niños para su mamá,maestra o tías. Bitcoin has always been known for its volatility, but from 2020 to 2026, the market experienced one of the most dramatic and transformative periods in crypto history. Let’s take a look at how Bitcoin moved through these years and shaped the digital asset landscape. 🚀 2020 – The Beginning of a Massive Bull Run In early 2020, Bitcoin was trading around $7,000–$10,000. When the COVID-19 pandemic hit global markets, BTC briefly dropped below $5,000 in March 2020. However, massive monetary stimulus from central banks, especially the Federal Reserve, triggered strong interest in alternative assets. By the end of 2020, Bitcoin surged past $20,000, breaking its previous all-time high from 2017. 🔥 2021 – Parabolic Rally and New All-Time High 2021 became one of the most explosive years for Bitcoin. April 2021: BTC reached around $64,000 November 2021: BTC peaked near $69,000 Institutional adoption increased significantly, with companies like Tesla announcing Bitcoin purchases. Retail investors flooded the market, and crypto became mainstream. But as always, what goes up fast can come down fast. ❄️ 2022 – The Bear Market Strikes 2022 was brutal. Rising interest rates, inflation concerns, and major crypto collapses pushed Bitcoin into a deep bear market. BTC fell below $20,000 and even touched the $15,000–$16,000 range. Confidence dropped, leverage was wiped out, and many weak projects disappeared. However, long-term holders continued accumulating. 🌱 2023 – Recovery and Stabilization In 2023, Bitcoin began to recover gradually. Market sentiment improved as inflation cooled and expectations of monetary policy shifts emerged. BTC climbed back above $30,000 during the year, rebuilding investor confidence. Institutional infrastructure continued improving, and anticipation for future halving events increased. ⚡ 2024 – Halving Momentum 2024 was a key year because of the Bitcoin halving event. Historically, halvings reduce supply issuance and often trigger bullish cycles. Speculation increased, volatility returned, and Bitcoin pushed toward new highs again as supply tightened and demand strengthened. 🌊 2025 – Post-Halving Expansion Following historical patterns, 2025 saw strong upward momentum. New investors entered the market, ETFs gained more traction, and global adoption expanded. Bitcoin experienced sharp rallies and corrections, showing once again that volatility remains part of its DNA. 🔮 2026 – Consolidation or New Breakout? In 2026, Bitcoin continues to move within a dynamic cycle. After strong previous years, the market shows phases of correction and consolidation. Some analysts expect: A mid-cycle correction A new all-time high Or a longer consolidation phase What remains clear is that Bitcoin continues to mature as a global digital asset.

"手腕无力"通常不是一种永久性的状况，而是一种或多种潜在因素的症状。 就像身体的其他部位一样，手腕的力量和韧性取决于你如何使用它们、是否受过伤以及你的整体健康状况。以下是导致一些人手腕无力的主要原因： ### 1. 缺乏使用和针对性训练（最常见的原因） 对大多数人来说，这是最大的因素。控制你手腕的前臂有许多肌肉，它们遵循着"用进废退"的原则。 - **久坐不动的生活方式：** 如果你的日常生活不涉及挑战握力和手腕稳定性的活动——比如提沉重的杂货、攀爬、园艺或运动——这些肌肉将保持在未充分发育的基础水平。 - **缺乏针对性锻炼：** 标准的 cardio 或练腿日对增强手腕力量作用甚微。如果没有针对性的练习（如硬拉、引体向上、农夫行走或腕弯举），前臂力量就不会得到显著发展。 ### 2. 过往或当前的损伤 手腕是一个复杂的关节，包含许多小骨头、韧带和肌腱。损伤可能产生持久的影响。 - **韧带损伤：** 手腕韧带的扭伤或撕裂可能导致慢性不稳定。关节可能会感觉松垮或"无力"，因为本应负责稳定关节的被动结构（韧带）已无法有效发挥作用。 - **肌腱炎 / 肌腱病：** 肌腱的炎症或刺激（例如，由重复性劳损引起的，如德奎尔万氏病）会使抓握和活动手腕时感到疼痛。大脑会将这种疼痛视为停止使用相关肌肉的信号，从而导致无力感。 - **骨折：** 手腕骨折后，如果愈合时出现轻微畸形，或者关节在固定期间变得僵硬，可能会永久性地改变手腕的生物力学机制和力量。 ### 3. 潜在的健康状况 一些健康问题可能直接导致手部和手腕无力。 - **神经压迫：** - **腕管综合征：** 这是一个典型原因。手腕处正中神经受压迫会导致麻木、刺痛，并最终导致手部无力，尤其是握力和拇指力量。 - **肘管综合征：** 肘部尺神经受压迫可导致手部以及无名指和小指无力。 - **关节炎：** - **骨关节炎：** "磨损性"关节炎会影响手腕，导致疼痛、僵硬和力量丧失。 - **类风湿关节炎：** 这种自身免疫性疾病常侵袭手部小关节，引起炎症、关节损伤和明显的无力。 - **全身性疾病：** 像糖尿病或甲状腺疾病等病症有时会导致周围神经病变（神经损伤）或肌肉萎缩，这可能表现为四肢无力。 ### 4. 现代生活的人体工程学问题 我们的日常习惯可能使手腕长期处于慢性无力或易受损的姿势。 - **不良姿势：** 当你坐在电脑前时，如果键盘太高或椅子太低，你可能需要向后弯曲手腕才能打字。这种持续的、轻微的后伸会给肌腱带来压力，长期下来会导致不适和无力。 - **重复性劳损：** 每天数小时重复相同的动作（例如，打字、使用鼠标、滑动手机、流水线工作）而不休息，可能导致过度使用性损伤。这不会增强力量，反而会引起炎症，从而让人*感觉*无力。 - **握持尺寸很重要：** 使用尺寸过大的工具或重量，会使你的力学处于劣势。仅仅为了握住它们，你就需要更用力地抓握，这会迅速使前臂肌肉疲劳，并让它们感到无力。 ### 5. 全身性肌肉无力 有时，手腕无力只是一个更大问题的一部分。 - **肌肉减少症：** 这是与年龄相关的、自然的肌肉质量流失。随着年龄增长，全身力量都会下降，手部和前臂也不例外。 - **整体体能下降：** 经过一段时间的疾病或不活动（例如，手术后），包括手腕在内的全身都会变得虚弱。这是肌肉质量和心肺健康的普遍下降。 简而言之，**"手腕无力"几乎总是一种后天获得的特质，而不是与生俱来的。** 它是不活动、损伤、不良的人体工程学设计或潜在健康问题等因素共同作用的结果。好消息是，对大多数人来说，通过有针对性的力量训练、改善人体工程学设计以及对任何潜在疾病进行适当的医疗处理，这种无力感是可以改善的。

It doesn’t happen often that I can spend a full weekend in Slovakia. But this time I was lucky. I got a delivery to Rumanová. Technically I could have left home on Sunday evening, but I really dislike driving at night. I do everything I can to avoid night shifts. So I left already on Saturday morning. And that gave me the entire Sunday to explore something new. I started searching on the map for a quiet spot near my unloading point. I found a peaceful parking area not far from the highway and what’s more, it was close to a small train station. Perfect! So on Sunday morning I jumped on a train and went to Trenčín. My main goal? Of course – Trenčín Castle. Even though it was already late September the weather felt like summer – full sun, blue sky… and hardly any people. Just the way I like it. The castle is huge. If you want to explore it properly, take your time. You can easily spend a few hours walking around. Today I’m sharing a part of that visit – focusing on walls, inner yards, towers and textures of the fortress. The city view from the top? That’s for another post 😉

### 飞机究竟是如何起飞的呢？ 这个问题问得很好，因为起飞看起来像是一个神奇的壮举，但实际上它完美地展示了一些基础的物理定律。飞机并非简单地“ lifted off”地面，而是四种力量精心平衡、相互较量的结果。 以下是飞机实际起飞过程的逐步分解。 ### 核心概念：飞行的四力 飞机要起飞，必须有一种力量克服另一种力量。这四种力量始终在起作用： 1. **升力：** 将飞机推向空中的向上的力。 2. **重量（重力）：** 将飞机拉向地面的向下的力。 3. **推力：** 推动飞机在空中前进的向前的力（由发动机提供）。 4. **阻力：** 空气阻碍飞机前进的向后的力。 **要起飞，飞机必须产生足够的 *升力* 来克服其 *重量*，并且产生足够的 *推力* 来克服 *阻力*。** --- ### 起飞的分步过程 让我们跟随一架典型的商业喷气式飞机，看看它是如何从跑道进入天空的。 #### 第 1 步：起飞滑跑（加速） - 飞行员将飞机对准跑道，然后向前推油门杆。 - 发动机产生巨大的**推力**。这种推力推动飞机向前，使其在跑道上加速。 - 随着飞机加速，空气高速流过机翼的上下表面。**升力**的奥秘就在这里开始展现。 #### 第 2 步：机翼如何真正产生升力（秘诀所在） 这是最关键的部分。机翼被设计成一种特殊的形状，称为**翼型**。 - **形状：** 机翼的上表面是弯曲的，而下表面则相对平坦。 - **效应：** 当机翼在空气中移动时，它会将气流分开。流经弯曲上表面的空气需要比流经平坦下表面的空气走更长的距离。为了在同一时间到达机翼后缘，上表面的空气必须流动得 **更快**。 - **结果（伯努利原理）：** 流动较快的空气具有**较低的压力**，而流动较慢的空气压力较高。这就造成了一个压力差：**机翼上方压力较低，机翼下方压力较高。** - **神奇之处：** 这种压力差实际上是将机翼（以及与之相连的整架飞机）**向上吸**并**向上推**。这就是**升力**。 #### 第 3 步：抬轮（机头抬起） - 当飞机达到一个特定速度，称为 **Vr（抬轮速度）** 时，流过机翼的气流速度足够快，可以产生显著的升力。 - 飞行员向后拉驾驶杆（方向盘），这会抬起机尾上称为**升降舵**的特殊铰链式翼面。 - 升降舵将气流向上偏转，从而将机尾向下推。这种杠杆作用使飞机的机头抬起。 - 现在，机翼相对于迎面气流的角度变大了（这被称为**迎角**），这进一步增加了升力。 #### 第 4 步：离地（持续爬升） - 机头抬起，速度继续增加，机翼产生的升力终于 **大于飞机的重量**。 - 飞机平稳地从跑道上抬升——这就是**离地**。 - 一旦安全离地并以安全速度（**V2**）爬升，飞行员会收起起落架以减少阻力。 --- ### 等等，还有呢？增升装置的作用 如果你曾观察过飞机起飞或降落时机翼，可能会发现机翼的某些部分在移动和伸展。这些被称为**增升装置**，对于安全起飞至关重要。 - **襟翼：** 它们从机翼后缘向下后方伸展。它们临时改变了机翼的形状，使其弯曲度大大增加。这使得机翼能够在 **较低速度下产生巨大的额外升力**，而这正是让沉重的飞机在有限的跑道距离内离地所需的条件。 - **缝翼：** 它们从机翼前缘伸展出来。它们也有助于控制气流，在低速时增加升力。 ### 简而言之： 1. 发动机产生的**推力**推动飞机前进。 2. **机翼**的形状（翼型）加速了上表面的空气流动，从而产生较低的压力。 3. 这种压力差产生了强大的**升力**。 4. **襟翼和缝翼**帮助在低速时最大化升力。 5. 当**升力**克服飞机的**重量**时，飞机就起飞了。

If you love nature, especially the sea, you would surely like to go to Ao Nang Beach. (Ao means bay, Nang mean lady) Ao Nang Beach is situated in Krabi province, in the South of Thailand. It is well-known as one of the paradise beaches on the Andaman coast and it’s the one among the most beautiful beaches in Thailand. It offers relaxation and natural beauty with sparkling crystal-clear turquoise waters which is a unique characteristic of the Andaman Sea. The blue sky is stunning. In addition, you will surely enjoy a leisurely stroll on the long stretches of fine creamy white sandy beaches and shady trees. Sitting on the beach, listening to the gentle waves, and watching the vast ocean with the reflection of the stunning sunlight throughout the day is the happiness that will make you want to visit Ao Nang Beach again and again. In the distance, you can admire the beautifully shaped limestone islands standing majestically throughout the sea which create a spectacular natural background of Ao Nang Beach. In the evening, when the sun starts to go down, the sky has awesome colors of orange, gold and pink which match beautifully with the sea water, creating picturesque scenery. The gentle sound of waves, the warm sea breeze and the gorgeous sunset make Ao Nang one of the best places to watch the sunset in Thailand and it’s considered to be a romantic landmark that you must experience at least once in your life. Yeah! It’s such a romantic evening atmosphere that will surely impress you. In the meantime, the beach has vibrant and convenient dining options with international restaurants at night and you will certainly enjoy watching exciting and wonderful fireworks shows at the beach which is one of the highlights that you must not miss if you visit Ao Nang Beach. As you can see, the natural charm and breathtaking spectacle of nature at Ao Nang Beach is endless. It is a wonderful experience that will remain in your memories forever.

### আশাকরি " আমার বাংলা ব্লগ " পরিবারের সবাই ভালো আছেন। আশাকরি মহান সৃষ্টিকর্তার কৃপায় আপনারা সবাই সুস্থ আছেন। মহান সৃষ্টিকর্তা এবং আপনাদের আশীর্বাদে আমিও সুস্থ আছি। আজ আপনি আপনাদের সাথে সঠিক পথে বেঁচে থাকতে পারবো না। কেননা এই পৃথিবীতে বর্তমান সময়ে এখন খারাপ মানুষের সংখ্যা এত বেশি বেড়ে গেছে যে এই এত বেশি খারাপ মানুষের জন্য কিন্তু আমরা সব সময় বিভিন্ন ধরনের সমস্যায় পড়ে যাচ্ছি। আর আমরা যদি কখনো সোজা পথে হাঁটতে চাই তখন কিন্তু তারা আমাদের সামনে এসে বিভিন্ন ধরনের সমস্যা সৃষ্টি করে এবং এর ফলে কিন্তু আমরা আর কখনো সামনের দিকে সঠিকভাবে হেঁটে যেতে পারি না। এজন্য মানুষের কোন সঠিক পথে কখনো আর একা হেঁটে যেতে চায় না। আমার মনে হয় যে যারা কখনো আর সামনের দিকে একা পথে হেঁটে যেতে চায় না তারা কিন্তু অনেকটা দুর্বল প্রকৃতির মানুষ হয়ে থাকে। আসলে এই জীবনটাকে যদি আমরা একটা সহজ-সরল জীবন মনে করি তাহলে সেখানে আমরা অবশ্যই ভুল করব। কেননা আমাদের এই জীবনটা কখনোই সহজ সরল নয়। আর এই কঠিন জীবনে যদি আমরা একবার সামনের দিকে এগিয়ে যেতে চেষ্টা করি তাহলে কিন্তু আমাদের সম্মুখে বিভিন্ন ধরনের সমস্যা এসে হাজির হবে এবং এই সমস্যাগুলোর থেকে আমাদের সবসময় বের হয়ে আসতে হবে। একটা জিনিস আমাদের মনে রাখতে হবে যে আমরা যদি আমাদের জীবনের সমস্যাগুলোকে পুষে রাখতে চেষ্টা করি তাহলে কিন্তু আমরা জীবনে আর কখনো সামনের দিকে এগিয়ে যেতে পারবো না। আমাদের সবসময় চেষ্টা করতে হবে যে এই সমস্যাগুলোর থেকে কি করে বের হয়ে আসা যায় এবং নিজেদের জীবনটাকে সঠিকভাবে উপভোগ করা যায়। এজন্য আমরা সব সময় নিজেদের জীবনটাকে সঠিকভাবে উপভোগ করার জন্য সঠিক পথে চলতে হবে এবং সব সময় সত্য কথা বলতে হবে। আর আমরা যদি সবাই মিলে সঠিক পথে চলতে পারি এবং সত্য কথা বলতে পারি তাহলে কিন্তু অবশ্যই আমরা জীবনে বড় হতে পারব এবং জীবনের প্রতিটা ক্ষেত্রে আমরা জয়ী হব। আসলে এই কঠিন জীবনের সংগ্রাম করার মতো সংগ্রামী মন মানসিকতা সবার মধ্যে অবশ্যই থাকতে হবে এবং সামনে যতই বাধা বিপত্তি আসুক না কেন আমরা সব সময় চেষ্টা করব সঠিক পথে চলে সামনের দিকে এগিয়ে যাওয়ার জন্য। একটা জিনিস আমাদের মনে রাখতে হবে যে আমরা যদি সঠিক পথে কখনো এগিয়ে যেতে না পারি তাহলে আমাদের জীবনটা সবসময় পিছনের দিকে পড়ে রবে এবং আমরা সবসময় আর সামনের দিকে এগিয়ে যেতে পারবো না। এভাবে যদি আমরা সব সময় পিছনের দিকে পড়ে থাকে তাহলে আমাদের জীবনে কখনো কোন উন্নতি আসবে না এবং আমাদের সারা জীবনটা অনেক বেশি দুঃখ কষ্টের মধ্যে কাটতে থাকবে। তাইতো আমাদের সামনে যা আসুক না কেন আমরা কখনো ভয় পাবোনা এবং সব সময় সঠিক পথের সামনের দিকে এগিয়ে চলার চেষ্টা করব। আর এভাবে যদি আমরা সবাই মিলে সামনের দিকে সঠিকভাবে এগিয়ে যেতে পারি তাহলে অবশ্যই আমরা জীবনে একটা সময় উন্নতি লাভ করতে পারব। আশাকরি আপনাদের সবার খুব ভালো লেগেছে আজকের পোস্টটি । ভালো লাগলে অবশ্যই কমেন্ট করতে ভুলবেন না। আজ এই পর্যন্তই। সবাই ভালো থাকবেন সুস্থ থাকবেন। দেখা হবে পরবর্তী পোস্টে।

**기술 전략가, S&P 500 "곧 큰 움직임 준비된 것으로 보여"** > BTIG의 기술 전략가 조나단 크린스키는 일요일 발표한 노트에서 시장 변동성이 압축되면서 S&P 500이 결정적인 돌파에 가까워질 수 있다고 밝혔으며, 이 지수가 향후 몇 주 안에 더 큰 움직임을 보일 준비가 되어 있는 것으로 보인다고 말했다. >크린스키는 가격 압축의 널리 주목받는 지표인 S&P 500의 주간 볼린저 밴드가 현재 2019년 이후 가장 좁아졌다며, 현재 범위를 벗어나는 급격한 움직임이 다가올 수 있음을 시사한다고 말했다. >이 설정이 방향을 나타내지는 않지만, BTIG는 상승 편향을 유지하며 더 넓은 추세가 강세를 유지하고 있고 시장이 연속된 해에 같은 하락 패턴을 반복하는 경우가 드물다고 주장했다. 7,000 수준을 지속적으로 상회하는 움직임은 향후 몇 달 안에 약 7,200을 가리킬 수 있다고 이 전략가는 말했다. 버블을 이야기 하는 사람들이 많지만 여전히 버블이 터지기까지는 여유공간이 많다고 하는 사람들이 많다. 즉 낙관주의자는 돈을 벌고 비관주의자는 명성을 얻는다는 말이 틀리지 않은 것 같다. 올해 4월을 넘기면서 미국의 유동성이 늘어날 것이라는 전망이 대부분이다. 그렇다면 5월 이후에 본격적인 유동성 장세가 펼쳐질 가능성이 높다는 말이다. 아직 인공지능의 기술적 혁신은 더 갈길이 먼 것 같다. 하드웨어도 더 많은 발전이 있을 것이라고 한다. 유동성 장세는 주식 현물 부동산 가격을 밀어 올린다. 이럴때 자산을 가지고 운영할 능력을 가지지 못한 사람들은 도태된다. 물론 운영능력이 부족한 사람들도 도태된다. 사람들이 부동산에 몰리는 것은 주식이나 채권 등 복잡한 투자능력이 필요없기 때문이다. 지금같은 상황에서 금이나 부동산을 사는 것이 가장 좋은 투자방법인지도 모른다. --- 리눅스 운영체제가 이제 많이 손에 익어져 간다. 손을 봐서 조정을 할 것은 많지만 윈도우보다 훨씬 편리한 것 같다. 인공지능을 이용하면 웬만한 것은 혼자서 다 할 수 있다. 이제 앞으로 운영체제를 파는 장사도 거의 끝난 것 아닌가 싶다. 앞으로 운영체제가 들어가 있는 컴퓨터는 사지 않을 것 같다.

Hello friends, Good morning everyone, today's nature and environment are a little more serene, especially the serenity of the village nature. Even though winter is over, there is still a bit of a winter atmosphere in nature, especially in rural nature, the great warmth of winter is still felt in the morning. Due to which the freshness of morning nature is felt a little more in rural nature. The pace of life here is much more dynamic, according to the rules of nature, it continues at its own pace. People wake up in the morning and do not get a chance to rest all day. Because people living in rural nature work a little harder, they are used to working continuously without rest. But in the city, the opposite is seen. Instead of working continuously, city people try to rest in between, because there is a difference in ecology between the city and rural nature. Due to which people living in rural nature are relatively a little more diligent and their physical structure is also relatively much better. Maybe this is what happens naturally. I tried to walk for quite some time on the rural roads to enjoy the beautiful moments of the morning. I tried to find a connection to the dynamic life with the fresh nature around me. With each technological breakthrough, the potential for institutional adoption of cryptocurrencies expands, presenting both opportunities and challenges for regulators and policymakers. We’re seeing a shift from speculative interest to serious, data-driven engagement. This means institutional platforms like bibyx are becoming crucial hubs for sophisticated analysis. They offer the tools and insights necessary for entities to make informed decisions, moving beyond surface-level understanding. Forecasting the trajectory of digital assets requires a nuanced approach, especially when considering institutional research. It’s not just about tracking price movements; it’s about dissecting on-chain data, understanding protocol upgrades, and assessing the regulatory clarity surrounding specific assets. This kind of deep dive is what professional services from bibyx aim to provide. They are building the infrastructure for a more robust, evidence-based approach to crypto investment. What’s particularly interesting is how these technological leaps are reshaping analytical frameworks. This, in turn, influences how research is conducted and how risk is quantified. That feels like a significant catalyst for widespread adoption. We might also see a convergence of traditional financial modeling techniques with novel blockchain analytics. This blend is vital for bridging the gap between established financial practices and the pioneering spirit of the crypto space. Enterprise solutions by bibyx are likely to play a key role in facilitating this integration, offering standardized methods for evaluating digital asset portfolios. It’s kind of like building a new language for finance. The regulatory environment, however, remains a critical factor. Policymakers are grappling with how to adapt existing frameworks to this new asset class without stifling innovation. A proactive, informed regulatory stance, informed by the kind of granular analysis available through leading institutional platforms, could foster greater trust and stability. Not the full picture, but a big piece of it. A key trend to watch is the increasing sophistication of institutional research departments themselves. They are investing heavily in talent and technology, building internal capabilities that mirror the services offered by specialized firms. This can lead to a more competitive ecosystem for research and analysis in the crypto space including bibyx. It’s a positive feedback loop. The question then becomes: how can regulators best leverage this growing body of institutional expertise to craft effective policy? Collaboration and open dialogue seem essential. Perhaps understanding the underlying technological drivers of asset performance will become as important as understanding macroeconomic indicators. As we move forward, the ability to accurately forecast market trends and identify genuine technological adoption will distinguish successful institutional players. This requires a commitment to continuous learning and adaptation. It’s not a static field. The pace of change is, well, it’s rapid. The institutional crypto research and analysis sector is poised for significant growth, driven by ongoing technological advancements. Entities that prioritize robust, evidence-based approaches will be best positioned to navigate this evolving terrain. Компания Oracle выпуск операционной системы (Support Repository Update), в котором предложена серия значительных изменений и улучшений для ветки . Для установки предложенных в обновлении исправлений достаточно выполнить команду 'pkg update'. Пользователи также могут бесплатной редакцией Solaris 11.4 CBE (Common Build Environment), развиваемой с использованием модели непрерывной публикации новых версий. Среди в новой версии: * В утилиту beadm добавлена поддержка выставления свойства "preserve" для запрета ручного ("beadm destroy") или автоматического удаления загрузочных окружений (Boot Environment), создаваемых в форме снапшотов в ZFS при обновлении системы. * В системные заголовочные файлы добавлены типы utime32\_t и utimeval32. * В модуль и программу snoop добавлена поддержка использования времени после 2038 года. * В утилите ldm (Logical Domains Manager) повышена информативность сообщений об ошибках. * Расширены возможности настройки свойства удержания файлов () при получении новой файловой системы командой "zfs receive". * Реализована возможность запуска проверки целостности ФС (zfs scrub) и восстановления данных на заменённый диск (resilver) до того, как завершиться фоновое освобождение блоков, инициированное после выполнения "zfs destroy". * Добавлена защита от завершения всех процессов в системе при отправке сигнала SIGHUP процессу с идентификатором -1. * Переработан код для сохранения core-дампов процессов, аварийно завершённых на раннем этапе загрузки. * Добавлена возможность выбора, какой адрес, полученный по DHCP, будет использоваться для автоматической настройки DNS. * В формат ELF добавлена поддержка сжатия секций с использованием алгоритма Zstandard. * В команду bootadm добавлена возможность использования флага "--unrestricted" для разрешения доступа без пароля к отдельным элементам загрузочного меню GRUB. * Обновлена версия утилиты ctfdump, предназначенной для работы с отладочными дампами в формате CTF (Compact Type Format) * В утилиту devnm добавлена опция "-s" для сокращённого вывода с показом только имени устройства. * Добавлен интерфейс gfx\_private для загрузки прошивок к GPU. * В утилиту ikev2cert добавлена возможность извлечения PIN-кода из свойств SMF (Service Management Facility). * В утилите ipadm реализована команда "dhcp release", ранее доступная только в ifconfig. * Предоставлена возможность указания в утилите ls одновременно опций "-s" и "-h" для вывода в читаемом виде размера в блоках. * Обновлены версии программ, среди которых BIND 9.20.15, cups 2.4.15, Go 1.25.5, GNU Binutils 2.45, openssl 3.0.18, PHP 8.4.16, python 3.13.9, sqlite 3.51.0, xorg-server 21.1.20, Firefox 140.4.0esr, FreeType 2.14.1, GNU Screen 5.0.1, gtk3 3.24.51, samba 4.22.6, Wireshark 4.6.0, zsh 5.9. * Удалены пакеты gdk-pixbuf-xlib, gtk-vnc и libneon. Ever felt that surge of excitement about a shiny new project, only to find it slowly grinding to a halt, gathering dust like that treadmill you bought in January? Well, you're not alone, especially if we're talking about something as big as a "digital transformation" in the middle-sized business world. Many mid-market companies leap into the digital age with enthusiasm, picturing sleek new systems and turbocharged efficiency. But then, *thwack!* They hit a wall. Why does this digital glow-up often stall out before it even gets its first selfie? Let's dive into some of the biggest culprits, because understanding the problem is the first step to finally getting that digital engine purring! ### 1. The "No GPS for Our Digital Road Trip" Problem Imagine setting off on a cross-country adventure without a map, a destination, or even knowing *why* you're going. Sounds like a recipe for getting very lost, very fast, right? That's what happens when digital transformation kicks off without a crystal-clear strategy. It's not enough to just say, "We need to be more digital!" You need to know *what* problems you're trying to solve, *what* specific goals you're chasing (e.g., "reduce customer service wait times by 30%," not "make customer service better"), and *how* this tech will get you there. Without a solid roadmap, you're just buying fancy gadgets hoping they'll magically fix everything. Spoiler alert: they won't. ### 2. The "But We've Always Done It This Way!" Brigade Ah, human nature! We love our comfort zones. Introducing new tech often means new ways of working, new skills to learn, and sometimes, even new job roles. This can trigger serious resistance from employees who are comfortable with the old ways. It's like trying to get your grandma to switch from her flip phone to a smartphone – she might see the benefits, but the learning curve feels like Mount Everest. On top of that, mid-market companies might not have a huge in-house tech wizard squad. They need people who can not only *use* the new tech but also *understand* how it fits into the business. Without the right talent or a culture that embraces learning and change, even the best tech is just a pretty paperweight. ### 3. The "Show Me The Money (And Don't Make It Too Complicated)" Conundrum Let's be real: money matters. Mid-market companies don't have bottomless pockets like some mega-corporations. Every dollar spent on digital transformation needs to show a clear return on investment (ROI). If the benefits aren't obvious or if the project keeps ballooning in cost and complexity, budgets get slashed faster than you can say "server crash." And speaking of complexity, trying to Frankenstein together a bunch of brand-new systems with your existing, sometimes ancient, infrastructure? That's a headache waiting to happen. The more tangled the integration, the more expensive and frustrating it gets, often leading to projects being shelved before they ever truly shine. ### So, What's the Un-Snooze Button? The good news is, these challenges aren't insurmountable! By starting with a clear vision, bringing your team along for the ride, picking the *right* tech for your specific needs (not just the flashiest), and focusing on achievable steps, your digital transformation doesn't have to stay stuck in neutral. It can actually be the exciting, game-changing journey you envisioned! --- **Inspired by:**

AI에게 "이 내용 정리해줘" 하면 됩니다. 특히 영어 문서 작성할 때 큰 도움이 됩니다. 제 뇌는 한국어로 생각하니까, AI가 자연스러운 영어로 바꿔줍니다. ## 검색과 리서치 **Perplexity / Claude with Web Search** 예전엔 구글링하고 여러 탭 열어서 비교했죠. 이제는 AI에게 물어봅니다. "React 19 새 기능 정리해줘" "이 에러 해결법 찾아줘" 빠르고, 정리된 형태로 답이 옵니다. 출처도 함께요. ## 자동화 **AI 에이전트** 반복 작업은 AI 에이전트에게 맡깁니다. - 정기적으로 데이터 수집해서 정리 - 알림 확인하고 중요한 것만 요약 - 코드 리포트 생성 한 번 설정해두면 알아서 돕니다. 비서를 둔 것 같죠. ## 주의할 점 AI는 만능이 아닙니다. - **검증 필수:** AI가 만든 코드, 문서 모두 확인해야 합니다 - **보안:** 민감한 정보는 AI에게 맡기면 안 됩니다 - **의존성:** AI 없이도 문제 해결할 수 있는 능력은 유지해야 합니다 도구는 도구일 뿐입니다. 활용하는 건 사람입니다. ## 마무리 2026년 개발자의 핵심 역량은 "AI를 얼마나 잘 활용하느냐"가 됐습니다. AI를 두려워할 필요 없습니다. AI를 잘 쓰는 사람이 AI를 안 쓰는 사람보다 훨씬 생산적이니까요. 여러분은 어떤 AI 도구 쓰고 계신가요? 추천하는 게 있다면 댓글로 공유해주세요! --- #ai #개발자 #생산성 #claude #coding

北京旅游的第 5 天，也就是最后一天，我们去打卡了非常难得约到的中国军事博物馆。看了这么多博物馆之后，突然发现这个军事博物馆才是给我最震撼的一个，没有之一，是第一。 我们的游览顺序是先在一楼听讲解，然后又去了负一楼，之后再去二楼和三楼参观。 一楼相当于是一个以展板为主、以科普和讲解为主的很大的几个场馆，有里面的公益免费讲解员讲解。这讲解员非常专业，枯燥的军事内容和科技、国家的有关信息知识，在他的嘴里让人们能非常感兴趣，想听下去的感觉，乌乌泱泱的大部队就跟着他一直往前走。 然后负一楼是最让人震撼的，像一个巨大的军火库。有坦克、舰艇、大炮，各种类型的大炮全部都是真的。里面的武器有中国制的，也有美国制的，还有日本制的，甚至还有一个之前美国闯入我国领空的无人机，被我们打下来之后留下的残骸也被陈列在这里。 二楼是陆军轻型装备，比如有冲锋枪、炮弹、手枪、刀剑之类的，也是很大很大的场馆。站在二楼可以俯视一楼的陈列，以及看到那两枚东风导弹和天花板上悬挂的各种飞机模型。 然后三楼则是以艺术气息比较重一点的艺术展馆和临时展馆，里面有军事艺术油画、国画和雕塑等。里面很多伟人和重要军事人物的雕像都在里面，刻画得惟妙惟肖。 我们在负一楼停留的时间最长，因为这确实是很有视觉冲击。再加上负一楼也碰到了一个免费的讲解员，他讲的每一个坦克、每一个大炮都有一段背后的故事，让我们大人和孩子都听得津津有味。可惜时间不够，我们只连续听到三四个，就匆匆赶往下一个展馆了。如果一直跟着他在负一楼，估计他要解说一个多小时才能讲解完。 我们预留的时间不够，下午两三点钟就要去赶高铁，所以为了掐时间还是赶往楼上了。怎么说呢？开始我以为我对军事不会很感兴趣，结果真的是深深的被这个军事博物馆所吸引和震撼，让我觉得中国真的是越来越强大。军事力量是一个国家非常重要的一方面，军事强了，国外才不会欺负我们，以前的历史才不会重蹈覆辙。

Anomalies of our planet. The anomaly under Antarctica, or the largest gravitational anomaly on Earth, is a recent study, it was published at the end of December, it has been made public these days, in these days of February. In this study they do not explain where the anomaly arose from, but rather they have reconstructed 70 million years of the evolution of this anomaly, an evolution because curiously it has changed in terms of its position and also its intensity. Although the headlines talk about the largest gravitational anomaly on Earth, in reality the record is still held by the gravitational anomaly of the Indian Ocean, below you see both, by the way, the one in graph A would be marked with a star, the one in the Indian Ocean, south of India, and in graph B, in the south, we have the one in Antarctica, they are gravitational wells, what happens is that the Antarctic anomaly is the most intense negative gravitational anomaly when the rotation effect is corrected and the polar flattening, because you already know that the Earth is a little flattened at the poles, a little, I think it is 24 kilometers of difference in terms of the Equator, it is a little, it is something verifiable and measurable. Souce It can be said that the two anomalies are winners, although in different categories, and both hide many mysteries about what is under our feet, what is under the Earth's crust, because what is under there, what we have under our feet, is much more complex than was believed until a few years ago and apparently affects what happens on the surface more than was believed. The Indian Ocean anomaly covers approximately 3 million square km and produces a depression of up to -106 m. That is, the water there is 106 m below mean sea level. The inclination is along those 3 million square km, so nothing is noticeable, but it is measurable, there is 106 m compared to the average sea level on the planet, which is not regular, there are higher areas and others less as in But the deepest well is the one in the south of India. The South Atlantic anomaly is magnetic, it is different, this is gravitational, it is gravity, here we are talking about gravity, not magnetism, not the Earth's magnetic field, the South Atlantic anomaly affects the Earth's magnetic field, that is, it affects that area, it is from the South Atlantic, but it fully affects all of Argentina, Chile, almost all of South America and it is an area where the Earth's magnetic field is more eroded, it is weaker, not much, that is, it is not something dangerous, but it is weaker and it is not known exactly why Nor is it another of the great mysteries, but in this case we are talking about gravity, gravity wells, places where the Earth's gravity is lower, there are two main ones, one in India, in the south of India, in the Indian Ocean, where the gravitational well is -106 m with respect to the average global sea level and the other would be in Antarctica, which is the one that has been studied now. Souce Can this anomaly evolve? It is the most surprising thing and it evolves very slowly over a period of millions of years, but the curious thing is that it moves and also changes intensity because until relatively recently until this study, now that I think about it, because in the case of the Indian which is most studied, they had not detected any type of evolution, that is, this is the first time that I have read in a study about a gravitational anomaly that has evolved, that has changed, that has changed its potency, its power. Gravitational anomalies tell us that there is less or more density under that area, in the case of a gravitational well it means that there is less density. What is below is less dense and where there is more density, as you can see in the red areas they would be the areas of greater density, it means that under the Earth's crust there is more density, there is more mass, there are more metallic areas basically. There is another anomaly called the Bangi anomaly under central Africa. It is a magnetic anomaly and the main hypothesis is that this anomaly is caused by a metallic core of an asteroid that impacted the Earth a long time ago and its core was left there stuck in the mantle of the earth and there it is, like a dense metallic mass that has not dissolved in the core, the Earth's mantle is what extends beneath the crust to the core. In conclusion, the anomaly of Antarctica, which has been analyzed during its evolution during the last 70 million years, turns out to be not something static, it moves and also changes its intensity, it has changed its intensity by 30% in the last 35 million years with also previous fluctuations, it coincides with key climate changes such as the global cooling of the Legocene or Ligocene 34 million years ago and also when Antarctica went from being a continent of green meadows and forests to the block ice cream that we know today. День на день не припадає. Мені ці погодні гойдалки добряче вдарили по голові: як почала боліти зранку, так до вечора й трималася. Таке відчуття, ніби таблетки — підробка, бо жодні не заступилися за мою бідну голову. Аж нарешті ввечері з’явилася надія, що мене все ж таки попустить. Так воно й сталося, хоча десь там далеко я ще відчуваю напругу. Та й серце трішки вередувало, що мене геть засмутило. Такі метеозалежні дні — це справжнє випробування, особливо коли накладається стрес від війни та побутові справи. Добре, що хоча б зі світлом та тишею сьогодні пощастило, це справді допомагає трохи видихнути. Все ж таки довелося піти до магазину по продукти, бо холодильник був зовсім порожній. Останнім часом він у мене все частіше пустує. Купила, як зазвичай, стандартний набір: хліб, яйця, ковбасу, вершкове масло. Докупила овочів на вінегрет, куряче філе та гомілки для супу й рублених котлет. Можливо, так протримаюся ще тиждень. За сином приїхали мої батьки й забрали його до себе на вихідні, що дало мені змогу відпочити в тиші. Та й зі світлом нас сьогодні побалували — цілу добу не вимикають. Напевно, вже полагодили мережі після обстрілів нашої країни терористами-росіянами. Дивно, як мало людині потрібно для щастя: трохи тиші, повний холодильник і світло у вікнах. Попри те, що здоров’я інколи підводить, ці маленькі перемоги над обставинами додають сил. Зараз головне — виспатися, поки голова нарешті дала спокій, а за вікном тихо. Завтра буде новий день, і я сподіваюся, що він буде набагато лагіднішим для мене.

Cover of the November 1983 issue of Byte Byte was subtitled "The Small Systems Journal" and it generally covered computers that were used at home or in a business environment. In the early 1980s, there was a wide variety. In November 1983, it wasn't yet quite clear that the standard set by IBM for the PC would be the one to dominate though it was definitely starting to take hold. In fact, this issue focuses on the PC and includes: Columns Build the H-Com Handicapped Communicator - Details on how to build a scanning communicator designed for those unable to talk. Includes both code and hardware design. BYTE West Coast: California Hardware - A look at new hardware including a portable computer called the Workslate which features a built-in 300bps modem and 16-line x 46 character display, a 128KB bubble memory expansion card for the PC from Intel, another 128KB bubble memory board from Helix, and the Cygnet Communications Cosystem which works with an IBM PC to automatically send and retrieve e-mail, provide automated database access and more. Themes IBM PCs Do the Unexpected - A look at some of the unique applications for the IBM PC including emulating a Cray-1 to help study how energy is transferred from the sea to the atmosphere, custom medical software developed in COBOL, as an electronic therapist, and more. IBM 's Estridge - An interview with the president of IBM's Entry Systems Division. This was a new division headquartered in Boca Raton, Florida that was responsible for, among other things, the IBM PC. Enhancing Screen Displays for the IBM PC - A type-in program that provides a set of enhancements that makes it easier to configure color and monochrome monitors on the PC to your needs. POKEing Around in the IBM PC, Part 1 : Accessing System and Hardware Facilities - The first in a two-part series about directly accessing memory and hardware via POKE and PEEK commands in BASIC. Could 1,000,000 IBM PC Users Be Wrong? - A look of the future of IBM and the PC (including the upcoming PCjr). At the time, Apple was still leading in shipments of "business-oriented desktop systems costing between $1000 and $10,000" (with Tandy/Radio Shack in 3rd) but the PC was expected to take the lead by the end of the year. Big Blue Goes Japanese - IBM introduces the IBM 5550 or Multistation 5550 in Japan. This is basically an IBM PC for Japan (an other parts of Asia) that was capable of processing Kanji and other complex character sets. Expanding on the IBM PC - A look at some of the expansion boards available for the IBM PC. Included here are CP/M boards, networking, RAM disk, clock, memory expansion, drive controllers, multi interface boards (parallel and serial ports), graphics, print-spooler/buffer boards, speech synthesizers, EPROM programmers, and much more. Installable Device Drivers for PC-DOS 2.0 - Supporting device drivers was a new capability in PC-DOS 2.0 which shipped with the XT. A Communications Package for the IBM PC - A look at how the Transend communications software evolved during design. Table of Contents from the November 1983 issue of Byte Reviews The IBM PC XT and DOS 2.0 - A review of the brand new IBM PC XT and DOS 2.00 that shipped with it. Differences between the XT and original PC included a 10 MB hard drive in place of one of the two floppy drives, removal of the cassette port, 128K standard RAM (as opposed to 64K) - expandable up to 256K on the motherboard, eight expansion slots (up from five), standard serial port, and more. The Corona PC - A PC compatible that featured an 8088 CPU @ 5MHz, monochrome monitor, 128KB of RAM and a single floppy drive for $2595. It was also available with two floppy drives ($2995) or with one floppy and a 10Mb hard drive ($4495). A Look at the HP Series 200 Model 16 - Also known as the HP 9816, this machine includes 256K or 512K of RAM, 270KB 3.5" floppy drive, and a 68000 CPU, and BASIC which it was designed to work with though a version of Pascal is also available. Features Japan and the Fifth Generation - A look at Japan's efforts to develop artificial intelligence. While the topic of AI has become especially hot in recent years, it has long been a goal since the earliest days of the PC or computers in general. Speech Images on the IBM PC - A look at an experimental speech input card that plots the "voice print". Lmodem: A Small Remote-Communication Program - A relatively simple type-in smart-terminal program for CP/M based systems written in BDS C. The Software Tools: Unix Capabilities on Non-Unix Systems - A look at a package that provides many Unix-like tools on a variety of non-Unix systems. These include tools such as diff, ls, ar, sort, find, field, sedit, format, and many others. Table of Contents from the November 1983 issue of Byte (continued) Nucleus Editorial: Growth vs. Quality - The struggle to maintain quality and the PC market explodes. MICROBYTES - Brief news bits including: tons of new PC compatibles expected to be shown at COMDEX, new integrated software packages from Ovation and Fox & Geller, $40 Modula-2 compiler available for the IBM PC, CAD software unveiled for the PC XT, new proposed ST412HP SCSI interface standard for hard disks, and more. Letters - Letters from readers about prodcut descriptions provided by manufacturers, the Lisa computer, public domain software, the 8086 and backwards compatibility, and more. Programming Quickies - Short programs including a program to pass/merge and scan a command line in CP/M, fast loading files from disk with Apple DOS 3.3, implementing subscripts and superscripts on the Atari 400/800, adding array capabilities to dBASE II, and more. Technical Forums - Type-in programs for creating simple contour plots, performing an address calculation sort, and more. Executive Summary Oppo is reportedly preparing to unveil its next-generation flagship, the Find X9 Ultra, in China this March. Ahead of its expected debut, multiple leaks have surfaced outlining key hardware upgrades—most notably a substantial increase in battery capacity and a high-resolution OLED display with an elevated refresh rate. If confirmed, the Find X9 Ultra would represent a meaningful evolution over its predecessor, positioning Oppo more aggressively in the ultra-premium smartphone segment. Key Developments Launch Timeline: Expected debut in China in March, with global rollout projected between April and June. Display: 6.82-inch 2K BOE OLED panel; prototype reportedly tested at 144Hz, though retail version may feature 120Hz. Battery: Rumored 7,050mAh capacity, up from 6,100mAh in the Oppo Find X8 Ultra. Processor: Expected to be powered by the Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 SoC. Camera System: 200MP Sony Lytia 901 primary sensor 200MP periscope telephoto 50MP ultra-wide 50MP telephoto with 10x optical zoom Potential support for a 300mm teleconverter accessory Color Options: Black, brown, and orange. Display and Battery: Strategic Hardware Positioning One of the most significant rumored upgrades is the 7,050mAh battery, marking a notable jump from the previous generation. In an industry where most flagship devices remain within the 4,500–5,500mAh range, crossing the 7,000mAh threshold signals a strategic emphasis on endurance. Such capacity could provide: Extended multimedia and gaming sessions Enhanced 5G usage sustainability Competitive differentiation in battery-conscious markets On the display front, a 2K BOE OLED panel paired with a potential 144Hz refresh rate (even if scaled to 120Hz in retail units) would ensure top-tier smoothness and visual fidelity. This places the device firmly within the performance-focused premium tier. Imaging Ambitions: A Camera-Centric Flagship Oppo appears to be doubling down on computational photography and hardware-driven imaging power. The rumored dual 200MP setup—featuring both a primary and periscope telephoto sensor—suggests a deliberate attempt to redefine smartphone zoom and detail capture capabilities. The addition of a 10x optical zoom telephoto lens and potential 300mm teleconverter support further indicates professional-grade ambitions. If implemented effectively, this configuration could: Compete directly with leading ultra-premium camera phones Strengthen Oppo’s brand identity in mobile imaging Appeal to content creators and photography enthusiasts Performance Expectations The anticipated inclusion of the Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 chipset suggests flagship-level processing power, AI acceleration, and energy optimization. Combined with a large battery and high-refresh display, the device may deliver a balanced mix of performance and longevity. This hardware alignment indicates Oppo is targeting users who demand: High-end gaming capability Advanced AI imaging features Long-term usability without frequent charging Market and Competitive Implications The Find X9 Ultra’s rumored specifications suggest a clear competitive strategy: Battery Leadership: Positioning itself among the highest-capacity flagship devices. Camera Differentiation: Elevating optical zoom and high-resolution sensor deployment. Premium Branding: Reinforcing Oppo’s presence in the ultra-flagship tier. If priced strategically, the device could intensify competition in both the Chinese and global high-end smartphone markets. Future Outlook Should the leaked specifications materialize, the Find X9 Ultra may signal a broader industry shift toward: Larger battery capacities in premium devices Hybrid professional-grade camera ecosystems Enhanced refresh rate standardization beyond 120Hz The upcoming launch window between April and June will determine how these rumored upgrades translate into real-world performance and consumer adoption. Conclusion The Oppo Find X9 Ultra, as currently rumored, reflects an ambitious attempt to blend battery endurance, display performance, and advanced imaging into a single flagship device. While final specifications remain unconfirmed, the direction suggests a carefully engineered response to intensifying competition in the premium smartphone segment. If these leaks prove accurate, Oppo may be preparing one of its most technically aggressive flagship releases to date.

How to Formulate Melatonin Powder Supplements: Manufacturing Guidelines and Quality Tips Creating safe, efficacious, and market-ready supplements utilizing melatonin powder demands a sophisticated understanding of pharmacokinetics, material science, and precision engineering. The formulation process begins far before the mixing stage; it originates with the selection of a high-purity raw ingredient, specifically N-acetyl-5-methoxytryptamine, possessing a purity assay exceeding 99% to minimize unknown impurities like Peak E. Given that the standard therapeutic dosage ranges from a microscopic 0.3mg to 10mg, the primary formulating challenge involves achieving absolute homogeneity within a macroscopic carrier matrix. A simple physical blend often fails to distribute such minute quantities evenly, creating "hot spots" where one capsule delivers a supratherapeutic dose while another remains inert. Addressing this necessitates the implementation of geometric dilution protocols or the utilization of liquid-spray granulation techniques, where the melatonin is dissolved in a volatile solvent and sprayed onto an excipient like microcrystalline cellulose to ensure every particle carries the active compound. Furthermore, the selection of excipients plays a critical role; fillers must be chemically inert and non-hygroscopic to prevent hydrolysis, as melatonin demonstrates sensitivity to moisture and oxidative stress. Disintegrants such as croscarmellose sodium ensure rapid release post-ingestion, mimicking the body's natural pineal secretion spike, while flow agents like silicon dioxide prevent agglomeration during the encapsulation process. Stability testing under accelerated conditions (40°C/75% RH) remains non-negotiable to verify that potency remains intact throughout the shelf life, as degradation products can compromise safety. Manufacturers must also navigate the nuances of particle size distribution; micronized powder significantly enhances bioavailability by increasing the specific surface area available for absorption in the gastrointestinal tract. Ultimately, formulating with this potent neurohormone requires a synergy of rigorous quality control, validated high-shear mixing technologies, and a deep comprehension of physical chemistry to deliver a product that consumers can trust for their sleep health. Establishing Precise Pre-Formulation and Sourcing Protocols The foundation of any superior dietary supplement lies in the rigorous evaluation of its core components before a single machine starts running. When dealing with a potent hormone like melatonin powder , the margin for error remains virtually non-existent. Sourcing ingredients requires looking beyond the Certificate of Analysis (CoA) provided by a supplier and conducting independent verification of physical and chemical characteristics. The physiological impact of melatonin occurs at exceedingly low concentrations, meaning the raw material must possess exceptional purity and a predictable impurity profile. Manufacturers often overlook the physical characteristics of the powder, such as bulk density, tapped density, and flowability angles, yet these metrics dictate how the material behaves inside a hopper or blender. A fluffy, low-density powder might segregate from a denser filler during transport, undoing hours of careful mixing. Establishing a robust vendor qualification program ensures that the incoming raw material meets strict pharmacopoeial standards, whether USP, EP, or BP, ensuring that the starting point of formulation is solid. Validating Purity and Identifying Impurities High-performance liquid chromatography (HPLC) serves as the gold standard for verifying that the melatonin powder meets the claimed potency. However, purity extends beyond checking for the active ingredient; it involves a relentless hunt for specific contaminants. The tryptophan manufacturing process often yields related substances, such as 1,1'-ethylidenebis(tryptophan), famously associated with historical safety concerns in the 90s (EMS). While melatonin synthesis differs, ensuring the absence of solvent residues and synthesis by-products like 5-methoxy-tryptamine is vital. Advanced laboratory testing utilizing gas chromatography-mass spectrometry (GC-MS) helps defect residual solvents like methanol or acetone used during crystallization. Your quality assurance team needs to establish strict specification limits for heavy metals—lead, arsenic, cadmium, and mercury—measuring them in parts per billion rather than parts per million given the chronic nightly usage of sleep aids. Validating the raw material against established monographs provides a safety net, ensuring that every batch entering the facility contributes to a safe final product. Optimizing Particle Size for Bioavailability Bioavailability defines the efficacy of a sleep supplement. If the user digests the capsule but the melatonin fails to dissolve and enter the bloodstream before reaching the colon, the product fails. Particle size distribution (PSD) directly influences the dissolution rate described by the Noyes-Whitney equation. Standard milled powders may suffice for extended-release formulations, but for rapid-onset sleep aids, micronized melatonin powder is frequently the superior choice. Micronization reduces particles to the low micrometer range, vastly increasing the specific surface area. This modification allows the hydrophobic indoleamine to wet and dissolve more rapidly in gastric fluids. However, handling micronized powder introduces handling challenges; these fine particles behave like cohesive dust, resisting flow and clogging machinery. Formulators must balance the biological need for small particles with the manufacturing need for flowable granules, often necessitating a granulation step to lock the fine active particles into larger, free-flowing agglomerates that disintegrate instantly upon hydration. Selecting Chemically Compatible Excipients The inactive ingredients in a capsule or tablet are never truly "inactive" in a chemical sense. They provide the vehicle for the active ingredient. Melatonin contains functional groups capable of interacting with certain excipients under stress conditions like heat or humidity. Reducing sugars, often found in lactose-based fillers, can undergo Maillard reactions with amine groups, though less likely with melatonin's structure, avoiding potential interactions remains prudent. Microcrystalline cellulose (MCC) stands out as a preferred diluent due to its excellent compressibility and chemical inertness. For direct compression tablets, the binder choice dictates the tablet's hardness and friability. Formulators must also consider the moisture content (water activity) of the excipients. Melatonin powder can degrade via hydrolysis if placed in a matrix with high free water content. Using anhydrous excipients like anhydrous dicalcium phosphate helps create a "dry island" environment for the active ingredient. Furthermore, the inclusion of a surfactant like sodium lauryl sulfate, even in minute amounts, can facilitate the wetting of the hydrophobic melatonin crystal, ensuring that dissolution begins the moment the pill hits the stomach acid. Advanced Blending Technologies and Homogeneity Assurance Creating a uniform mixture when the active ingredient constitutes less than 1% of the total formulation weight challenges even the most seasoned manufacturing engineers. This creates a "needle in a haystack" scenario where the distribution of melatonin powder must be statistically perfect across millions of doses. Standard tumbling in a V-blender for twenty minutes often proves insufficient for such low-dose loading. The physics of particle movement dictates that without sufficient shear force, small cohesive particles of melatonin will clump together rather than dispersing among the larger carrier particles. This phenomenon, known as agglomeration, leads to super-potent pharmaceutical units that pose safety risks. overcoming this requires a shift from simple mixing to advanced processing techniques designed specifically for micro-dosing. Investigating the coefficient of variation (CV) during the validation batches reveals the success of the blending strategy; a CV of less than 5% is generally the target for such potent compounds. Achieving this level of precision demands a strategic approach to equipment selection, loading orders, and mixing dynamics. Implementing Geometric Dilution on a Macroscopic Scale Geometric dilution acts as the pharmacy compounding principle applied to industrial manufacturing. You cannot dump 1kg of melatonin into 500kg of filler and expect uniformity. The process involves creating a "pre-mix" or concentrate. Technicians blend the total amount of active ingredient with an equal amount of diluent. Once homogeneous, this mixture is blended with an equal amount of diluent again. This doubling continues until all filler is incorporated. In large-scale manufacturing, this translate to using a high-shear mixer to create a 10% or 1% trituration of melatonin powder . This pre-blend essentially turns the potent active into a diluted, easier-to-handle ingredient. Using a colored tracer or analyzing samples from top, middle, and bottom locations of the pre-mix verifies uniformity before this concentrate moves to the main blender. This stepwise expansion of the mixture volume ensures that the active particles are physically separated from one another by excipient particles, preventing re-agglomeration and ensuring that when the final capsule is filled, it captures the exact intended dosage. Utilizing High-Shear and Fluid Bed Granulation Direct compression or encapsulation of dry blends often fails for low-dose melatonin due to segregation. Vibration during the transfer from blender to hopper causes smaller melatonin particles to sift to the bottom while larger filler particles rise to the top (the Brazil Nut Effect). Wet granulation serves as a robust solution to this percolation issue. By suspending the melatonin powder in a binder solution and spraying it onto a fluidized bed of excipients, formulators lock the active ingredient onto the surface of the carrier. As the solvent evaporates, the melatonin remains adhered to the filler, creating a solid bridge. Alternatively, high-shear granulators use mechanical energy to disperse the active ingredient and binder, creating dense granules. These granules possess a uniform distribution of the drug substance. When these granules flow into the tablet press or capsule filler, they move as a single unit, guaranteeing that the ratio of active to inactive remains constant from the first bottle produced to the last. This process also improves flowability, reducing weight variation in the final dosage form. Controlling Environmental Factors During Manufacturing The manufacturing suite environment exerts a profound influence on the handling of melatonin. Low relative humidity is essential to prevent the powder from becoming sticky or degrading, yet excessively low humidity introduces static electricity. Melatonin, being an organic molecule, creates significant static charge when subjected to friction. This static causes the powder to cling to the stainless steel walls of the blender, the scoop, or the hopper, resulting in drug loss and sub-potent batches. Maintaining relative humidity between 40% and 50% usually dissipates static charges adequately. Grounding all equipment remains mandatory. In some cases, adding a small percentage of colloidal silicon dioxide (glidant) early in the blending process coats the particles and mitigates static interactions. Additionally, light exposure must be controlled. Melatonin is photosensitive; prolonged exposure to UV or intense artificial light can initiate degradation. Manufacturing suites should utilize amber-sleeved lighting or LED equivalents with low UV emission, and holding times for exposed powder blends should remain as short as possible to preserve the integrity of the molecule. Critical Stability Testing and Final Quality Assurance The responsibility of a manufacturer extends far beyond the moment the product leaves the facility. Ensuring that the supplement retains its potency until the expiration date requires rigorous stability profiling. Melatonin, while relatively stable compared to some liquid vitamins, presents unique challenges in powder form when combined with certain minerals or herbal extracts. Chemical degradation pathways, primarily oxidation and hydrolysis, can silently reduce the effective dosage inside the bottle. A product labeled as 3mg lying on a retailer's shelf for eighteen months must still deliver 3mg, not 1.5mg. This necessitates an overage strategy—adding slightly more melatonin powder than declared (often 5-10%)—to compensate for inevitable minor losses over time, provided this overage remains within safe regulatory limits. Stability chambers set to varying temperatures and humidity levels provide the data needed to justify expiration dates. Without this data, any shelf-life claim is merely a guess, leaving the brand vulnerable to regulatory action and consumer mistrust. Designing Protective Packaging Systems The bottle and desiccant serve as the final line of defense for the formulation. Since melatonin degrades under light and moisture, clear bottles are generally ill-advised unless they contain a UV-blocking agent. Opaque High-Density Polyethylene (HDPE) or amber PET bottles offer superior protection against photodegradation. The closure system requires an induction seal to create a hermetic barrier against oxygen and environmental humidity. Inside the bottle, the inclusion of a silica gel packet or a molecular sieve canister actively scavenges any moisture that permeates the plastic or enters during opening. For formulations combining melatonin powder with other hygroscopic ingredients (like valerian root or magnesium), the desiccant becomes even more critical. If the other ingredients pull moisture from the air, they can create a micro-environment within the capsule that accelerates the hydrolysis of melatonin. Proper packaging engineering ensures that the stable environment created during manufacturing persists into the consumer's home. Conducting Rigorous Finished Product Testing Analytical testing of the finished batch confirms that the formulation strategy succeeded. Uniformity of Dosage Units (UDU) testing involves analyzing ten individual capsules or tablets to ensure they all fall within a narrow acceptance criteriab(usually 85-115% of the label claim). This test specifically catches the blending errors discussed earlier. Dissolution testing follows, measuring how quickly the dosage form releases the melatonin in a simulated gastric environment. For an immediate-release sleep aid, the specification might require 75% release within 30 minutes. If the tablet is compressed too hard or the disintegrant fails, the release will be retarded, delaying the sleep onset for the user. Microbial testing checks for pathogens like Salmonella and E. coli, ensuring the biological safety of the product. This comprehensive analytical suite serves as the "Certificate of Analysis" for the finished good, providing the documentation required for retailers and export documentation. Navigating Global Regulatory Differences Formulating for a global market introduces complexity regarding dosage limits and categorization. In the United States, melatonin is a dietary supplement; in the European Union, Australia, and Canada, it often falls under different regulatory frameworks depending on the dosage, sometimes requiring registration as a natural health product or even a drug at higher potencies. The source of the melatonin powder —synthetic versus animal-derived—matters immensely for international compliance. Animal-derived melatonin is largely obsolete due to BSE (Mad Cow Disease) concerns, so ensuring your source is fully synthetic and vegan-certified is crucial for global acceptance. Labeling requirements also vary, with some regions requiring specific warning statements regarding drowsiness or interactions with MAO inhibitors. A formulation designed for the US market might need adjustment to meet the stricter dosage caps (e.g., 1mg or 2mg limits) found in other jurisdictions, requiring precise formulation flexibility. Conclusion Formulating high-quality sleep supplements requires more than just mixing ingredients; it demands a scientific approach to consistency, stability, and bioavailability. By adhering to strict sourcing protocols, utilizing advanced blending technologies like geometric dilution, and implementing rigorous quality control measures, manufacturers can produce supplements that truly benefit consumers. Very often, I began to look at myself from the outside and be surprised at myself – it's rare to find a photographer in our area who would go to take pictures in bad weather or frost with pleasure. You need to love your job very much... My first teacher told me that you need to become a fanatical photographer in order to succeed. Fanatic is not a bad meaning I'm not creating an idol for myself here. He meant that you would to love photography so much that it would be at the top of everything. Creative people are all a bit crazy, and that's not a bad thing either. This means that I turn off the mind and allow myself to give in to feelings and emotions, where the soul works...heart. But still: snowfall is joy, rainstorm is joy, thunderstorm is joy, flood (without victims) is joy, any anomaly or event is joy. Well, definitely crazy! It's boring when the weather is monotonous, nothing happens. Thanks to this winter, it doesn't let you get bored! A week of frosts, a week of snowfalls – everything is how I once described the ideal conditions for diversity. Well, in the everyday sense, you need to be prepared for any weather. I stopped being afraid of frosts because I stopped being shy about dressing warmer, even if it wasn't as comfortable and beautiful. As for frost, I don't think it's worth saying that it needs to be shown in a way that makes it look frosty. In short and in a simple way: What you associate with frost is what you would to photograph. For me, it's steam from my mouth, smoke from cars, cold blue shadows, low yellow rays of the sun, people hiding from the cold.

শান্তিনিকেতন মানেই শুধু রবীন্দ্রনাথ, খোয়াই, বা বসন্ত এইসব উৎসব এর মধ্যে সীমাবদ্ধ নয়। এই অঞ্চলের মাটির গভীরে মিশে আছে বহু প্রাচীন ঐতিহ্য, লোককথা ও শক্তি উপাসনার ইতিহাস। তারই এক অনন্য নিদর্শন হলো-কঙ্কালীতলা মন্দির, যা বীরভূম জেলার অন্যতম গুরুত্বপূর্ণ শক্তিপীঠ হিসেবে পরিচিত। কথিত আছে- সতীর দেহ খণ্ডিত হওয়ার সময় এখানে দেবী সতীর কঙ্কাল বা কোমরের অংশ পতিত হয়েছিল, সেই থেকেই এই স্থানের নাম কঙ্কালীতলা। এটি ৫১টি শক্তিপীঠের মধ্যে অন্যতম শক্তিপীঠ হিসেবে আখ্যায়িত আছে । এখানে দেবী পূজিত হন কঙ্কালীর রূপে, যেখানে শক্তি মানে শুধু ভয়ংকর রূপ নয়। বরং সৃষ্টির উৎস, রক্ষা ও মাতৃত্বের প্রতীক হিসেবে। কঙ্কালীতলার খোলা প্রাঙ্গণ, বিশাল প্রাচীন গাছ, আর সেই গাছের গায়ে বাঁধা অসংখ্য লাল-কমলা সুতো ও ফুলের মালা। এইসব গাছ অনেক প্রাচীন, মন্দিরস্থলে এইসব গাছ দেবীর আশীর্বাদ প্রাপ্ত। ফলে প্রাচীন সময়ের থেকে একটা বিশ্বাস সবার মধ্যেই হয়ে আসছে, এখানে গাছে মানত করলে মনস্কামনা পূর্ণ হয়। এখানে দাঁড়ালে যেনো এক ধরনের গভীর শান্তি অনুভূত হয়। পাথরের বাঁধানো চত্বর, ছোট ছোট মন্দির কাঠামো এবং প্রকৃতির ছায়া মিলিয়ে জায়গাটি যেন আত্মসংযম ও ধ্যানের জন্য তৈরি। এখানে অনেক সাধু- সন্ন্যাসী আছেন, যারা ধ্যানেও বসে থাকেন।কঙ্কালীতলায় প্রতিদিনই বহু মানুষ আসেন। কেউ মানত করতে, কেউ মানত পূরণ করতে, কেউ আবার নিছকই শান্তি খুঁজতে।

*** # 隐藏的宝藏：探索不为人知的旅行目的地 旅行是一个探索和发现的过程，而有些地方却常常被忽视，成为了真正的“隐藏宝藏”。在这篇博客文章中，我们将带您走出常规的旅游路线，探索一些鲜为人知但却美丽迷人的旅行目的地。 ## 1. **阿尔巴尼亚的锡拉杰** 位于阿尔巴尼亚的锡拉杰（Gjirokastër）是一个被联合国教科文组织列为世界遗产的城市，以其独特的奥斯曼建筑和迷人的石头街道而闻名。这里的古堡和博物馆展示了丰富的历史文化，是历史爱好者的天堂。 ### 必游景点： - **锡拉杰城堡**：俯瞰整个城市的壮丽景色。 - **埃内斯特·赫明威博物馆**：了解这位诺贝尔文学奖得主的生活与创作。 ## 2. **塞尔维亚的诺维萨德** 诺维萨德（Novi Sad）是塞尔维亚的第二大城市，以其丰富的文化和历史而著称。每年夏天，这里都会举办著名的EXIT音乐节，吸引了来自世界各地的游客。 ### 必游景点： - **彼得罗瓦丁堡**：历史悠久的堡垒，提供壮观的多瑙河景色。 - **诺维萨德市博物馆**：了解当地的历史和文化。 ## 3. **格鲁吉亚的梅斯季亚** 梅斯季亚（Mestia）位于高加索山脉的心脏地带，是一个被大自然环绕的小镇，以其壮丽的山景和独特的文化而闻名。这里是徒步旅行和滑雪爱好者的理想之地。 ### 必游景点： - **乌舍古尔村**：被认为是欧洲最高的常住村落，拥有迷人的塔楼。 - **梅斯季亚博物馆**：展示当地的历史和传统。 ## 4. **新西兰的拉纳基** 拉纳基（New Plymouth）是新西兰北岛上的一个小城市，以其美丽的海滩和丰富的艺术文化而闻名。这里的塔拉纳基山（Mount Taranaki）是登山和摄影爱好者的天堂。 ### 必游景点： - **普卡基海滩**：享受日落和冲浪的最佳地点。 - **新普利茅斯艺术画廊**：欣赏当地和国际艺术家的作品。 ## 5. **摩洛哥的阿伊特·本·哈杜** 阿伊特·本·哈杜（Aït Benhaddou）是一个传统的摩洛哥村落，以其红色土墙和独特的建筑风格而闻名。这个古老的村庄曾是丝绸之路上的重要站点，现在是多部电影的取景地。 ### 必游景点： - **古城堡**：探索这座历史悠久的村庄，感受其独特的魅力。 - **电影拍摄地**：参观《角斗士》和《权力的游戏》的拍摄现场。 ## 结语 这些隐藏的旅行宝藏不仅美丽迷人，还能够让您深入了解不同的文化和历史。在您的下一次旅行中，不妨考虑这些鲜为人知的目的地，开启一段独特的探索之旅！希望您能在旅途中发现更多的惊喜与美好。 --- 希望这篇博客文章能激发您的旅行灵感！如果您有其他想要探索的主题或目的地，请随时告诉我！ *** ***

Hey there, awesome people! Let's talk about something super important: education. Every kid deserves a chance to shine, right? But sometimes, for our little learners with special needs, navigating the school system can feel like trying to solve a Rubik's Cube blindfolded. Parents often feel lost, overwhelmed, and like they're fighting an uphill battle alone. That's where YOU could come in, if you've got a legal mind and a heart of gold! Imagine being the person who swoops in, cape flapping (metaphorically, of course!), to make sure kids get exactly what they need to thrive. We're talking about advocating for children with disabilities, making sure their Individualized Education Programs (IEPs) are rock-solid, their 504 plans are respected, and that they're placed in an environment where they can truly learn and grow. This isn't just about shuffling papers; it's about being a game-changer! You'd be diving deep into the nitty-gritty of special education law, representing families in everything from eligibility meetings to challenging decisions in due process hearings. Basically, you're the ultimate champion for a child's right to an appropriate education. So, who's the super-attorney they're looking for? If you've got a couple of years under your belt in special education law, you're already a step ahead. But more than that, they want someone who's: * **Sharp as a tack:** You love digging into research and crafting a killer argument. * **A communication wizard:** You can talk to parents, school districts, and judges with clarity and conviction. * **Organized and a go-getter:** You manage your caseload like a pro and don't need constant hand-holding. * **Compassionate:** You genuinely care about helping families and making a difference. If you're nodding along, thinking "Yep, that's me!", then the Law Offices of Kenneth S. Cooper in Bala Cynwyd, PA, might just be your next adventure. And for the seasoned pros out there, there might even be some sweet hybrid work flexibility! This isn't just a job; it's a mission. You'll get competitive pay, solid benefits (think health, 401K, PTO, life insurance!), but the real perk? Going home every day knowing you've fought for a child's future. How cool is that?! I joined in immediately, lifting my voice in worship and thanksgiving. After praise and worship, we moved into prayers, and it was such a refreshing moment in God’s presence. The service itself was powerful and impactful. Every part of it spoke to me in one way or the other. From the sermon to the prayers, I truly felt blessed and spiritually refreshed. It’s always amazing how Sundays have a way of resetting the mind and spirit for the new week ahead. | ---|--- After the main service, I didn’t rush home immediately. From washing the leaves to preparing the ingredients and allowing everything to cook properly, before I knew it, the delicious aroma had filled the kitchen. In no time, the food was ready and served. I enjoyed my hot Oha soup with some soft fufu, and trust me, it was so satisfying! That first swallow with the rich soup… pure bliss 😍. There’s nothing like a good homemade Sunday meal. | ---|--- Food ready After eating, I felt so relaxed and decided to take a nap. That Sunday afternoon nap hit differently. I woke up later in the evening feeling refreshed, calm, and grateful. I spent the rest of the evening quietly, just appreciating the peace and beauty of the day. 수원 영통 대학가 앞에 자리한 하울즈카페는 요즘 대학가 분위기와 잘 어울리는 카페다. 과하지 않게 정돈된 공간, 우드톤 위주의 심플한 인테리어에 잔잔한 음악이 흐르고, 혼자 와도 부담 없고 둘이 와도 편안한 분위기였다. 라떼는 우유 거품이 부드럽고 고소함이 깔끔하게 남는다. 라떼아트도 정성스럽게 올라가 있어 눈으로 먼저 즐기고, 맛으로 다시 한 번 만족하게 된다. 함께 주문한 케이크도 담백해 커피 맛을 해치지 않고 잘 어울렸다. 대학가 앞이라 소란스러울 거라 생각했는데, 의외로 차분하고 조용해 잠깐 쉬어가기 좋다. 공부나 작업을 하는 사람도, 가볍게 수다를 나누는 테이블도 자연스럽게 섞여 있는 공간. 다들 참 할 얘기들이 많아 보였다. 맛있는 음료와 분위기, 둘 다 놓치지 않은 곳이라 영통에서 카페를 찾는다면 한 번쯤 들러볼 만한 곳이다.

Source Normally, when we think about the challenges of becoming a multi-planetary civilization, we focus on technological difficulties: rocket power, fuel, or the months-long journeys where the crew must be kept alive and sane. But there are imperceptible changes in our anatomy and biology that could jeopardize our entire space adventure. These are primarily changes induced by microgravity during prolonged spaceflight, which force us to rethink long-duration journeys, such as missions to Mars. >Normalmente cuando uno piensa en las dificultades de convertirnos en una civilización multi-planetaria, se nos vienen a la cabeza las dificultades tecnológicas. Potencia de los cohetes, combustible o los viajes de meses de duración en los que hay que mantener a la tripulación con vida y en su sano juicio. Pero existen cambios imperceptibles en nuestra anatomía y biología que pueden pone en jaque toda nuestra aventura espacial. Se trata principalmente de cambios inducidos por la microgravedad durante vuelos espaciales prolongados que obliga a replantear los viajes largos, como misiones a Marte. On Earth, gravity holds the brain in place within the skull, maintaining a balance of fluids such as cerebrospinal fluid (CSF). In space, without the influence of gravity, bodily fluids redistribute toward the head. The brain shifts upward and backward within the skull, rotating along the pitch axis. Sensory and motor regions (such as the supplementary motor cortex) experience the greatest displacements, up to 2–3 mm on year-long missions. >En la Tierra, la gravedad mantiene el cerebro en su posición dentro del cráneo, conservando un equilibrio de fluidos como el líquido cefalorraquídeo (LCR). En el espacio, sin la acción de la gravedad, se producen redistribuciones de fluidos corporales hacia la cabeza. El cerebro se mueve hacia arriba y hacia atrás en el cráneo, con una rotación en el eje de cabeceo. Las regiones sensoriales y motoras (como la corteza motora suplementaria) sufren los mayores desplazamientos, hasta 2-3 mm en misiones de un año. Source There is also an expansion of the ventricles, cerebrospinal fluid-filled cavities in the center of the brain. On long flights (more than 6 months), they expand by up to 10-25%, with a "crowding" of brain tissue in the upper part of the skull. The brain stretches and compresses in specific areas, such as sensory and motor regions, and the pituitary gland flattens, which could raise intracranial pressure. In addition, there are reductions in white matter and focal increases in motor areas, related to adaptations to movement in microgravity. >También se produce una expansión de los ventrículos, unas cavidades llenas de LCR en el centro del cerebro. En vuelos largos (más de 6 meses), se expanden hasta un 10-25%, con un "apiñamiento" del tejido cerebral en la parte superior del cráneo. El cerebro se estira y comprime en áreas específicas, como las regiones sensoriales y motoras, y la glándula pituitaria se aplana, lo que podría elevar la presión intracraneal. Además de reducciones en la materia blanca y aumentos focales en áreas motoras, relacionados con adaptaciones al movimiento en microgravedad. These changes are not immediate but occur gradually, most of them happening within the first six months in space, and then they appear to stabilize on longer missions. They are not "permanent deformations" in all cases, but recovery can take months or years. For example, the ventricles recover only 55-64% of their size within 6 or 7 months after flight, and at least 3 years between missions are needed for complete recovery. >Estos cambios lógicamente no son inmediatos sino que se van produciendo progresivamente, la mayoría de ellos ocurren en los primeros seis meses en el espacio y luego parecen estabilizarse en misiones más largas. No se trata de "deformaciones permanentes" en todos los casos, pero la recuperación puede tardar meses o años. Por ejemplo, los ventrículos recuperan solo el 55-64% de su tamaño en 6 o 7 meses después del vuelo, y se necesitan al menos 3 años entre misiones para una recuperación completa. Source The immediate effects include loss of balance, disorientation, space sickness, and vestibular problems (related to the sense of balance). Visual problems such as optic disc edema and changes in refractive error also occur. In the long term, there may be potential impacts on cognitive, motor, and sensory functions. In younger astronauts, the changes are more pronounced. Furthermore, there are risks of oxidative stress, which could accelerate neuronal aging or increase the risk of neurodegeneration. >Los efectos inmediatos son la pérdida de equilibrio, desorientación, mareos espaciales y problemas vestibulares (relacionados con el sentido del equilibrio). También se producen problemas visuales como edema en el disco óptico y cambios en la refracción ocular. A largo plazo puede haber posibles impactos en funciones cognitivas, motoras y sensoriales. En astronautas más jóvenes, los cambios son más pronunciados. Además, hay riesgos de estrés oxidativo, que podría acelerar el envejecimiento neuronal o aumentar el riesgo de neurodegeneración. All these discoveries force us to rethink long-duration space travel, especially with plans like NASA's Artemis program and missions to Mars that would last 1-3 years round trip. On a trip to Mars, prolonged exposure could cause brain changes that don't stabilize, affecting crew performance during the journey or upon arrival. And let's not even talk about colonization: on the Moon (with 1/6 of Earth's gravity) or Mars (with 1/3), it's unknown whether these changes would reverse or worsen, leaving them permanently impaired. >Todos estos descubrimientos obligan a replantear los viajes largos fuera de la Tierra, especialmente con planes como el programa Artemis de la NASA y misiones a Marte que durarían 1-3 años ida y vuelta. En un viaje a Marte, la exposición prolongada podría causar cambios cerebrales que no se estabilicen, afectando el rendimiento de la tripulación durante el viaje o al llegar y no hablemos de colonizar, en la Luna con 1/6 de gravedad terrestre) o Marte con 1/3, no se sabe si estos cambios se revierten o empeoran y se quedarán gilipoyas para siempre.
