Once upon a moment, silence took over my sharing. A pause settled where words used to be. Stopped sharing. Stopped speaking about my goals. Finding silence easier now. Talking less about tasks in progress. Sharing fewer details upfront. Preferring quiet effort over spoken plans. Keeping work close until it's ready. Outside, things seemed empty where I’d been. Folks assumed I’d walked away for good. Yet here I am, still moving. Not everyone thought I stayed driven. Not everyone saw it happen. A few missed it completely. Others looked right past. It slipped under their radar entirely. Yet hidden from their view stood something else entirely I wasn’t quitting. I was rebuilding. Quietly. 🌑 Time When Others Move Ahead From tiny hiccups it grew. A stumble here, then a pause there shaped what came next. Plans that didn’t work. Habits that broke. It began to waver, piece by fragile piece. Shouting my goals into the air was how it started. Then came silence. “I’m working on something big.” “Just wait.” “Next month will be different.” Still, beneath everything, a quiet voice said another path was waiting. Not noise. Not validation. Not announcements. I needed correction. Here it is - the toughest thing to face might just be this one fact Motivation isn’t what you’re missing. You need more maturity. Choosing Silence Instead of Making Excuses Quiet took the place of my words. Rather than speak, I stepped back. Fewer messages went out after I quit sharing my schedule. Quiet took over where updates used to be. Finding peace in delays came after years of pushing. Stillness feels strange at first. Now I let time pass without fighting it. Moving slowly makes sense when you stop rushing. Now I move without watching who's ahead. My rhythm fits me alone. Speed means nothing when the path is mine. Focusing came next, slowly at first. Then it stuck. Not dramatically. Not aggressively. Just consistently. Wake up. Do the work. Improve a little. Repeat. No social proof. No applause. No hype. Just discipline. Then came a quiet ache, deep in the chest. Nowhere else does being seen count so much. What stands out seems to matter most here. Yet true progress usually takes place out of view. A Quiet Upgrade Gains Strength Slowly, something shifted. My focus improved. My distractions reduced. My standards increased. It wasn’t about proving anything. Just happened that way. Now that I quit aiming to show something. Quiet steps carry more weight than loud promises ever could. Quiet effort slips under the weight of expectation. A hush around your actions lets them breathe without judgment. Doing without announcing cuts the noise that crowds progress. Stillness shields motion from second-guessing. Unseen steps often move fastest. Clear thinking comes after pressure fades. Clear thinking leads to better actions. Quiet moments shaped me most. Not applause, but stillness made the difference. It needed consistency. What Silence Says When Someone Returns Not every quiet return carries a grudge. Sometimes stillness speaks louder than payback ever could. Proving someone mistaken isn’t the point. What matters comes through quiet certainty, not argument. Rightness speaks when noise stops. Being seen as correct fades beside understanding. Truth holds without insisting. Clarity replaces clash. Peace arrives where winning ends. What matters is proving your strength to you. Self-trust grows when you start again after losing it. Failing quietly hurts more than falling where everyone can see. Betraying your own word feels like that. Through those quiet days, rebuilding faith in who I am began. Waking came right after my word. That promise held true. Fair game, my word was motion; once spoken, hands moved without delay. Each time I promised growth - I grew. No negotiation. Fresh air filled their chest again after a long while. Not loud confidence. Calm confidence. Quiet by nature. It simply exists without asking for notice. The Hidden Edge Before they even start, most folks are already shouting about their return. Folks talk of shifting gears long before any real move happens. Before they do it, they talk about staying disciplined. When things turn tough, off they go once more. Quiet rebuilding changes things in ways people don’t expect. Your strength comes from within, not shaped by how others respond. Pressure doesn’t bend you. Instead, it meets stillness. Starting without permission works just fine. Moving forward never asks if you’re ready. Because you chose it, motion follows. When a choice is made, legs respond. From decision, steps grow. A mind shifts, feet answer. What begins in thought ends in travel. That’s strength. A Question for You Are you rebuilding… Maybe it's real. Could be a show too. Something shifting inside without words... maybe or announcing loudly? Hidden changes often matter most. The quieter you stay on the topic, Reality grows stronger each time you notice it. 🔥 Final Reflection A quiet reply of mine never made waves out there. It stabilized me. That moment shaped my dependability. Focusing on it daily brought a clearer mind. One morning, folks saw little shifts beginning to show up. It happened without my saying so. Yet the outcome showed clearly. What makes it work is how quiet it lands. Attention never follows because you're always one step ahead. You chase alignment. When things line up smoothly, that’s when it sticks It’s how you show up that carries weight, far beyond anything spoken.

Venetian Walk: SS. Apostoli to Palazzo Giovanelli **SS. Apostoli – Palazzo Falier – I Gesuiti – I Crociferi – S. Caterina – S. Maria dell’Orto – S. Marziale – Palazzo Giovanelli** *(Admission to Palazzo Giovanelli by application to the British Consul, Traghetto S. Felice, Grand Canal.)* From the Ca’ d’Oro pier on the Grand Canal, a narrow *calle* opens into the broad Corso Vittorio Emanuele. Turning right, we reach the Church of SS. Apostoli. Admirers of Tiepolo will pause before *St. Lucy Receiving the Sacrament before her Martyrdom* in the Cappella Corner, to the right of the entrance. Nearby stand two refined family monuments in the finest Lombardi style. To the left of the choir hangs a Veronese school painting, *The Fall of Manna*. Opposite the church, incorporated into the palazzo over the Ponte SS. Apostoli, are the remains of Marino Falier’s house. ### I Gesuiti and I Crociferi Northeast of the campo rises the Church of I Gesuiti, built in 1715 on the site of the ruined Crociferi church. Its interior, lavish with marble and *verde antico* inlay, reflects the heavy taste of its age. In the first chapel on the left hangs Titian’s *Martyrdom of St. Lawrence* (1558), painted under the influence of Michelangelo. Once celebrated as one of his most remarkable works, time has darkened it almost beyond legibility. The church also preserves an *Assumption* by Tintoretto. Nearly opposite stands the Oratory of the Crociferi, housing Palma Giovane’s *Doge Cigogna Visiting the Oratory* and six further works in his finest manner. A *Flagellation* by Tintoretto and a ceiling *Assumption* by Titian complete the ensemble. The adjoining monastery buildings, still marked by the three crosses of the order, now serve as barracks. ### S. Caterina Crossing back over the campo and walking along the fondamenta Zen, we reach the small Church of S. Caterina. Here, Veronese’s beautifully preserved *Marriage of St. Catherine* commands full attention—one of the most satisfying achievements of the later Venetian school. Other works by Palma Giovane and Tintoretto are present, yet it is Veronese who defines the space. ### S. Maria dell’Orto In the quieter northwest quarter of the city stands S. Maria dell’Orto. Over the first altar in the right aisle is Cima’s *Baptist with Saints Peter, Mark, Jerome, and Paul*, framed in marble by Leopardi. In the third chapel on the left is Tintoretto’s *Presentation at the Temple*, and in the Cappella Contarini his *St. Agnes*—both heavily restored. Ruskin lamented the condition of the former as “a ghastly ruin and a disgrace to modern Venice.” In the choir, Tintoretto’s monumental canvases, *The Last Judgment* and *The Worship of the Golden Calf*, demand deliberate and patient study. Vasari admired their formidable invention yet criticized their execution, suggesting they appeared painted *da burla*—in jest. Near the entrance, a Pietà by Lorenzo Lotto and an early, heavily repainted *Virgin and Child* by Giovanni Bellini deserve notice. Above the sacristy door hangs a restored miracle-working half-figure of the Virgin and Child, discovered in a garden in 1577 and giving the church its present name—Our Lady of the Garden. Verrocchio, Leopardi, and Tintoretto were buried here; many tombs were later defaced when the church served as a military store in 1855. ### S. Marziale and the Path to Palazzo Giovanelli Moving southward, we arrive at S. Marziale, home to Titian’s *Tobias* and Tintoretto’s final work, depicting the patron saint with Saints Peter and Paul. From Campo S. Marziale we cross the Ponte Zancani and Ponte S. Fosca, noting the marble footmarks on the bridge’s crown, and pass the statue of Paolo Sarpi near the site of his attempted assassination. A short distance along Corso Vittorio Emanuele stands Palazzo Giovanelli, a restored patrician mansion recalling the grandeur of the Ducal Palace period. Its interior is richly adorned and contains perhaps the most precious Giorgione in Venice: the so-called *Family of Giorgione*, described by a contemporary as “a stormy landscape with a gipsy and soldier.” In the foreground stands a youthful figure holding a staff, poised between knight and peasant. To the right, a young mother nurses her child on a sunlit meadow. A mountain stream flows through the centre, crossed by a rustic bridge. Beyond rises the walled city of Castelfranco, Giorgione’s birthplace, dark beneath storm clouds split by lightning. The luminous foreground and brooding sky speak of the vicissitudes of human existence. Broken classical columns heighten the poetic melancholy of this early masterpiece—one of the first landscapes infused with human emotion. The gallery also includes a portrait by Antonello da Messina, a *Santa Conversazione* by Paris Bordone, a battle scene by Tintoretto, a portrait by Titian, and a painting attributed by Berenson to Catena. In the ballroom, fine Venetian mirrors complete the experience. --- --- *** I am sharing photos of landscapes, moments and experiences. Nature and sea are the most visited themes in my photo collection, but any attention-grabbing aspect can be photographed. 👇**ENGLISH VERSION BELOW** 👇 Ciao a tutti amici e amiche di e di **Steemit**. Se **Bitcoin** dovesse chiudere febbraio negativo, saremmo al **5° mese consecutivo in rosso**! Nel **2018** ci sono stati ben 5 mesi di chiusure mensili negative. E no, non è stato l’inizio della fine ma semplicemente un momento del ciclo. Quando i ribassi si accumulano mese dopo mese, il problema non è solo il prezzo. È la testa. I ribassi sono lenti, pesanti, psicologicamente logoranti. Ti consumano piano piano. **E più il rosso si allunga, più il sentiment peggiora**. Però, storicamente, dopo fasi così compresse, **i recuperi possono essere veloci e violenti**. Non significa che il prossimo mese sarà verde. Non significa che il minimo sia già fatto. Significa solo che il mercato di Bitcoin non si muove in linea retta. Comprime. Logora. Spaventa. E poi reagisce. Cinque mesi rossi fanno rumore e ci lasciamo guidare dal panico, che si trasforma in panico collettivo sfociando in un sentiment bassissimo. Io non so quando tornerà il verde. So però che guardare solo l’ultima candela mensile non è una strategia sensata. Ma davvero può piovere per sempre? Certo, Bitcoin potrebbe proseguire con altre chiusure mensili in rosso, i cicli passati sono solo da prendere come dati storici. Sono dell'idea che non è una questione di _se_, ma di _quando_ inizierà a performare bene. E soprattutto, per quanto tempo ci regalerà candele verdi. Gli ultimi 5 mesi del 2018 sono stati negativi, (+ gennaio 2019) però dopo ci sono stati 5 mesi di chiusure positive, con un bel **+ 60% a maggio 2019**. Bitcoin è imprevedibile anche se ultimamente può sembrare il contrario. Ma nel lungo periodo resta fedele alla sua natura. Il rumore, il sentiment e le narrative cambiano. **Ma la matematica no!** Offerta fissa. Emissione decrescente. Solo 21 milioni di BTC. Vi sembra poco? Ed è proprio questa la parte che, nei mesi lenti, pesanti e psicologicamente logoranti… fa la differenza. ### Grazie per aver letto il mio post. **ENGLISH VERSION** Hi everyone, friends from and **Steemit**! If **Bitcoin** were to close February in the red, we’d be looking at the **5th consecutive month of negative closes**. That makes an impression, no point denying it. Five monthly red candles in a row aren’t easy for anyone. But let’s not forget: it has happened before. In **2018**, there were 5 consecutive negative monthly closes. And no, it wasn’t the beginning of the end - it was simply a phase of the cycle. When declines pile up month after month, the problem isn’t just the price. It’s your mindset. Downtrends are slow, heavy, psychologically exhausting. They wear you down little by little. **And the longer the red streak, the worse the sentiment gets.** Yet historically, after phases like these, **recoveries can be fast and violent**. It doesn’t mean next month will be green. It doesn’t mean the bottom is already in. It simply means the Bitcoin market doesn’t move in a straight line. It compresses. It wears you down. It scares you. And then it reacts. Five red months make noise, and we let panic guide us - turning into collective panic and extremely low sentiment. I don’t know when green will return. But I do know that focusing only on the last monthly candle is not a sensible strategy. Can it really rain forever? Bitcoin could continue with more red monthly closes. Past cycles are just historical data points. I think it’s not a matter of *if*, but *when* it will start performing well again. And more importantly, for how long it will give us green candles. The last 5 months of 2018 were negative, (+ January 2019) yet they were followed by five positive monthly closes, including a solid **+60% in May 2019**. Bitcoin is unpredictable, even when lately it may seem otherwise. But in the long run, it stays true to its nature. Noise changes. Sentiment changes. Narratives change. **But mathematics doesn’t.** Fixed supply. Decreasing issuance. Only 21 million BTC. Does that sound like little to you? Alright, folks, buckle up because even the legends are getting a digital makeover! We're talking about none other than Warren Buffett's real estate arm, Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices (BHHS), and they're cooking up something big that could change how you find your dream home. Now, you might be thinking, "Warren Buffett? Isn't he all about old-school value and long-term investments?" And you'd be right! But even the Oracle of Omaha knows that in today's world, if you're not online, you're pretty much invisible. So, what's the big scoop? BHHS is launching a brand-spanking-new, super-sleek online portal and platform. Think of it like this: instead of sending you all over the internet to find a house, they're building their *own* awesome real estate playground. **Why is this a game-changer?** For years, finding a home online has been a bit of a wild goose chase. You'd jump from agent sites to big-name portals, trying to piece together all the info. BHHS used to rely on this model too, with individual agents having their own websites, and everyone pulling from the big Multiple Listing Service (MLS). But now? They're cutting through the noise. This new platform is designed to be your one-stop shop. We're talking: * **Super Smart Search:** Imagine AI-powered tools helping you find exactly what you're looking for, maybe even before you knew you were looking for it! * **Neighborhood Know-How:** Deep dives into what makes a community tick, giving you the lowdown on schools, amenities, and vibe. * **Direct Access:** No more hoops to jump through. You'll connect directly with BHHS agents and all their listings in one spot. * **A Smoother Journey:** The goal is to make the whole home-buying or selling process feel less like a scavenger hunt and more like a guided tour. Essentially, BHHS is stepping into the arena with the big online real estate giants like Zillow and Realtor.com. They want to own your home search experience from start to finish, keeping you happily browsing within their family. It's a huge strategic move, showing that even the most established players recognize the power of technology and direct consumer engagement. It's all about making your life easier, getting you connected faster, and helping agents do their best work. So, next time you're scrolling for that perfect new pad, don't be surprised to see a shiny new option from a very familiar name, all thanks to a digital push from Buffett's crew! --- Inspired by:

### আশাকরি " আমার বাংলা ব্লগ " পরিবারের সবাই ভালো আছেন। আশাকরি মহান সৃষ্টিকর্তার কৃপায় আপনারা সবাই সুস্থ আছেন। মহান সৃষ্টিকর্তা এবং আপনাদের আশীর্বাদে আমিও সুস্থ আছি। আজ আপনি আপনাদের সাথে নির্ভরশীল সম্পর্কে একটি জেনারেল রাইটিং পোস্ট করলাম। এই পৃথিবীতে কেউ কখনো কারো উপর নির্ভরশীল নয়। অর্থাৎ সবাই সমান নিজের মতো করে সামনের দিকে এগিয়ে চলার চেষ্টা করে এবং নিজেদের জীবনটাকে উপভোগ করে এই জীবনটাকে সামনের দিকে এগিয়ে নিয়ে যাওয়ার জন্য চেষ্টা করে। একটা জিনিস আমাদের মনে রাখতে হবে যে প্রত্যেকটা মানুষ কিন্তু তাদের নিজেদের জীবনকে পরিচালনা করার জন্য বিভিন্ন ধরনের কাজকর্ম করে। আপনি কিন্তু কখনো দয়া করে কোন মানুষকে কোন ধরনের আর্থিক সাহায্য দেন না। অর্থাৎ আপনি কাজের বিনিময়ে মানুষকে পয়সা দেন। কিন্তু কখনো মানুষকে ফ্রি ফ্রি আপনি সামান্য একটু সাহায্য করেন না। এজন্য আপনি কখনো অন্য কোন মানুষের উপর নির্ভরশীল নয় এবং আপনার এ ধরনের চিন্তাভাবনা করা মোটেও উচিত। এই পৃথিবীতে প্রত্যেকটি মানুষ যেহেতু নিজের উপর নির্ভরশীল এবং নিজে যদি কাজ না করে তাহলে কিন্তু পরবর্তীতে তারা কি ভাবে সংসার পরিচালনা করবে সেই জিনিসটা জানে না তাহলে কিন্তু এই মানুষগুলো প্রতিনিয়ত কঠোর পরিশ্রম করে একটু ভালোভাবে বেঁচে থাকার জন্য। একটা জিনিস আমাদের মনে রাখতে হবে যে এই পৃথিবীতে যদি আমরা একটু ভালোভাবে বেঁচে থাকতে পারি তাহলে অবশ্যই আমরা প্রত্যেকটা সময়কে সঠিকভাবে কাজে লাগাতে চেষ্টা করব এবং কি করে সামনের দিকে এগিয়ে যাব এজন্য আমরা প্রতিনিধি চিন্তাভাবনা করব। আসলে আপনাকে কেউ কখনো এসে সাহায্য করবে না এবং আপনার সামনের দিকে এগিয়ে চলার পথটা আপনার নিজেরই। এই পৃথিবীর মানুষ এখন বড়ই স্বার্থপর এবং সবাই সবার নিজের স্বার্থ ছাড়া আর কখনো কোন কিছু বুঝতে চেষ্টা করে না। আর এই স্বার্থপর মন মানসিকতার সময় আমরা যদি নিজেদের কেউ দয়ালু বা উদার করতে চেষ্টা করি তাহলে কিন্তু আমাদের সর্বস্ব চলে যাবে কিন্তু আমরা কখনো মানুষের কাছ থেকে প্রকৃত ভালোবাসা মোটেও খুঁজে পাবো না। অর্থাৎ শুধুমাত্র মানুষ আমাদের কাছ থেকে আমাদের সরলতার সুযোগ নিয়ে সবকিছু নিয়ে যাবে কিন্তু তার বিনিময়ে তারা কখনো আমাদেরকে কোন কিছু দেবে না। এজন্য আমরা সবসময় চেষ্টা করব যাতে করে আমরা নিজেদের প্রয়োজনগুলো নিজেরা মেটাতে পারি এবং আমাদের প্রয়োজন মেটানোর জন্য কখনো অন্যের উপর নির্ভরশীল হতে না হয়। আর এভাবে যদি আমরা নিজেরা মিলে সামনের দিকে এগিয়ে যেতে পারি তাহলে একটা সময় অবশ্যই আমরা জীবনে উন্নতি লাভ করতে পারব। যদিও আমাদের মানুষ স্বার্থপর বলুক তাতেও আমাদের কোন অসুবিধা নেই। কেননা এখন সবাই নিজের স্বার্থ ছাড়া কেউ কখনো অন্যের স্বার্থকে বড় করে দেখে। আসলে আগের সেই যুগ এখন আর নেই এবং মানুষের মধ্যে ভালোবাসা আর কখনো খুঁজে পাওয়া যায় না। একটা জিনিস আমাদের মনে রাখতে হবে যে আমরা যদি এই পৃথিবীতে এখন মানুষকে ভালোবেসে তাদের পাশে থাকতে পারি তাহলে কিন্তু অবশ্যই সেই মানুষগুলো আমাকে ভালবাসবে এবং আমাদের বিপদে পদে তারা সবসময় সর্বপ্রথম এগিয়ে আসার চেষ্টা করবে। আশাকরি আপনাদের সবার খুব ভালো লেগেছে আজকের পোস্টটি । ভালো লাগলে অবশ্যই কমেন্ট করতে ভুলবেন না। আজ এই পর্যন্তই। সবাই ভালো থাকবেন সুস্থ থাকবেন। দেখা হবে পরবর্তী পোস্টে।

### আশাকরি " আমার বাংলা ব্লগ " পরিবারের সবাই ভালো আছেন। আশাকরি মহান সৃষ্টিকর্তার কৃপায় আপনারা সবাই সুস্থ আছেন। মহান সৃষ্টিকর্তা এবং আপনাদের আশীর্বাদে আমিও সুস্থ আছি। আজ আপনি আপনাদের সাথে অদ্ভুত এক জীবন সম্পর্কে একটি জেনারেল রাইটিং পোস্ট করলাম। আসলে আমরা এই জীবনটাকে অদ্ভুত বলার কারণ হলো এই জীবনে আমরা বিভিন্ন ধরনের সমস্যার সম্মুখীন হয়ে থাকি এবং সেই সমস্যাগুলো সমাধান করে আমরা সবসময় সামনের দিকে এগিয়ে যাওয়ার চেষ্টা করি। একটা জিনিস আমাদের মনে রাখতে হবে যে আমরা এই পৃথিবীতে যদি অদ্ভুতভাবে চলাফেরা না করে সাধারণভাবে চলাফেরা করার চেষ্টা করি তাহলে কখনো আমরা জীবনে উন্নতি লাভ করতে পারব না। একটা জিনিস আমাদের মনে রাখতে হবে যে এই অদ্ভুত জীবনটাকে আমরা যদি একটু ভালো করতে চাই তাহলে কিন্তু অবশ্যই আমাদেরকে সব সময় কঠোর পরিশ্রম করতে হবে এবং কটার পরিশ্রমের মাধ্যমে আমরা আমাদের নিজেদের জীবনটাকে আরো বেশি উন্নত দিকে এগিয়ে নিয়ে যেতে পারবো। আসলে এই জীবনে আপনি বিভিন্ন ধরনের মানুষের সঙ্গে পরিচিত হবেন এবং তাদের আচার-আচরণ সব সময় আপনাকে বিস্মিত করবে। অর্থাৎ এই পৃথিবীতে আপনি কোন মানুষের সাথে কোন মানুষের সামান্য মিল কখনো খুঁজে পাবেন না। অর্থাৎ এই পৃথিবীটা মনে হবে যেন একটা বড় পাগলের কারখানা। আসলে সবাই সবার নিজের মতো করে সামনের দিকে এগিয়ে চলার চেষ্টা করেন। একটা জিনিস আমাদের মনে রাখতে হবে যে এই জীবনে আমরা যদি সঠিকভাবে বেঁচে থাকতে চাই তাহলে কিন্তু অবশ্যই আমাদেরকে ভালোভাবে কাজ করে যেতে হবে এবং কাজ না করতে যদি আমরা পারি তাহলে আমরা কখনো আমাদের এই জীবনটাকে সুখ শান্তির মধ্যে কখনোই রাখতে পারব না। আসলে এই জীবনে মানুষ বিভিন্ন ধরনের সমস্যার সম্মুখীন হয়ে পরে এবং সেই সমস্যা গুলো আস্তে আস্তে সমাধান করার চেষ্টা করে। আর মানুষ যদি এই সমাধান না করতে পারে তাহলে সে কখনো আর সামনের দিকে এগিয়ে যেতে পারবে না। একটা জিনিস আমাদের সবসময় মনে রাখতে হবে যে মানুষ যদি তাদের জীবনটাকে অলসের মতো সব সময় এক জায়গায় রেখে দেয় তাহলে কিন্তু সে কখনো সামনের দিকে এগিয়ে যেতে পারবে না এবং জীবনের প্রতিটা মুহূর্তে সে সকল সুযোগ সুবিধা থেকে বঞ্চিত থাকবে। আসলে এইসব কারণের জন্য আমাদের এই জীবনটাকে সত্যিই আমার কাছে এক অদ্ভুত জীবন মনে হয়েছে।আর এই জীবনে রয়েছে বিভিন্ন ধরনের সমস্যা যেগুলো আমাদের পিছনে সব সময় লেগে থাকে। আর আমরা যদি এই সমস্যাগুলো সঠিকভাবে সমাধান করে সামনের দিকে এগিয়ে যেতে পারি তাহলে কিন্তু সামনে আমাদের জন্য অনেক সুখ-শান্তি অপেক্ষা করে রয়েছে। এজন্য এই জীবনের প্রত্যেকটা মুহূর্ত থেকে আমাদের সব সময় কাজে লাগাতে হবে এবং এভাবে যদি আমরা জীবনের প্রত্যেকটা মুহূর্তকে কাজে লাগিয়ে সামনের দিকে এগিয়ে যেতে পারে তাহলে একটা সময় আমাদের জীবনটা অবশ্যই সুখ শান্তিতে ভরে যাবে এবং আমরাও খুব সুন্দর ভাবে এই পৃথিবীতে তখন বেঁচে থাকতে পারবো। তাইতো আমাদের সব সময় নিজেদের জীবন নিয়ে চিন্তা ভাবনা করতে হবে এবং জীবনের এক মুহূর্ত সময় কখনো নষ্ট করলে হবে না। এই সকল দিক যদি আমরা মেনে চলি তাহলে জীবনে অবশ্যই আমরা উন্নতি লাভ করতে পারব। আশাকরি আপনাদের সবার খুব ভালো লেগেছে আজকের পোস্টটি । ভালো লাগলে অবশ্যই কমেন্ট করতে ভুলবেন না। আজ এই পর্যন্তই। সবাই ভালো থাকবেন সুস্থ থাকবেন। দেখা হবে পরবর্তী পোস্টে।

# Paiements ultra-rapides et sécurité : comment vos gains sont protégés en ligne On ne va pas se mentir, quand on joue et qu'on décroche un joli gain, la seule chose qu'on veut, c'est voir cet argent atterrir sur son compte sans attendre des plombes. Aujourd'hui, dénicher un est devenu le critère numéro un pour les joueurs qui ne veulent plus subir les délais bancaires d'un autre âge. Mais attention, la vitesse ne doit jamais se faire au détriment de la sécurité. Les plateformes sérieuses ont mis en place des systèmes de protection qui bossent en coulisses pour que chaque transfert soit aussi blindé qu'un coffre de banque, tout en restant instantané. ## La technologie au service du cash-out instantané Si les délais de paiement ont fondu comme neige au soleil, ce n'est pas par magie. Les opérateurs utilisent désormais des protocoles de validation automatisés. Fini l'époque où un agent devait valider manuellement chaque petite transaction le lundi matin. Grâce à l'intelligence artificielle et aux API bancaires modernes, le système vérifie en quelques millisecondes que tout est en ordre. Voici ce qui permet concrètement d'accélérer la cadence : * Les portefeuilles électroniques comme Skrill ou Neteller qui traitent les flux en temps réel. * L'adoption massive des cryptomonnaies pour une transparence totale sans intermédiaires. * Les virements instantanés (Instant Banking) qui shuntent les délais classiques du réseau Swift. * La pré-vérification des comptes (KYC) qui permet de valider votre identité une bonne fois pour toutes avant même que vous demandiez un retrait. ## Un bouclier invisible contre la fraude et le piratage Vous vous demandez peut-être si cette rapidité ne cache pas des failles de sécurité. En réalité, c'est tout l'inverse. Pour garantir des paiements immédiats, les plateformes doivent montrer patte blanche aux régulateurs. Elles utilisent un chiffrement SSL de bout en bout, le même standard que votre application bancaire préférée. Cela signifie que vos coordonnées financières sont transformées en une suite de caractères indéchiffrables pour n'importe quel hacker qui tenterait d'intercepter le signal. ### L'importance de la double authentification La rapidité, c'est bien, mais garder le contrôle sur son solde, c'est mieux. La plupart des sites de confiance imposent maintenant la double authentification (2FA). Même si quelqu'un arrivait à choper vos identifiants, il ne pourrait pas vider votre compte sans le code reçu sur votre téléphone. C'est le combo parfait pour dormir sur ses deux oreilles tout en profitant de ses gains quelques minutes après avoir cliqué sur retirer. ## Conclusion : le futur du jeu passe par la confiance Le marché a pigé le message : les joueurs veulent de la fluidité. Les plateformes qui dominent aujourd'hui sont celles qui ont compris que la fidélité se gagne sur le bouton de retrait. En combinant des algorithmes de détection de fraude ultra-performants et des partenariats avec des banques agiles, le secteur a réussi à transformer ce qui était autrefois une corvée administrative en une expérience simple et sans stress.

Executive Summary Google is expanding the public preview of its AI-powered Fitbit personal health assistant to additional international markets, while also extending support to iOS devices. Initially launched in the United States in October, the Fitbit Coach experience is now becoming available to Fitbit Premium subscribers in the United Kingdom, Canada, Australia, New Zealand, and Singapore. The expansion represents a strategic step in Google’s broader AI integration roadmap, leveraging Gemini-powered intelligence to enhance personalized health, fitness, and wellness guidance across its wearable ecosystem. Key Developments International Expansion: UK, Canada, Australia, New Zealand, Singapore Platform Expansion: Now available on iOS (previously Android-only) Subscription Requirement: Fitbit Premium Device Requirement: Compatible Fitbit smartwatch, tracker, or Pixel Watch Rollout Timeline: Gradual rollout over the coming weeks The preview remains optional, allowing users to switch between the legacy and redesigned app experience. Technical Overview Fitbit Coach is powered by Google’s Gemini AI framework and is designed to function as: A digital fitness trainer A sleep performance advisor A holistic health and wellness guide During onboarding, users complete a 5–10 minute conversational setup detailing goals, fitness level, equipment access, and personal preferences. The AI then generates adaptive training plans that adjust dynamically based on real-time biometric data and activity performance. The redesigned Fitbit app now features: Today Tab: Daily overview Fitness Tab: Personalized plans, exercise targets, and performance metrics Sleep Tab: Deep analytics with AI-driven pattern detection Health Tab: Vitals including heart rate variability, SpO2, breathing rate, and skin temperature variation AI-Driven Personalization: A New Health Interface Fitbit Coach supports natural language prompts such as: “Create a 30-minute upper body workout I can do in my hotel room.” “What can I do to get more deep sleep?” “How is my cardio load impacting my sleep quality?” The system analyzes ongoing performance data—such as step counts, cardio load, and sleep cycles—to refine recommendations in near real time. This marks a shift from static workout libraries toward adaptive AI-driven coaching, blurring the line between wearable tracking and intelligent health advisory. Strategic Analysis This expansion reflects Google’s ambition to integrate AI more deeply into consumer health platforms. By embedding Gemini into Fitbit’s ecosystem, the company is: Increasing the value proposition of Fitbit Premium subscriptions Strengthening cross-platform ecosystem cohesion (Android + iOS) Elevating wearables from passive trackers to proactive advisors The iOS launch is particularly notable. Supporting Apple users signals Google’s willingness to compete for health data engagement beyond its own operating system boundaries. Competitive Landscape The AI-powered fitness coaching space is becoming increasingly competitive, with major technology players integrating intelligent health features into wearable platforms. Google’s advantage lies in: Advanced AI infrastructure (Gemini integration) Cross-device data aggregation Strong hardware ecosystem including Pixel Watch and Fitbit devices By merging conversational AI with biometric insights, Google positions Fitbit Coach as more than a workout planner—it becomes a lifestyle optimization engine. Market Implications Subscription-based digital health services represent a high-margin growth opportunity. Expanding Fitbit Coach internationally: Broadens recurring revenue streams Enhances Premium subscriber retention Reinforces Google’s presence in the digital health economy As health and wellness increasingly intersect with AI-driven personalization, this rollout may strengthen Google’s long-term strategic foothold in preventive and performance-based health technology. Future Outlook If the preview proves successful, a full global launch could follow with deeper integrations such as: Advanced predictive health modeling Expanded AI sleep diagnostics Integration with broader Google AI services Long term, Fitbit Coach could evolve into a centralized AI health dashboard across multiple Google devices. Conclusion The international and iOS expansion of Fitbit Coach signals a meaningful evolution in AI-assisted health platforms. By combining conversational AI with real-time biometric tracking, Google is redefining the role of wearables in personal wellness management. As AI becomes increasingly embedded in consumer health ecosystems, Fitbit Coach may serve as an early blueprint for intelligent, adaptive digital healthcare experiences.

Source Cancer is one of the main causes of death worldwide, with approximately 20 million new cases and 9.7 million deaths registered in 2022. Taking into account the aging of the population and other risk factors such as our diet or environmental pollution, the incidence is increasing, with projections of 33 million new cases annually by 2050. That is why when one approaches the population at risk, any advance in the detection and cure of cancer is a great relief. >El cáncer es una de las principales causas de muerte a nivel mundial, con aproximadamente 20 millones de nuevos casos y 9,7 millones de muertes registradas en 2022. Teniendo en cuenta el envejecimiento de la población y otros factores de riesgo como nuestra alimentación o la contaminación del medio ambiente, la incidencia va en aumento, con proyecciones de 33 millones de nuevos casos anuales para 2050. Por eso cuando uno va acercándose a la población de riesgo cualquier avance en la detección y la cura del cáncer son un gran alivio. Along these lines, a team of researchers from Shenzhen University (China) has recently developed an ultrasensitive optical sensor that is capable of detecting cancer biomarkers (specifically microRNA such as miR-21, associated with lung cancer) at extremely low concentrations, which means that it can identify signs of cancer with just a few molecules in a drop of blood, long before visible tumors in images or symptoms related to the disease appear. >En esta línea, un equipo de investigadores de la Universidad de Shenzhen (China), ha desarrollado recientemente un sensor óptico ultrasensible que es capaz de detectar bio-marcadores de cáncer (específicamente microARN como miR-21, asociado al cáncer de pulmón) en concentraciones extremadamente bajas, lo que significa que puede identificar señales de cáncer con solo unas pocas moléculas en una gota de sangre, mucho antes de que aparezcan tumores visibles en imágenes o síntomas relativos a la enfermedad. Source The heart of the sensor is a nonlinear optical effect called second harmonic generation (SHG). This effect occurs when incident light (for example, a laser) interacts with a non-symmetrically centered material and generates new light at half the original wavelength (the "second harmonic"). In this case, SHG is produced specifically on the surface of molybdenum disulfide (MoS2), a two-dimensional semiconductor material, similar to graphene, but with unique optical and electronic properties. >El corazón del sensor es un efecto óptico no lineal llamado generación de segundo armónico (SHG, por sus siglas en inglés: Second Harmonic Generation). Este efecto ocurre cuando la luz incidente (por ejemplo, un láser) interactúa con un material no centrado simétricamente y genera luz nueva a la mitad de la longitud de onda original (el "segundo armónico"). En este caso, el SHG se produce específicamente en la superficie del disulfuro de molibdeno (MoS2), un material semiconductor bidimensional, similar al grafeno, pero con propiedades ópticas y electrónicas únicas. Scientists use DNA origami, a DNA self-assembly technique for creating precise nanostructures, to build small DNA pyramids or scaffolds that position the quantum dots at an exact and controlled distance on the MoS2 surface. The quantum dots are placed near the MoS2 to create highly efficient Förster resonance energy transfer (FRET) pathways. This greatly amplifies the SHG signal to make it 124 times stronger. They also incorporate a CRISPR system as a molecular switch that, when the target biomarker is present in the blood/plasma sample, allows its detection. >Los científicos usan DNA origami, una técnica de auto-ensamblaje de ADN para crear nano-estructuras precisa, para construir pequeñas pirámides o andamios de ADN que posicionan los quantum dots a una distancia exacta y controlada sobre la superficie de MoS2. Los quantum dots se colocan cerca del MoS2 para crear vías muy eficientes de transferencia de energía por resonancia de Förster (FRET). Esto amplifica enormemente la señal SHG hasta hacerla 124 veces más intensa. Además incorporan un sistema CRISPR como interruptor molecular que, cuando el biomarcador objetivo está presente en la muestra de sangre/plasma, permite su detección. Source In tests with real clinical samples from lung cancer patients, it outperformed previously used methods. The main advantage of this technology is its potential simplicity, since it only requires a small blood sample and an optical device (laser + detector), without the need for PCR amplification or massive sequencing. It could even be used in broader applications since it could be adapted to other biomarkers, viruses, bacteria or toxins as it is programmable with CRISPR. >En pruebas con muestras clínicas reales de pacientes con cáncer de pulmón, superó en rendimiento a métodos utilizados anteriormente. La ventaja principal de esta tecnología es su simplicidad potencial, ya que solo requiere una pequeña muestra de sangre y un dispositivo óptico (láser + detector), sin necesidad de amplificación PCR ni secuenciación masiva. Incluso podría utilizarse en aplicaciones más amplias ya que podría adaptarse a otros bio-marcadores, virus, bacterias o toxinas al ser programable con CRISPR. But we have to be cautious and not throw the bells in the air, for the moment it is a laboratory advance with tests on clinical samples, but large-scale trials have not been carried out or approved for clinical use. More validation, multicenter studies and miniaturization are still necessary to make it a routine test. In any case, this is one of the most promising advances of 2026 in early detection of cancer via liquid biopsy, so it is only a matter of time before this reaches the general public. >Pero hemos de ser prudentes y no lanzar las campanas al vuelo, por el momento se trata de un avance de laboratorio con pruebas en muestras clínicas, pero no se han hecho ensayos a gran escala ni aprobado para uso clínico. Todavía son necesarias más validaciones, estudios multicéntricos y miniaturización para convertirlo en un test rutinario. De cualquier forma, se trata de uno de los avances más prometedores de 2026 en detección precoz de cáncer vía biopsia líquida, así que es solo cuestión de tiempo que esto llegue al gran púbico. Assalamualaikum! After I finished my morning routine, I prayed Fajr, recited the Holy Quran, and then I was feeling very heavy. I went to the lawn because after Suhoor, the weather becomes so much cooler and calmer. So I walked there for a long time. When we walk, when we look at the greenery everywhere, it looks even more beautiful. The air in the greenery is even better. These bright yellow MariGold flowers are very beautiful everywhere in the garden. They spread themselves spontaneously. Their soft petals are visible above the green leaves towards the shining sun. If you look closely at their leaves, there are fine lines inside them. It is so beautiful. Seeing this, you realize that all the things that Allah Almighty has created in this world, be they flowers or anything else, are created with such beauty. There is so much attraction in these things. They are planted cleanly in the soil, which becomes fresh from all sides. They look colorful. Wherever there are many flowers in the greenhouse, that place becomes very beautiful from all sides. This is a flower that has color on it. When these colorful flowers bloom in the greenery, that place becomes even more beautiful. As they grow, these flowers become even more beautiful and their beauty becomes even more enjoyable. And when the sunlight falls on them, these flowers become even more beautiful and shiny. Just like a rose has its own delicious, sweet fragrance, I don't think this flower has any fragrance, but when butterflies sit on it, they look even more beautiful. The petals are also of many colors, and when they fly and sit on these flowers, everything becomes very beautiful. When the wind blows, they also sway. And if you look at these small plants on which these beautiful flowers grow, these plants are also so beautiful. When this happens, the garden begins to grow even better. The more care we give it, the healthier and more beautiful it becomes. Greenery spreads everywhere and feels very fresh and calming. When colorful flowers and plants bloom, the garden looks even more attractive. --- I often look closely at the plants and notice the fine lines on their leaves. Sometimes I stop and think about how wonderful it is that Allah has created such small things with so much beauty. Each leaf and flower shows His creativity and brings peace to my heart. ***

### আশাকরি " আমার বাংলা ব্লগ " পরিবারের সবাই ভালো আছেন। আশাকরি মহান সৃষ্টিকর্তার কৃপায় আপনারা সবাই সুস্থ আছেন। মহান সৃষ্টিকর্তা এবং আপনাদের আশীর্বাদে আমিও সুস্থ আছি। আজ আপনি আপনাদের সাথে অসভ্য শ্রেণীর লোক সম্পর্কে একটি জেনারেল রাইটিং পোস্ট করলাম। এই পৃথিবীতে যারা অসভ্য শ্রেণীর মানুষ তাদের দেখলে এবং তাদের কথাবার্তা শুনলে আপনি বুঝতে পারবেন যে তারা কতটা অসভ্য। একটা জিনিস আপনাকে সব সময় মনে রাখতে হবে যে এই পৃথিবীতে আপনি যদি এই অসভ্য শ্রেণীর লোকেদের পাল্লায় একবার পড়ে যান তাহলে কিন্তু আপনি সেখান থেকে ভালোভাবে নিস্তার পেতে পারবেন না। অর্থ তারা বিভিন্নভাবে আপনার ক্ষতি করার চেষ্টা করবে এবং আপনার এই ক্ষতি করার ফলে কিন্তু তারা সব সময় অনেক বেশি আনন্দ পেয়ে থাকবে। একটা জিনিস আপনাকে সবসময় মনে রাখতে হবে যে অসভ্য শ্রেণীর মানুষের সঙ্গে যখন আপনি মেলামেশা করবেন তখন তাদের সেই খারাপ আচরণগুলো আপনি আস্তে আস্তে শিখে সেগুলো আপনি নিজের জীবনে দেখতে পাবেন। অর্থাৎ এই পৃথিবীতে যেমন ভালো মানুষের সাথে মেলামেশা করলে বিভিন্ন ধরনের ভালো জিনিসপত্র শেখা যায় এবং সেগুলো বাস্তব জীবনে প্রয়োগ করা যায় ঠিক তেমনি ‘이 별에 필요한‘은 2023년에 공개된 한국 애니메이션으로, 익숙한 서울의 도시 풍경에 가까운 미래의 설정을 살짝 얹은 작품이다. 감독은 이 작품을 통해 거창한 사건보다는, 각자의 자리에서 불안과 상처를 안고 살아가는 인물들의 일상과 선택을 그리고자 했다고 한다. “이 별에서 나는 어떤 존재인가”라는 질문을 아주 무겁지 않게, 하지만 분명하게 던지는 방식이다. 배경이 되는 서울은 지금의 모습과 크게 다르지 않지만, 미래적인 요소들이 자연스럽게 섞여 있어 보는 재미가 있었다. 현실과 미래의 경계가 흐릿하게 이어지면서, 이 이야기가 아주 먼 얘기처럼 느껴지지 않는다. 한국어 성우로는 김태리, 홍경이 참여해 공개 전부터 화제가 되기도 했다고 한다. 나도 언뜻 광고를 보고 싶다고 생각했던 듯 하다. 직접 보고 나서 가장 좋았던 건 역시 배경 설정이었다. 익숙한 서울 풍경에 미래의 분위기가 더해지니 보는 내내 편하면서도 신선했다. 예전같으면 저런 모습이 과연? 이라고 생각했겠지만, 이젠 그리 멀지 않은 미래처럼 느껴진다. 일본 애니에서 일본의 풍경을 멋스럽게 담아내는 게 부러웠는데, 이 작품에선 그걸 원없이 보여주는 듯도 했다. 주인공들의 작화는 솔직히 아주 인상적이진 않아서 처음엔 살짝 아쉽기도 했지만, 보다 보니 그 평범함 덕분에 이야기에 더 집중하게 되기도 했다. 이 작품은 누군가를 극적으로 구원하기보다는, 각자의 아픔을 안고도 그래도 꿈을 향해 가보려는 사람들의 이야기를 담담하게 보여준다. 서로를 완전히 이해하지는 못해도, 옆에서 응원해주는 존재가 있다는 게 꽤 따뜻하게 다가온다. 음악도 좋았다. 한국어 성우 연기에 대해 여러 의견이 있는 건 알고 있어서, 영어, 일본어 더빙 버전도 궁금해졌다. 개인적으로는 김태리, 홍경의 연기가 이 작품 분위기와 잘 어울린다고 느꼈다. 힘을 빼고, 눌러 담은 톤이 오히려 캐릭터에 잘 맞게 느껴졌다. 그냥 틀어놔야지 하며 선택했는데, 눈을 뗄 수 없이 꽤 열심히 봤다. 담엔 영어, 일어 성우 버전도 봐야겠다.

There’s something magical about turning a modest balcony into an impromptu birdwatching station. When the city’s hustle fades into the background and the sun drifts lazily across the sky, my terrace transforms into a tiny aviary, welcoming an eclectic cast of feathered guests. If you’re curious about inviting nature’s winged travelers to your own rooftop retreat, here’s a glimpse into the simple pleasures—and a few practical tips—to make the most of those unexpected visits. 1. A Warm Welcome: Setting the Stage The first step is creating an environment that feels safe and inviting. A shallow bird feeder filled with mixed seeds (sunflower, millet, and cracked corn) works wonders, especially during the cooler months when natural food sources dwindle. I’ve learned that placing the feeder about a foot off the terrace rail reduces the risk of wind‑blown spillage while keeping the birds within easy sight. A modest water dish—refilled daily—adds an extra incentive. Even a small puddle can become a magnet for swallows, finches, and the occasional hummingbird that darts in for a quick sip before resuming its aerial ballet. 2. The Cast of Characters Over the past year, I’ve catalogued more than a dozen species that have made my terrace a stop‑over point: House Sparrow – The ever‑present socialite, often arriving in lively flocks. European Starling – Recognizable by its iridescent sheen, they love to perch on railing edges. Common Blackbird – A solitary singer, its mellow warble adds a melodic backdrop. Eurasian Collared‑Dove – With a soft “coo‑coo,” it brings a gentle rhythm to the afternoon. Garden Warbler – A rarer guest, its plaintive song signals the arrival of spring. Each visit feels like a brief, intimate performance. I keep a small notebook nearby, noting arrival times, weather conditions, and any unusual behaviors. Over time, patterns emerge—some birds prefer early mornings, while others linger after sunset. 3. Observational Etiquette Respect is essential. Keep movements slow and avoid sudden gestures that could startle a perched bird. If a curious sparrow hops onto the railing, let it explore; the goal isn’t to capture but to observe. A pair of binoculars mounted on a flexible tripod allows close scrutiny without intrusion, and a smartphone camera with a telephoto lens can gently document those fleeting moments. 4. Seasonal Shifts and What They Teach Us Winter brings a surge of seed‑hungry visitors, while spring heralds a chorus of songbirds returning from migration. In autumn, resident species become more vocal, defending territory before the colder months. By noting these seasonal shifts, you’ll develop an intuitive sense of your terrace’s ecological rhythm, turning everyday observation into a mini‑study of avian behavior. 5. The Unexpected Benefits Beyond sheer enjoyment, the terrace birds inadvertently improve the micro‑environment. Their foraging reduces pest insects, and the occasional droppings, though a minor nuisance, fertilize the potted herbs I keep nearby. Moreover, the daily sight of a flitting finch or a perched thrush offers a quiet reminder to pause, breathe, and appreciate the small miracles that unfold right above our heads. In Closing Inviting birds onto your terrace need not require elaborate landscaping or exotic plant collections. A few seed jars, fresh water, and a patient eye are all it takes to open a portal to the avian world. As the seasons turn, you’ll find yourself sharing your rooftop with a rotating cast of winged strangers—each visit a brief, beautiful conversation between city life and wild nature. So, step out onto your balcony, spread a handful of seeds, and let the feathered guests write their own stories across your sky. ***

In the innocence of childhood, we often believe the world is as beautiful as our dreams. My name is Hasnat, and today I am going to share a truth from my life that will perhaps remain a burden on my heart forever. ... Bachpan ki masoomiyat mein humein lagta hai ke duniya sirf khuwabon ki tarah haseen hai. Mera naam Hasnat hai, aur aaj main aapko apni zindagi ki wo sachai batane ja raha hoon jo shayad mere dil par hamesha ek bojh rahegi. .... A Pure Beginning / Wo Masoom Shuruwat ​My story began when I was just a 12-year-old schoolboy. I came from an ordinary middle-class family, but I always felt there was something different about me. Back then, I noticed girls glancing at me, and in my childish pride, I thought I was quite "cute." The truth was, I had no interest in anyone... until Alina walked into my life. .... Meri kahani tab shuru hui jab main sirf 12 saal ka ek school jane wala ladka tha. Main ek aam middle-class gharane se tha, lekin mujhe hamesha lagta tha ke mujh mein kuch alag hai. School mein ladkiyon ka mujhe dekhna aur mera khud ko "cute" samajhna, ye sab ek bachpan ka gharoor tha. Sach toh ye hai ke mujhe kisi ladki mein koi dilchaspi nahi thi... jab tak Alina meri zindagi mein nahi aayi. ..... Love at First Sight / Pehli Nazar ki Mohabbat ​Alina was the new girl at school. The moment I saw her, my heart skipped a beat for the very first time. After months of hesitation, I finally gathered the courage to speak: "Alina, I want to talk to you... I have fallen in love with you." When she smiled and confessed her feelings, I felt like I had conquered the world. ..... Alina hamare school mein nayi aayi thi. Use dekh kar pehli baar mere dil ki dharkan tez hui. Kuch mahine darte aur sochte guzar gaye, phir ek din maine himmat ki aur us se keh diya: "Alina, main tum se baat karna chahta hoon... mujhe tum se pyar ho gaya hai." Jab wo hasi aur usne kaha ke wo bhi mujh se pyar karti hai, toh mujhe laga maine duniya jeet li hai. .... 8 Years and a Fatal Mistake / 8 Saal ka Safar aur Ek Galti Our relationship lasted for eight long years. But I made one mistake; I didn't take admission in her college. Little did I know that this distance would eventually create gaps in our hearts. Eventually, I asked her to marry me, and she agreed to let me send a formal proposal. ​Hamara ye rishta 8 saal tak chala. Lekin college mein maine ek galti ki; maine uske college mein admission nahi liya. Mujhe kya pata tha ke yahi doori hamare darmiyan fasle paida kar degi. Aakhir-kar, maine us se shadi ka pucha aur wo maan gayi ke main apne ghar walon ko mangni ka rishta lekar bhejoon. ... Mansions and Shattered Dreams / Mahal aur Shishe ke Khuwab ​I went to her house with my father, but I was stunned. It wasn't a house; it was a palace filled with luxury cars. My father spoke with hope: "Our children love each other, let’s unite them." But her father's arrogant laughter cut through my soul. He said: "Have you lost your mind? You middle-class people only want money. Look at your status before bringing a proposal to my palace!" .... Main apne walid ke sath khushi-khushi uske ghar gaya, lekin wahan pahunch kar mere hoosh ud gaye. Wo koi ghar nahi, ek mahal tha jahan luxury gaadiyan khari thin. Mere walid ne umeed se baat shuru ki: "Humara beta aur aap ki beti ek dusre ko pasand karte hain, kyun na is rishte ko naam de diya jaye." Lekin Alina ke baap ka qahqaha mere dil par khanjar ki tarah laga. Usne takabbur se kaha: "Tum pagal ho gaye ho? Tum middle-class log sirf paisa chahte ho. Mere mahal mein rishta lane se pehle apni auqat dekho!"

Let's be honest: erectile dysfunction hits hard. It starts as a physical issue—maybe erections aren't as firm or reliable as before—but quickly turns into something bigger. You start second-guessing yourself in the bedroom, pulling back from affection to avoid disappointment, and before long, that distance creeps into everyday moments with your partner. Laughter feels forced, touch feels tentative, and the confidence you once carried so easily begins to fade. Now imagine a treatment that uses nothing more than a sample of your own blood to help turn things around. No daily pills, no pumps, no surgery. Just a straightforward procedure that many men in the UK have used to regain firmness, sensitivity, and—crucially—the sense of self that makes relationships feel alive again. That's the reality for a lot of guys who've chosen the Priapus Shot, also known as the P Shot. If ED has been quietly chipping away at your life, this could be worth understanding. What the Priapus Shot Actually Involves The Priapus Shot (or P Shot) is a PRP-based treatment. PRP stands for platelet-rich plasma—basically, the part of your blood packed with growth factors that help tissues heal and regenerate. Here's the straightforward breakdown: - A small amount of blood is taken from your arm (like a normal blood test). - It's spun in a centrifuge to concentrate the PRP. - After numbing the area, the PRP is injected into targeted spots in the penis. The injections aim to boost blood flow, repair tissue, and wake up nerves. Over time, this can lead to stronger erections, better sensation, and improved overall function. In the UK, men often look for P Shot UK options, and in the capital, P shot London or Priapus Shot London clinics provide it in private, professional settings. It's carried out by qualified doctors who assess your suitability first—because not every case of ED responds the same way. Step-by-Step: What Happens on the Day The appointment is designed to be quick and low-stress—usually under 90 minutes total. - You start with a confidential consultation to talk through symptoms, health history, and what you're hoping to achieve. - Blood is drawn (quick and routine). - While the PRP is prepared, you wait comfortably. - Numbing cream or a local block is applied so the injections feel like little more than pressure. - The PRP goes in using fine needles for precision. - You're given aftercare advice and sent on your way—no hospital stay, no extended rest. Most men drive themselves home and carry on as normal. It's one of the least disruptive options out there. Real Benefits That Matter Most The physical improvements get the headlines—firmer erections, quicker response, heightened pleasure—but the deeper changes often mean more. ----------------------- আশা করছি যে আপনারা আপনাদের মূল্যবান মন্তব্যের মাধ্যমেই আমার এই লেখাটি সৌন্দর্য বৃদ্ধি করবেন এবং আপনাদের মতামত ব্যক্ত করবেন। আমি যদি কোনো কিছু ভুল বলে থাকি। তাহলে অবশ্যই আমাকে শুধরে দিতে ভুলবেন না। আমাদের জীবনে হঠাৎ করে কিছু কিছু ঝড়ঝাপটা চলে আসে। সেই ঝড়ঝাপটা গুলো সম্পর্কে হয়তো আমরা আগে থেকে অবগত থাকি না, কিংবা সেই ঝড়ঝাপটা গুলো সম্পর্কে হয়তো আমরা আসলে অনেক কিছুই বুঝতে পারি না কিংবা জানতে পারি না। ঠিক তেমনভাবেই কিছু কিছু মানুষ আমাদের গল্পের মতো করে শুরু হয়ে যায়। অর্থাৎ, কিছু কিছু উপন্যাস যেমন হুট করেই শুরু হয়, ঠিক তেমনভাবে কী করে যেন কিছু কিছু মানুষ আমাদের জীবনে পদার্পণ করে সেটা হয়তো আমরা আঁচ করতে পারি না। তাদের উপস্থিতির পরে, কিংবা আসলে তাদের উপস্থিতির অনেক পরেই আমরা বুঝতে পারি যে তারা আমাদের জীবনে এসেছে, কিংবা তারা আমাদের জীবনে জায়গা করে নিয়েছে। সেসব পরের কথা। আমি আজকে আসলে যে ব্যাপারটা নিয়ে কথা বলতে এসেছি, সেটা হলো তারা আমাদের জীবনে হুট করে যুক্ত হয়ে যায়, সেটা আসল ব্যাপার নয়। আসল ব্যাপার হলো, তারা আমাদের জীবনে যুক্ত হওয়ার পরে আসলে আমাদের জীবনটা অনেকটা আমাদের মনে হয় যেন আমরা একটা কল্পনার রাজ্য তৈরি করছি। যে কল্পনার রাজ্যে আমরা আর তারা ছাড়া যেন পৃথিবীতে আর কেউ থাকে না অর্থাৎ, আর কারো কোনো অস্তিত্ব নেই। কারণ, আমরা আসলে নিজেদের মধ্যেই এতটা ডুবে যাই। কিন্তু তার বিপরীতে, আসলে আমরা যখন দেখি যে ওই মানুষটি আমাদের জীবনে গল্পটা শুরু করলেও, শেষ গল্পটিতে আর সে থাকে না শেষ পাতাতে তার উপস্থিতি আর টের পাওয়া যায় না। সে শুধুমাত্র আমাদের জীবনে এসে একটা সুখের পরশপাথর বুলিয়ে দিয়ে কখন যে চলে যায়, সেটা যেন আমরা বুঝতেই পারি না, টের পাই না। অর্থাৎ, তারা শুরুতে থাকে, কিন্তু শেষে থাকে শুধুমাত্র আমাদের যন্ত্রণা, একাকীত্ব এবং আসলে মিস করা। অর্থাৎ, ওই মানুষগুলো আমাদের ছেড়ে চলে যায় ঠিকই, কিন্তু আমরা তাদের অস্তিত্ব কখনোই ভুলে যেতে পারি না। এবং তার চলে যাওয়ার সাথে সাথে আমাদের জীবনে নেমে আসে একরাশ দুঃখ। আর সব মিলিয়ে গল্পের শেষে শুধুমাত্র আমরা একা দাঁড়িয়ে থাকি ওই মানুষটির পথ চেয়ে, কিন্তু সেই মানুষটি কখনোই আর ফিরে আসে না।

Strony takie jak **SMH Markets** potrafią wyglądać bardzo „poważnie”. Logo, wykresy, panel transakcyjny, obietnice zysków. Z zewnątrz to przypomina legalną platformę inwestycyjną. Tylko że **pozory mogą mylić**. Platforma działa poprzez kilka powiązanych adresów: * **** * **** * **** Kilka domen i subdomen to dziś standard w przypadku wielu stron. Ale tutaj pojawia się kluczowy element: **brak jasnych informacji, kto za tym stoi i na jakich zasadach to działa**. --- ## Struktura strony i panele – szybki przegląd Na powyższych domenach znaleźć można: * stronę główną z informacjami o usługach, * panel klienta i terminal transakcyjny, * logowanie użytkownika na różnych adresach. Taki podział może wyglądać profesjonalnie, ale w realnym świecie oznacza czasem **utratę przejrzystości**. Trudno wtedy jednoznacznie przypisać odpowiedzialność i łatwo pogubić się, kiedy trzeba wyegzekwować swoje prawa. --- ## Co użytkownicy zgłaszają Osoby, które miały styczność z platformami o podobnej strukturze, opisują bardzo zbliżone scenariusze: 1. **Intensywny kontakt na początku.** Konsultant dzwoni, pomaga założyć konto, zachęca do wpłaty. 2. **Szybkie „wyniki” w panelu.** Po wpłacie saldo rośnie – wygląda to jak realne zyski. 3. **Nowe prośby o wpłaty.** Im więcej wpłacisz, tym większe „wyniki” widzisz. 4. **Problemy z wypłatą.** Kiedy prosisz o przelew pieniędzy na swoje konto, pojawiają się różne preteksty: dodatkowa opłata, podatek, weryfikacja. 5. **Cisza lub zmiana komunikacji.** Po odrzuceniu kolejnej prośby o wpłatę kontakt znika. Brzmi znajomo? Niestety to schemat, który powtarza się w wielu projektach o wątpliwej reputacji. --- ## Regulacje i status prawny Legalny broker powinien: * jasno pokazywać, kto go prowadzi (nazwa spółki, adres, dane rejestrowe), * mieć licencję od uznanego regulatora (KNF, FCA, CySEC, BaFin), * mieć procedury reklamacyjne i mechanizmy ochrony klientów. W przypadku **SMH Markets** **nie ma publicznie dostępnych informacji o takich regulacjach**. Brak licencji oznacza, że: * brak jest oficjalnego nadzoru nad platformą, * środki klientów nie są objęte ochroną, * inwestor nie ma standardowej drogi reklamacyjnej. To nie oznacza automatycznie oszustwa, ale **znacząco podnosi ryzyko utraty środków**. --- ## Jeśli już wpłaciłeś środki W takim przypadku ważne jest: * **nie wykonywać kolejnych wpłat pod presją**, * **zabezpieczyć wszystkie dowody**: potwierdzenia przelewów, e-maile, zrzuty ekranu z panelu, historię komunikacji, * nie działać pod wpływem emocji – to prowadzi do dalszych strat. Najgorsze, co możesz zrobić, to wysyłać kolejne pieniądze tylko dlatego, że ktoś mówi, że „wtedy wypłata będzie możliwa”. --- ## Co ma sens zamiast kolejnych wpłat W podobnych sytuacjach rozsądne jest uporządkowanie całej dokumentacji i **zrozumienie, jakie masz realne opcje działania**. To nie zawsze oznacza natychmiastowy zwrot pieniędzy – często chodzi o: * ustalenie, czy doszło do naruszenia prawa, * zabezpieczenie wszystkich dowodów, * analizę, czy warto wszcząć sprawę karną lub cywilną. Możesz uzyskać **wstępne informacje i ukierunkowanie**, zanim podejmiesz jakikolwiek ruch, pod numerem: 📞 **722//359//640** To **kontakt informacyjny** — ktoś, kto pomoże Ci uporządkować sytuację i zobaczyć, jakie masz możliwości, a nie obietnica szybkiego zwrotu pieniędzy. --- ## Podsumowanie Platforma **SMH Markets** i jej powiązane adresy: * działają bez jasnej informacji o regulacji, * wyglądają jak profesjonalna usługa, ale brak przejrzystości to duże ryzyko, * model działania przypomina schematy znane z portali wysokiego ryzyka. Zanim wykonasz kolejny przelew, zatrzymaj się i zastanów: **czy to, co widzisz na ekranie, ma realne pokrycie, czy jest tylko projekcją „zysków” na potrzeby panelu?**

#### #### _This is the English version of the post , originally published in Italian in the ITALY community._ From Norway to Salento. That is the route traveled over the last three days by **Inter** to fulfill its commitments in competitions such as the **Champions League** and the domestic league. Over 4,000 kilometers and two completely different locations, from geographical, environmental, scenic, and sporting perspectives. Yet Bodø and Lecce showed football fans around the world an incredible common trait: intolerance toward the presence on the pitch of **Alessandro Bastoni**, the **Inter** defender guilty of blatantly simulating during the match at San Siro between his team and **Juventus**. From north of the Arctic Circle to the south of Italy, supporters seem to agree on one fundamental point: there should be no room in football for people like **Bastoni**. Deafening whistles accompanied every touch by the Nerazzurri defender, and the same scenario will likely repeat itself in every stadium where he sets foot to kick a ball. Some rumors suggest that for the twenty-eighth matchday derby, **Milan** fans are organizing a large choreography centered precisely on the unsporting conduct embodied in **Bastoni**’s gesture and, more broadly, in the colors of **Inter**. In short, in Italian stadiums and among various supporter groups, a “popular sentiment” of indignation and rejection is growing, directed primarily at the Nerazzurri defender and secondarily at the shirt he represents. A sort of re-edition of what happened with Calciopoli, but with a profound difference: this time it has not been fueled by the press or partisan narratives, but has arisen spontaneously on the wave of established and incontrovertible facts. But rest assured, although some similarities can be seen (and in my modest opinion there would be a thousand justified reasons), a new Calciopoli does not seem to be on the horizon. This time institutional power is entirely aligned with the “enemies” of the footballing people, as is the media. Did you hear how the **Dazn** studio (previous video) disgracefully pretended to be surprised by the whistles at the **Via del Mare**? Previously, the general narrative was that **Juventus** stole and that the public and courageous outlets had helped bring the wrongdoing of the Moggi system to light. The year 2026 has brought us to a fascinating crossroads in software engineering. If you take a stroll through the latest tech forums or scroll through Steemit’s dev community, you will notice a recurring theme: everyone is using AI to build, but fewer people are certain about what they are actually shipping. We have entered the era of high-speed generation, where the friction between an idea and a functioning prototype has practically vanished. However, as we lean more heavily into automated assistants, we are discovering a silent truth that every seasoned developer knows in their gut: AI can write code, but it is physically and logically incapable of "feeling" when that code is bad. ## The Illusion of Perfection: AI vs. Human Code Quality At first glance, AI-generated snippets look immaculate. They are perfectly indented, use modern syntax, and often come with helpful comments. But if you look deeper, the cracks begin to show. A recent 2026 study highlighted a staggering reality in the debate: while AI can increase pull request volume by over 20%, the number of incidents per pull request has actually spiked by nearly 24%. The problem is not that the AI is "stupid." It is that AI lacks the sensory perception of a developer who has lived through a 3 AM production crash. When we talk about human-authored vs. synthetic code, we are really talking about the difference between statistical probability and architectural intent. AI predicts the next token; humans predict the next three years of maintenance. Because AI does not have to maintain the systems it builds, it doesn’t "feel" the weight of a 500-line function or the looming shadow of a poorly implemented dependency. ### The Rise of Vibe Coding This shift in how we build has birthed a new phenomenon known as . Coined back in early 2025 and matured today, vibe coding is the practice of describing a desired outcome in plain English and letting the AI handle the implementation details without the developer ever fully peering under the hood. It’s "vibing" with the output rather than verifying the logic. While this is incredible for rapid prototyping, it creates a dangerous disconnect. When you are vibe coding, you are prioritizing the "what" over the "how." For a simple landing page, that is fine. But for complex , relying purely on vibes is like building a skyscraper on a foundation of sand just because the lobby looks pretty. ## Facing the Reality of AI Coding Limitations If you have ever tried to use an LLM to refactor a massive legacy codebase, you have run right into AI coding limitations. AI struggles with "local context." It might suggest a brilliant fix for a single file while inadvertently breaking three other modules it didn't "see" in its context window. The limitations aren't just about logic errors; they are about empathy for the future self. AI doesn't care if a variable name is slightly ambiguous or if a module violates the "." It is just trying to satisfy your prompt. This lack of "taste" is precisely why the AI vs. Human code quality gap remains wide. Humans possess a biological alarm system, a literal "feeling" of unease, when they see a "God Object" or a deeply nested loop that they know will be a nightmare to debug later. ## Technical Debt in AI-Assisted Programming We are currently seeing a global explosion of technical debt in AI-assisted programming. Because AI makes it so easy to generate code, developers are tempted to "copy-paste" their way to a finished product. Recent reports from 2025 and 2026 indicate that code duplication has increased nearly eightfold since the widespread adoption of AI agents. This isn't just "messy" code; it’s a financial liability. Gartner estimates that nearly 40% of IT budgets are now swallowed by the cost of dealing with technical debt. When AI generates code, it often follows "textbook" patterns that aren't tailored to your specific infrastructure. It solves the immediate problem but leaves behind a trail of "fragile" code that is too rigid to change and too bloated to run efficiently. The comparison of AI vs. human code quality often fails here because the debt is hidden until the system needs to scale. ## Why AI Generated Code Needs Human Oversight The industry is slowly waking up to the fact that acceleration without steering is just a faster way to crash. This is why AI generated code needs human oversight. We need humans not just to check for syntax errors, but to provide the "architectural soul" that machines lack. A human reviewer asks: "Does this align with our long-term goals?" "Is this secure?" "Will a junior dev be able to understand this in six months?" AI doesn't ask those questions because it doesn't exist in time. It exists in a static snapshot of training data. When it comes to code quality, the human’s role has shifted from being a "writer" to being a "curator" and a "guardian." ### The Importance of a Rigorous Code Review This brings us to the most critical stage of the modern workflow: the code review. In 2026, a is no longer just about catching typos; it’s a deep audit of architectural integrity. Experts in the field, such as the team at Jhavtech Studios, have seen this firsthand. In a recent analysis of over 200 applications, Jhavtech identified that "code smells" appear more frequently in projects that rely too heavily on automated generation without professional intervention. Their findings suggest that while AI can deliver speed, only a disciplined human-led review can ensure a project doesn't become a "software rescue" case later on. For businesses, this means the difference between a successful launch and a project that stalls because it’s too "brittle" to scale. The AI vs. human code quality gap is most visible when these reviews are skipped. ## Software Architecture in the Age of AI As we look toward the future, the definition of a "great developer" is changing. It is no longer about who can memorize the most APIs or write the fastest C++ loops. It’s about software architecture in the age of AI. The developers who will thrive are those who can leverage AI as a high-powered engine while remaining the master architects of the system. They understand that AI vs. human code quality is a collaborative metric. You use the AI to handle the boilerplate and the repetitive "scaffolding," but you reserve the high-level decision-making for yourself. You ensure that the balance stays in favor of the human by setting the constraints, defining the boundaries, and refusing to accept "almost right" as "good enough." ### The Reality of Modern App Development In the realm of professional app development, the stakes are simply too high to leave the "vibes" in charge. Whether you are building a healthcare platform or a new DeFi protocol on Steemit, the code must be more than functional; it must be resilient. The data is clear: 45% of the world's code is now deemed "fragile." This fragility often stems from a lack of "human touch" in the initial build phases. As we've seen in the AI vs. human code quality metrics, AI-authored changes often result in 1.7x more issues than human-only contributions. This doesn't mean we should stop using AI; it means we should stop trusting it blindly. ## AI Coding Tools vs Developer Intuition [H2] This brings us to the heart of the matter: AI coding tools vs developer intuition. Intuition is not a mystical power; it is the subconscious synthesis of thousands of hours of failure and success. It is what tells a developer that while a piece of code works today, it is "smelly" and will break tomorrow. AI tools operate on patterns, but intuition operates on experience. When a developer looks at a piece of logic and feels a slight tension in their chest, that is "the feeling." AI tools can suggest five different ways to write a loop, but they cannot tell you which one feels "cleanest" in the context of your specific team's culture or your project's future. ## Finding the Balance for the Future So, where does that leave us? Are we doomed to a future of bloated, AI-generated "spaghetti" code? Not if we change our approach. We need to treat AI like a highly talented but incredibly literal intern. It can do the work, but it cannot be held responsible for the outcome. The goal is to reach a state where AI vs. human code quality isn't a competition, but a synergy. We use AI to eliminate the "drudgery" of coding so we have more mental space to focus on the "feeling" of the architecture. We need to stay "invested" in our codebases, much like the philosophy at Jhavtech Studios, where the focus is on sustainable performance rather than just "getting it done." ## Final Thoughts: The Heart in the Machine At the end of the day, code is a human language designed to solve human problems. AI can simulate the language, but it cannot truly understand the problem. It cannot "feel" the frustration of a user dealing with a slow interface, nor can it "feel" the pride of a perfectly elegant solution. As we continue to navigate the AI vs. human code quality landscape in 2026, let’s remember that the "vibe" that matters most isn't the one in the prompt—it's the one in the craftsmanship. Use the tools, embrace the speed, but never stop "feeling" your code.

ইকো পার্ক কিন্তু শুধু একটি আধুনিক বিনোদন কেন্দ্র নয়, এখানে প্রকৃতির সঙ্গে সঙ্গে শিল্প ও ইতিহাসের এক নীরব গল্পও চলে। গত একটি পোস্টে কিছু ভাস্কর্যের বিষয়ে বলেছিলাম। আজকেও কিছু ভাস্কর্য নিয়ে এসেছি এই ইকো পার্কের থেকে। এখানে এক নিরিবিলি কোণে দেখা মেলে কিছু এমন ভাস্কর্যের, যেগুলো প্রথম দেখায় চোখে পড়ে না, কিন্তু মনোযোগ দিয়ে তাকালে গভীর ভাবনার জন্ম দেয়। এইসব ভাস্কর্য আবার এমন যে একবার তাকালে দৃষ্টি আকর্ষণ নাও হতে পারে। কিন্তু এইসব ভাস্কর্যের মধ্যে অনেক বিষয় লুকিয়ে থাকে। এইসব অনেক অর্থবহুল। এখানে একটিতে স্তম্ভ ও পশুমুখের প্রতীকী রূপ তুলে ধরা হয়েছে। এখানে একটি পাথরের স্তম্ভ, যার শীর্ষদেশে দু’পাশে খোদাই করা রয়েছে পশুর মুখমন্ডল। মুখগুলো দেখলে কিছুটা ষাঁড় বা মেষজাতীয় প্রাণীর মতো মনে হবে, যা বহু প্রাচীন সভ্যতায় প্রতীক হিসেবে ব্যবহৃত হত। স্তম্ভের গঠন বেশ সরল হলেও উপরের অংশের খোদাই অত্যন্ত সূক্ষ্মভাবে করা। এরপরে মানবমুখ ও সাপ এর একটি ভাস্কর্য ফুটিয়ে তোলা হয়েছে, যা একটা রহস্যের প্রতীক হিসেবে ফুটে উঠেছে। তবে এটি বেশি দৃষ্টি আকর্ষণ করে থাকে। এখানে পাথরের উপর একটি মানবমুখ খোদাই করা, যার মাথার উপর একটি সাপ পেঁচিয়ে আছে। বেশ দারুণ একটা ভাস্কর্য খোদাই করেছে শিল্পী। নিখুঁত যাকে বলে।

***Steemian Friends,*** ***"Boro Sardar Bari"*** is a historic Landlord house located in the Sonargaon region of Narayanganj district of Bangladesh. It is an important monument of our country's history, architecture, and culture. The house was originally the residence of a wealthy zamindar family. It is believed that a local influential Landlord family built this house in the late 19th or early 20th century. "Sardar" was the surname of that family, so the house is called Boro Sardar Bari. Every day, domestic and foreign tourists come to see the "Boro Sardar Bari" landlord's house. Thumbnail Photo/In front of the "Baro Sardar Bari." Sonargaon was an important trade and administrative center during the Mughal period. From the Mughal period to the British period, the importance of this region was very high. The landlords usually built their houses with large buildings, ponds, gardens, and guest houses. The Baro Sardar Bari was also built in the same way. It had a huge palace-like building, beautiful arched doors, designed windows, and an open courtyard around it. These architectural features reveal the artistic taste and technical skill of the time. The "Baro Sardar Bari" monument can be seen by purchasing a ticket with 14 Steem every day from 9.00 am to 5.00 pm. "Big Sardar's House" seen from across the pond "Baro Sardar Bari." The landlord's house is two-storeyed. The beautiful house has 70-80 rooms. The house is surrounded by greenery, a large pond, a garden, a seating area for tourists, and intricately carved walls. The signs of the house show the aristocratic life of the zamindars of that time. After the partition of India in 1947, the Landlord system was abolished. Since then, the value of the landlord's house has been decreasing. Later, after the independence of Bangladesh, the house was renovated by the Archaeological Department of Bangladesh. "Big Sardar's house" with a pond Sonargaon was once the capital of Bengal. It is a vast area and the residence of the kings of Bengal. Tourists come to see the old buildings of the kings and visit this house of the landlord. Here, the traditions of the farmers and rural crafts of Bangladesh are kept as a museum. Every year, for a month, a craft fair is held with entrepreneurs from different parts of our country. "Big Sardar's House" in a green ceremony Sonargaon was once the commercial center of Bengal. At that time, the landlords ruled Bangladesh from their houses. Inside the house, the belongings used by the landlords are kept. In front of the house, there is a pond used by the landlords. In front of the house, various types of agricultural-based signs indicate the landlord system. This is called the landlord's house of Isha Khan. "Boro Sardar Bari" with wall carvings I visit the Zamindar house every year during the craft fair. I could not record a video because I went to see the landlord's house last year. Every year, when the fair is held to showcase the traditions of our country, numerous tourists from different parts of the country come here. This winter I experienced a surprise that I did not expect. While I was walking along the forest path, when the ground is hard and the frost is hard underfoot, I saw a familiar form - the martin Infundibulicybe geotropa. The primrose (Infundibulicybe geotropa) sprouted even in the middle of winter, defying the cold and the season.I was used to seeing it in the fall, when the leaves rustled underfoot, but now the scene was different. Around me, the trees stood bare, without their crowns full of leaves, and the ground was covered with a thin layer of frost. Yet, from that cold earth, its bright caps peeked out, like little lefties turned to the sky.I moved closer and crouched down to get a better look. Her hat was wide and slightly concave in the middle, just as I remembered from previous seasons.And then I struggled a bit to take a close-up picture of it.

**আসসালামু আলাইকুম,** **বন্ধুরা আপনারা সবাই কেমন আছেন ? আশা করি সবাই খুব ভালো আছেন। আমিও আপনাদের দোয়ায় আল্লাহর রহমতে খুব ভালো আছি।** *প্রতিদিনের মতো আজকেও আমি আপনাদের সামনে আরো একটি নতুন পোস্ট নিয়ে হাজির হয়েছি। **আজকে আমি আপনাদের সাথে একটি ফটোগ্রাফি পোস্ট শেয়ার করবো**। ফটোগ্রাফি করতে আমি ভীষণ পছন্দ করি। তবে বেশিরভাগ সময় আমি ফুলের ফটোগ্রাফি ক্যাপচার করি। কারণ ফুল আমার খুবই পছন্দ এবং ফুলের ফটোগ্রাফি করতে আমার সবচেয়ে বেশি ভালো লাগে। তবে মাঝেমধ্যে ভিন্ন ধরনের কিছু ফটোগ্রাফি ক্যাপচার করার চেষ্টা করে থাকি। যেমন প্রাকৃতিক দৃশ্যের ফটোগ্রাফি করতে আমার খুব ভালো লাগে।* *যাইহোক **আজকে আমি ঢাকা আন্তর্জাতিক বাণিজ্য মেলা থেকে তোলা কিছু ফটোগ্রাফি শেয়ার করার চেষ্টা করবো ইনশাআল্লাহ**। আসলে মেলায় যেতে আমার বরাবরই খুব ভালো লাগে। তাছাড়া বাণিজ্য মেলায় বিদেশি অনেক স্টল থাকে বিধায়,বাণিজ্য মেলায় ঘুরাঘুরি করতে ভীষণ ভালো লাগে। বিভিন্ন স্টলে ঘুরাঘুরি করে প্রয়োজনীয় জিনিসপত্র কেনা যায়। সবমিলিয়ে দারুণ সময় কাটানো যায়। তো এবার বাণিজ্য মেলায় গিয়ে আমরা বেশ কয়েক ঘন্টা ঘুরাঘুরি করে অনেক কিছু কিনেছিলাম। পাশাপাশি আমি চেষ্টা করেছিলাম ফাঁকে ফাঁকে কিছু ফটোগ্রাফি ক্যাপচার করতে। যাইহোক ফটোগ্রাফি গুলো আপনাদের সাথে শেয়ার করতে যাচ্ছি। আশা করি আপনাদের কাছে খুব ভালো লাগবে।* ***বন্ধুরা আজকে এই পর্যন্তই। আপনাদের কাছে পোস্টটি কেমন লাগলো, তা কমেন্টে জানাতে ভুলবেন না। আবারো ইনশাআল্লাহ দেখা হবে অন্য কোনো পোস্টে। সেই পর্যন্ত ভালো থাকবেন,সুস্থ থাকবেন আল্লাহ হাফেজ।*** |বিষয়|ফটোগ্রাফি| |---|---| |ফটোগ্রাফার|@mohinahmed| |ডিভাইস|Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra| |তারিখ|২৩.২.২০২৬| |লোকেশন|পূর্বাচল,ঢাকা,বাংলাদেশ|

Executive Summary HP has quietly launched a consumer laptop rental program, allowing users to lease high-end gaming and business PCs for a monthly fee rather than purchasing them outright. The move comes amid rising hardware prices driven by RAM and SSD supply constraints, partly attributed to AI data center expansion. While the model offers flexibility and upgrade options, it also raises broader questions about ownership, long-term cost, and the future economics of personal computing. Key Developments Entry Price: Starting at $50 per month High-End Option: Up to $130 per month for premium gaming configurations Upgrade Path: Device swap permitted after 12 months Cancellation Fees: Significant penalties for early termination Ownership Model: Users never own the device Among the highlighted offerings are gaming systems such as the Omen Max 16 and Victus 15, alongside business-focused machines including the EliteBook and Pavilion series. Product and Pricing Overview HP’s rental catalog includes: Victus 15 with AMD Ryzen 7 and Nvidia RTX 4050 Omen Max 16 featuring Intel Core Ultra 9 and RTX 5080 graphics Business laptops like the EliteBook 6 G1q and HP Pavilion models For example, renting a top-tier gaming laptop at $120–$130 per month results in a total annual cost exceeding $1,400 before taxes and accessories. Over two years, users may approach or surpass the retail cost of certain configurations—without gaining ownership. Additional peripherals such as keyboards, mice, headsets, and monitors can be added for incremental monthly fees. Subscription Economics: The Hidden Trade-Off At first glance, monthly payments lower the barrier to entry for high-performance hardware. However, several structural considerations merit attention: Early Cancellation Fees: Users exiting before the 12-month term face substantial penalties. No Equity Accumulation: Unlike installment plans, payments do not convert into ownership. Return Obligations: Failure to return devices incurs significant additional charges. Data Privacy Concerns: Users must ensure full data wipes before returning leased machines. This mirrors broader subscription trends across streaming, software, and cloud services—where convenience often masks long-term cost accumulation. Strategic Analysis HP’s rental initiative likely responds to several converging pressures: Rising component prices driven by AI infrastructure demand Consumer resistance to higher upfront laptop costs Growing normalization of subscription-based consumption models By introducing leasing options, HP may be testing whether consumers are willing to prioritize short-term affordability over long-term ownership. Such a model also provides manufacturers with: Predictable recurring revenue Stronger customer retention Easier hardware upgrade cycles Competitive Landscape The broader PC market has witnessed escalating base prices. For instance, flagship ultrabooks from major manufacturers have seen year-over-year increases, reflecting both inflationary pressure and component shortages. If rental programs prove commercially viable, other manufacturers could follow suit—potentially transforming the PC industry into a hybrid ownership-subscription ecosystem. Market Implications The introduction of laptop leasing could signal a structural shift in consumer hardware access: Short-term affordability may expand adoption Long-term financial cost may rise Secondary resale markets may shrink Ownership culture may erode For enterprise environments, leasing has long been standard practice. The question now is whether consumer markets will embrace similar models. Future Outlook If component shortages persist and AI-driven infrastructure demand continues to pressure hardware supply chains, subscription-based PC access could become more common. However, widespread adoption depends on consumer psychology. Ownership remains a powerful value proposition—particularly for gaming enthusiasts and professional users who prioritize control, customization, and resale potential. The long-term trajectory may lead toward a bifurcated model: Premium ownership for high-control users Subscription access for short-term flexibility Conclusion HP’s laptop rental program represents more than a pricing experiment—it is a test case for the future structure of personal computing economics. While monthly leasing reduces upfront costs, it introduces contractual limitations and eliminates ownership equity. As PC prices continue to climb, consumers may soon face a fundamental choice: pay more upfront for ownership, or accept recurring payments for temporary access.
