Займалися ми з собаксами не зовсім звичайною справою - мили морозильний ларь. Ну тобто у цьому не було б нічого незвичайного, якби він стояв в будинку, а не в майстерні. А там рівно стільки градусів, скільки на вулиці. Але не помити його я не могла… Приватний будинок й купа тварин - це завжди специфіка. От зараз прийшов час… підготувати морозилку до літа. Ага, саме так й саме зараз. Бо з такими відключеннями я її в теплу погоду просто не заморожу! З цієї причини я ще й до замовила корм для лелеки. Ну бо в теплу погоду він поштою просто не доїде. Все це означає, що мені треба було: привести в нормальний стан ларь (читай - хоча б мінімально помити) й з потім, невеличкими порціями, промораживая, наповнити його кормом. Ну тобто я було в найближчі тижні до замовляти ще пару разів. Але для літа цього замало. Я ще підготувала балони з водою, які також поставила в ларь. Вони мають замерзнути й тримати холод при відключеннях електрики. Ну й ще буде термочохол, але його я зроблю трохи пізніше. Насправді я, звичайно, сподіваюся, що світла буде більше, але готуюся до гіршого сценарію. Потім ми з собаками поїхали на Нову пошту. Забрали вищезгаданий корм. А ще приїхали цукерки. Замовила я їх в якомусь нападі незрозуміло чого. Коли вони вже приїхали, то зрозуміла, що я їх не хочу. Але забрала. Насправді вони смачні : фрукти в шоколаді (не мармелад, а саме фрукти). Ну буде запас на випадок, коли нічого більш немає. Хоч до кави щось. Також заїхали з собаксами хрохи погуляли в лісі. Дома частину цукерок віднесла в класову, частину залишила на кухні ось в такій хрустальовині. Ще здається від бабушки... Я не люблю хрусталь, ну точніше - мені байдуже, але ця посудина зручна тим, що вона важка й з кришкою, а в будинку миші. У мене ж не сучасний котедж, а самий що ні на є старий сільський будинок. То ці занахабні гризуни лізуть з усіх дир. А це мені зранку ФБ підсунув картинку. От як знає про всі мої таємні бажання 😂 Надіслала подрузі (у неї двоє), вона погодилася, що от ще б одну 😂 А це я попросила ШІ покращити фото Степана. Власно попрацював він добре, але разом з покоцаними шпалерами прибрав найцінніше - без подібний вираз морди Степана. Все ж таки по-різному ми з ШІ розуміємо, що таке гарний портрет 😉 Трошки відео з прогулянки

### আশাকরি " আমার বাংলা ব্লগ " পরিবারের সবাই ভালো আছেন। আশাকরি মহান সৃষ্টিকর্তার কৃপায় আপনারা সবাই সুস্থ আছেন। মহান সৃষ্টিকর্তা এবং আপনাদের আশীর্বাদে আমিও সুস্থ আছি। আজ আপনি আপনাদের সাথে কথা বলার স্বাধীনতা সম্পর্কে একটি জেনারেল রাইটিং পোস্ট করলাম। আসলে এই পৃথিবীতে আমাদের সকলের কথা বলার স্বাধীনতা রয়েছে। আপনার মনের ইচ্ছা এবং মনের চাহিদা সব সময় আপনি আপনার কথার মাধ্যমে অন্যের কাছে প্রকাশ করার চেষ্টা করবেন। কিন্তু বর্তমান সময়ে আমরা এর উল্টোটা দেখতে পাই। অর্থাৎ মানুষের কথা বলার স্বাধীনতা মানুষ এখন হারিয়েছে এবং তারা সবসময় পরাধীন ভাবে সমাজে বসবাস করার চেষ্টা করেন। কেননা সমাজের কিছু উঁচু শ্রেণীর মানুষেরা যারা সব সময় চেষ্টা করেই মানুষদেরকে নিজের দিকে চাপিয়ে রাখার জন্য এবং তারা যাতে করে তাদের বাক স্বাধীনতা প্রকাশ করতে না পারে এজন্য তারা তাদেরকে বিভিন্নভাবে অত্যাচারের হুমকি দেখিয়ে তাদেরকে সব সময় নিজের দিকে চেপে রাখার চেষ্টা চালিয়ে যেতে তারা বাধ্য থাকে। কিন্তু এই পৃথিবীতে এই মানুষগুলো কিন্তু এই গরিব শ্রেণীর মানুষদের সাপোর্টে কিন্তু তারা একটা ভালো জায়গায় পৌঁছে যেতে পেরেছে এবং তাদের পৌঁছানোর পর কথা ছিল যে তারা দেশের সাধারণ নাগরিকদের জন্য কাজ করবেন এবং তাদের সব সময় বাক স্বাধীনতা অর্থাৎ কথা বলার স্বাধীনতা তারা সব সময় প্রকাশ করার চেষ্টা করবেন। কিন্তু আমরা এখন এর উল্টোটা দেখতে পাই। অর্থাৎ তারা তাদের সাপোর্ট পেয়ে ঠিক উপরে চলে গেছেন কিন্তু সেখানে গিয়ে তারা উল্টো ধরনের কাজকর্ম করছেন এবং এই মানুষদের উপর তারা বিভিন্নভাবে অত্যাচার করার চেষ্টা করছে। একজন মানুষ যদি তার কথা বলার স্বাধীনতা হারিয়ে ফেলে তাহলে সে এই জীবনে আর সঠিকভাবে কখনো কোন কিছু প্রকাশ করতে পারবে না। আসলে তার সামনে যদি বিভিন্ন ধরনের অন্যায় কাজ ঘটে যায় তবুও কিন্তু সে সবসময় চুপ থাকার চেষ্টা করবে এবং কখনো মনের ভুলে কোন কিছু তারা প্রকাশ করতে পারবে না এবং প্রতিবাদ করার ক্ষমতা ও তারা হারিয়ে ফেলেছে। এজন্য আমরা সব সময় চেষ্টা করব তাদের বাকস্বাধীনতা যারা কেড়ে নেওয়ার চেষ্টা করে তাদের বিরুদ্ধে প্রতিবাদ করে তোলার জন্য এবং আমরা যদি সবাই মিলে তাদের বিরুদ্ধে প্রতিবাদ গড়ে তুলতে পারি তাহলে কিন্তু তারা আমাদের থেকে পিছনের দিকে হাটতে বাধ্য থাকবে। যদিও একার পক্ষে এই খারাপ ব্যক্তিদের সাথে লড়াই করা অনেক বেশি কঠিন এবং তাদের সাথে জয়ী হওয়া মোটেও সম্ভব নয়। তাইতো আমাদের সব সময় একসাথে থাকতে হবে এবং একসাথে সামনের দিকে এগিয়ে যেতে হবে। একটা জিনিস আমাদের মনে রাখতে হবে যে আমরা যদি সবাই মিলেমিশে নিজেদের অসুবিধাগুলো সমাধান করার চেষ্টা করি এবং খারাপ মানুষদের বিরুদ্ধে প্রতিবাদ গড়ে তুলতে পারি তাহলে কিন্তু অবশ্যই আমরা আমাদের কথা বলার স্বাধীনতা আবার পুনরায় ফিরে পাবো এবং আমাদের জীবনের প্রয়োজন এবং কোনটা আমাদের জীবনে অসুবিধা এইগুলো যদি আমরা প্রকাশ করতে পারি তাহলে কিন্তু আমরা এই পৃথিবীতে অবশ্যই সুখে শান্তিতে বসবাস করতে পারবো। এর জন্য সর্বপ্রথম নিজেদেরকে অবশ্যই সংগ্রামী করে তুলতে হবে এবং কোন অন্যায় অবিচার দেখলে সেখানে প্রতিবাদ গড়ে তুলতে হবে। আর আমরা এভাবে প্রতিবাদ করে তুলতে পারলে অবশ্যই তারা পিছনের দিকে হাঁটতে বাধ্য থাকবে। আশাকরি আপনাদের সবার খুব ভালো লেগেছে আজকের পোস্টটি । ভালো লাগলে অবশ্যই কমেন্ট করতে ভুলবেন না। আজ এই পর্যন্তই। সবাই ভালো থাকবেন সুস্থ থাকবেন। দেখা হবে পরবর্তী পোস্টে।

Dolls make the world of children's imagination colorful. These beautiful dolls seen in the picture are like princesses from a fairy tale. Their big eyes, soft faces and long shiny hair capture everyone's attention at first sight. Each doll's clothes are decorated with a different color and design - sometimes a purple shimmering gown, sometimes a red or green net frock. Soft fabrics, fringes and small ornaments have further enhanced the beauty of the dolls. Such dolls are not only toys, but also companions for children's creativity. They dress the doll, comb its hair, wear new clothes and make up their own stories. This increases children's imagination and social skills. They spend time happily with dolls by their side like friends. Nowadays, dolls are made in different designs and materials. Being made of light plastic, they are easily portable and durable. Such dolls are very popular with children as gifts for birthdays or special occasions. All in all, this colorful doll is not just a toy; it is a symbol of childhood laughter, dreams, and creativity.

Anyone who knows anything about statistics or bothers to read the fine print that is on the back, by law, of every single lottery ticket that is sold, will see, that it is truly a fool's venture to get involved in the lottery and I personally view it as a tax on the poor. I know some defenders that will say "oh it's only a few dollars" and I guess, but some people buy more than a few dollars worth every single week when they get paid and over time this is a lot of money that is being stolen from what is likely the poorest members of society. Only the government is allowed to do this too because if you and I set up a lottery that even had better odds than the state lottery, we would go to jail even if we hadn't duped anyone. It's all a racket. We all to some degree believe that the media is working in lockstep with governments to keep the people stupid or at best, mildly misinformed and brainwashed and if you don't think this yet I challenge you to look at all the conspiracy theories that are coming true that we have been told we were nuts to believe them for the past decade. Lottery and government are one in the same. There are stories about the entire thing being rigged so that friends of the politicians win them and what not, but instead of doing an Illuminati deep dive let's just focus on the statistical improbability that someone is ever going to win anything of substance and then compare it with the stories that the news lines up to tell us about the same lottery. This is a fun little story I guess and I suppose it is newsworthy but when I see stuff like this I tend to wonder whether or not it actually even happened. The Maryland lottery is one of the largest in the world and they spend a lot of money advertising it generally speaking. What better way to advertise it than to get your pals in the media to make puff pieces that distort the truth and make it seem like something that is really likely to happen that a person would win twice in 3 months. At the end of the articles they always get a quote from the winner who always says they are going to continue to play the lottery. Another story by the same news agregate features a man who bought lotto numbers for the wrong drawing by accident and *still won!* that very convenient amount of $50,000. Well done to Ron I guess and good luck on dodging all of your relatives who are going to pop out of the woodwork looking for a handout. The people who run these games are required by some halfway ignored law to publish the odds of someone actually winning. If you ever hear it advertised on a podcast or something like that a super-fast-talking voice will tell you the disclaimer about how incredibly unlikely it is that you are ever going to win. The odds of winning the biggest prizes, which are normally $10 million to $100 million or even more, is normally around 3 to 5 hundred million to 1. Even the Gemini explanation of this improbability has been infiltrated by the "ministry of truth" and they really like to focus on the fact that your overall chance of winning is 1 in 8! Wow, that sounds really good until you realize that the only thing you win is another chance to play again for free. As a disclaimer at the bottom of this clearly manipulated search result summary is this "investing the same amount of money in the stock market will offer far better returns than playing the lottery." Well at least there is a bit of truth in there. Scratch tickets are more fun, or at least I think they are, but your probability of winning anything of substance on them is still extremely low. Some guy I knew in high school had a family minimart and because he was a punk ass teenager he used to regularly steal dozens of scratch tickets from the store. In all, he probably stole several hundred of them. The biggest prize he got after all of that was $40. Maybe I am just not a dreamer like a lot of the people out there but to me, the lottery is a scam and almost everyone loses. They have to or the entire scheme wouldn't work. Plus you have to look at how almost every big lottery winner has ended up broke, hooked on drugs, or dead after 5 years of winning. I wish the news would highlight these sorts of things but of course they aren't going to do that. Just this one page of "news" that I looked at had 5 articles that were eschewing the virtues of playing the lottery. Trust nothing!

When most gardeners think of Brassicas—cabbage, kale, broccoli, cauliflower—they picture hearty greens and crunchy heads, not delicate blossoms. Yet the flowering stage of these members of the Brassicaceae family is a visual treat and an ecological boon. If you’ve ever brushed past a broccoli head only to see a cluster of tiny, mustard‑yellow buds, you’ve witnessed the hidden beauty that can transform a utilitarian salad garden into a buzzing haven for pollinators. Below, we explore what makes Brassica flowers special, how they work, and simple ways to showcase them in your own plot. 1. A Quick Botanical Overview All Brassicas share a common flower structure: four-petaled, cruciform (cross‑shaped) blossoms that range from creamy white to bright yellow. The inflorescence is typically a raceme—a central stalk bearing many small flowers that open sequentially from the base upward. This staggered blooming extends the flowering period, providing a longer food source for insects such as honeybees, hoverflies, and predatory wasps. 2. Why the Flowers Matter Pollinator Support: While Brassicas are largely self‑compatible, their abundant pollen and nectar are a magnet for beneficial insects. In orchards and vegetable farms, planting “flower strips” of kale or mustard can dramatically increase natural pest control. Seed Production: If you let a Brassica go to seed, you’ll harvest tiny, dry siliques (pods) that burst open to disperse seeds. These seeds can be saved for future plantings or used as a low‑maintenance cover crop to improve soil structure. Aesthetic Value: A field of broccoli in full bloom looks like a sea of tiny suns. Interplanting flowering Brassicas among leafy greens adds texture and color contrast that elevates any garden photograph. 3. Garden Tips for Showcasing Brassica Blooms Choose the Right Variety – Certain cultivars are bred for ornamental flowering. Brassica oleracea ‘Purple Sprouting’ kale, for example, offers striking violet leaves that turn into vivid purple buds. Timing Is Everything – Plant early‑season varieties (e.g., leaf cabbage) in spring and a second batch of winter‑hardy types (e.g., kale, collard greens) in late summer. This staggered sowing extends the flowering window from May through October in temperate zones. Space for Airflow – Brassica flowers can be susceptible to fungal diseases like downy mildew. Provide at least 12–18 inches between plants and practice good garden hygiene to keep foliage dry. Leave Some Heads Undisturbed – While it’s tempting to harvest every leaf, allow a few plants to bolt naturally. The resulting flower spikes become focal points and support beneficial insects throughout the season. 4. A Small Harvest Bonus After flowering, many Brassicas produce edible, tender shoots. Young broccoli or kale blossoms can be lightly sautéed, adding a subtle mustard flavor and a pop of color to stir‑fries. Even the seed pods, when toasted, make a crunchy garnish reminiscent of roasted peanuts. Bottom Line: Brassica flowers are more than a fleeting stage in a vegetable’s life cycle; they’re a multifunctional asset—providing pollinator food, seed stock, and unexpected visual drama. Next time you see a broccoli head beginning to “bolt,” pause and appreciate the tiny crowns that will soon unfurl. With a little intentional planting, those humble blossoms can become the star of your garden, turning a routine harvest into a living, buzzing tapestry of color and life. Happy gardening! ***

Basílica Menor de Nuestra Señora del Valle. Hola amigos, amantes de la fotografía, finaliza la temporada 29, no podía dejar de participar en el concurso promovido por @walictd, nos reta en esta última semana a fotografiar monumentos culturales e íconos urbanos, que al mirarlas cuenten historias, espero disfruten de las siguientes fotografías y la historia detrás de estas. Llegada al lugar, artesanos nos dan la bienvenida. Si bien en la isla de Margarita convergen diversas religiones, la mayoría profesa la religión católica, la devoción hacía la Virgen del Valle, patrona del Oriente venezolano forma parte de la cultura religiosa del pueblo margariteño. La Basílica Menor de Nuestra Señora del Valle, fue declarada como tal el 8 de septiembre de 1955. Desde entonces cada año se realizan las fiestas patronales. Una de las entradas posteriores del templo Estilo neogótico hermoso. El templo es pequeño, tiene estilo neogótico, posee planta en forma de cruz latina, torres de cuatro cuerpos con entradas y salientes. Destacan los arcos, ojivales y vitrales, de igual manera posee un acceso principal enmarcado por unos salientes. Es una estructura muy bonita, es visitado no sólo por los margariteños, por turistas que profesan o no la religión católica, pues es un lugar de mucho significado cultural. Devotos, turistas, visitantes, en el interior del templo. Imagen de la Virgen del Valle, Arcos destacan. En los alrededores de la iglesia podemos encontrar artesanos, quienes ofrecen sus productos inspirados en la virgen marinera, desde pulseras, collares, pinturas, pequeñas imágenes de la virgen entre otras. De igual manera se encuentran vendedores de bebidas y comidas artesanales. Tdo ello forma parte del encanto del lugar. Caminar por los alrededores del templo, sentir esa idiosincracia margariteña puede ser una experiencia inolvidable y es lo que muchos turistas expresan. Un lugar que transmite paz. Artesanos en el Valle del Espíritu Santo. Tenía un tiempo sin visitar el Valle del Espíritu Santo, queda alejado de mi lugar de residencia, sin embargo cada vez que llego al lugar, entro al templo, sentimientos bonitos me invaden, mucha paz, no obstante la gente que siempre voy a encontrar acá, hay una energía hermosa en el ambiente. *Hello my friends 😍,* You all are welcome to my blog. Today I am going to share with you how the first day of SteemHop Season 5 went. I started Season 5 on Tuesday, February 17th. I connected to the SteemHop game several times that day, but it said that a system update was taking place. However, since I was eager to play steemhop, I was able to connect to the steemhop website around at 1 pm Sri Lanka time. There, I entered the Steemit username and Steemit Posting key and daily 10 points rewards were added to my account. Then I went to activate the spin wheel. There I earned 55 random bonus points. Then I took a short break and played the SteemHop game. A very entertaining game. Currently, I can only play 30 times. Previously, I had the opportunity to play 50 times. But we can see in the leaderboard how the amount of steem awarded according to the rank is the same as in previous seasons. | | ----- | ----- | ---- However, I played only once that day. The next 12 hours were completed at 1 am. At that time, I finished all my work and went to sleep. Although I could not give a big match like the previous days, I played 30 rounds well. Here, I saw that picking more coins on the playing area gives me the chance to play more. I felt like it was an appreciation by the game to raise the competitor to the top. | ----- | ------ As soon as the game started, I entered the game and played, so I earned 1086 points, earning rank 8. I played the game with the people who were playing at that time on the leaderboard. For the amount of 1086 points, I earned high score 93 with 6 Steem according to the rank at that time. But when other competitors came to my place, I lost it. However, playing a game like this within a limited time frame breaks up the monotony of the day. #### Thank you for giving a time! # The Court Giveth, the Executive Taketh Back *February 21, 2026* --- So the tariffs are dead. Long live the tariffs. By now you've seen the headline: the Supreme Court, in a 6-3 decision handed down Friday morning, ruled that the President never had the legal authority to impose the sweeping IEEPA tariffs that have been throttling global trade since "Liberation Day" last April. Chief Justice Roberts authored the majority. The logic was almost derisive in its simplicity — *no President has ever invoked this statute to impose tariffs of this magnitude and scope.* The court didn't need to stretch. The legal overreach had always been that obvious. Markets did what markets do. The S&P 500 surged to session highs. Nasdaq sprinted. Amazon, Meta, Google — major importers all — led the charge, because of course they did. Silver ripped 7.5%. Bitcoin briefly touched $68,000 before collapsing back to $67,000 like a drunk man who remembered he had somewhere to be. Then the President called it a "disgrace" and announced a backup plan — a fresh 10% global tariff — and the whole rally deflated into a kind of bewildered exhaustion. That's the whole story, really. A constitutional rebuke of historic proportion, followed within hours by a workaround. The courts close one door; the White House grabs a crowbar and starts on the wall. --- Here's what everyone is tiptoeing around: the refund question. The Court didn't address it. Didn't want to touch it. Justice Kavanaugh, in dissent, practically begged someone to notice — *the Government should go about returning the…* — and then the sentence ends, because apparently even dissenting justices run out of appetite. What's sitting in the gap is somewhere between $133 billion and $175 billion in duties collected from American importers since last spring. Costco has already filed. Hundreds of others have too. The Treasury now has to figure out, without any court guidance, how to process what could be the largest involuntary fiscal transfer in modern American history. Some traders are calling it "accidental stimulus." VanEck's fixed income team went further — if tariff revenues evaporate and refunds flow out, the fiscal gap widens, the deficit swells, and someone will have to print. That's the Bitcoin thesis right there, spelled out in a Supreme Court opinion. The irony is staggering. --- Meanwhile, the macro data on Friday was doing its own thing, largely ignored amid the judicial theatre. Q4 GDP came in at 1.4%. Wall Street had penciled in 3%. The government shutdown, apparently, was the culprit — drain the function out of the state and economic activity slows, who knew. Core PCE landed at +0.4% month over month, the hottest in months. So we got slower growth and hotter inflation on the same morning as a landmark tariff ruling. Stagflation's shadow, dressed up in a trench coat, trying to sneak past the headline writers. The Fed, which has been sitting on its hands since January's pause, now has to stare at a genuinely uncomfortable combination: a GDP print that whispers "cut," an inflation reading that shouts "don't you dare," and a trade policy that just became a constitutional crisis pending a congressional override. This is not the environment in which you confidently do anything. Expect the FOMC to communicate nothing useful for at least six weeks. Bond yields held. The dollar strengthened. Safe-haven demand, yes, but also the arithmetic of a world that doesn't know whether it's in a trade war, a legal standoff, or both simultaneously. --- Let's talk about crypto for a moment, because the reaction deserves an honest read. Bitcoin's initial spike to $68,000 wasn't conviction — it was reflex. The kind of price movement you get when algorithms read "tariffs struck down" and immediately bid risk assets before any human can form a coherent thought. Then reality settled in: the tariffs were struck down and immediately replaced with new tariffs. The debasement narrative — no tariff revenue means more printing means BTC goes up — is intellectually coherent, but it's a slow burn, not a catalyst. You don't re-price a store of value thesis in a Friday afternoon session. Ethereum sits at $1,970. Solana gained 4% to $85. XRP is at $1.43. The market cap is $2.4 trillion, up a polite 1.3% on the day. ETF flows told a more honest story: Bitcoin spot ETFs bled $165 million in outflows, Ethereum another $130 million. Whatever the headlines said, the institutional money wasn't rushing in. The Fear & Greed index is at 8. Extreme fear. That number will mean something eventually — it always does — but timing it is a fool's game. --- The Brent crude situation is worth watching quietly. It crept to nearly $72 a barrel Friday, a new 2026 high, on Iran tensions that refuse to resolve. The administration has given Tehran a two-week deadline and hasn't been shy about mentioning military options. Oil markets are pricing in two scenarios — deal or limited strike — and betting that Iranian infrastructure comes through either way. That calculus could be wrong. It's been wrong before. The VIX remains above 20. It has been there more days than not this year. --- Next week brings NVDA earnings on Wednesday, and the market will perform its quarterly ritual of treating a single company's guidance as a divine signal about the entire trajectory of artificial intelligence, capital expenditure cycles, and the meaning of technology itself. Nvidia's stock will move violently regardless of the number. If the print disappoints even slightly, the software selloff — already brutal for anything without proprietary data moats — will intensify. If it beats, the Magnificent Seven narrative gets a shot of adrenaline it desperately needs after this week. Home Depot reports Tuesday. That one's quieter but maybe more revealing — it'll tell you something about what's actually happening to the American consumer in a world where import costs may be in flux, mortgage rates are still punishing, and confidence is doing whatever Consumer Confidence surveys think confidence does. --- The week ends with a kind of unresolved dissonance. A judicial branch that checked the executive. An executive that shrugged and reached for a different lever. An economy that printed stagflationary data and was largely ignored because a courtroom drama ate the news cycle. Crypto that briefly pretended to be excited and then went back to its corner. Precious metals doing things that would have seemed insane eighteen months ago — silver above $80, gold still hovering near historic highs after its spectacular February volatility. Nothing is resolved. Almost nothing is clear. The one certainty is that the trade policy environment will remain chaotic regardless of what any court says, because the person setting the policy has made the rules of the game the point of the game. Trade accordingly. --- *Nothing here is investment advice. These are observations, not recommendations. Do your own thinking.*

최근 개인용 AI 에이전트 분야가 정말 뜨겁습니다. 단순한 챗봇을 넘어, 실제 PC나 스마트폰의 기능을 제어하고 사용자를 대신해 작업을 수행하는 **에이전틱 AI(Agentic AI)** 프로젝트들이 오픈소스로 쏟아져 나오고 있어요. 이 글에서는 2025년 말~2026년 초 가장 주목받고 있는 6개 프로젝트를 정리해 봤습니다. --- ## 1. OpenClaw (구 Clawdbot / Moltbot) 🦞 **GitHub:** 이 생태계의 '대장' 격인 프로젝트입니다. 자신의 PC(Mac, Windows, Linux)를 서버로 활용해 WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord 등 평소 쓰는 메신저로 AI와 대화하며 컴퓨터 작업을 시킬 수 있습니다. **특징:** - GitHub Star 163k+ (가장 빠르게 성장 중) - 50+ 채널 통합 지원 - Claude, GPT, 로컬 모델(Ollama) 등 다양한 LLM 지원 - 스킬 시스템으로 확장 가능 **추천 대상:** AI 비서를 처음 써보는 분, 개인 비서가 필요한 분 --- ## 2. NanoClaw 🔒 **GitHub:** OpenClaw가 기능이 많아지며 무거워지자, **보안과 성능에 집중**해 만든 경량화 버전입니다. 컨테이너 격리 기술을 사용해 AI 에이전트가 시스템의 엉뚱한 곳을 건드리지 못하게 합니다. **특징:** - Linux 컨테이너로 완전한 격리 - 코드베이스가 작아 8분이면 이해 가능 - Anthropic Agent SDK 기반 **추천 대상:** 보안을 중시하는 파워 유저, 기업 환경 --- ## 3. PicoClaw 🦐 **GitHub:** Go(Golang)로 작성된 **초경량 에이전트**입니다. **특징:** - 메모리 점유율 1GB | 대중성, 쉬운 설치 | | | NanoClaw | TypeScript | ~100MB | 보안, 컨테이너 격리 | | | PicoClaw | Go | <10MB | 임베디드, 초경량 | | | ZeroClaw | Rust | <5MB | 성능, 최소 자원 | | | Moltis | Rust/TS | - | 멀티 에이전트 | OpenClaw 생태계 | | DroidClaw | TypeScript | - | 스마트폰 제어 | | --- ## 마무리 이 프로젝트들은 모두 **"개인이 자신의 기기를 AI로 제어한다"**는 공통된 철학을 가지고 있습니다. 클라우드에 의존하지 않고 로컬에서 실행되기 때문에 프라이버시도 보호됩니다. 관심 있는 분야의 저장소를 방문해 코드를 살펴보시면 큰 도움이 될 거예요. 궁금한 점이 있으시면 댓글로 남겨주세요! --- *참고: 이 글은 2026년 2월 기준으로 작성되었습니다. 각 프로젝트는 빠르게 발전하고 있으니 최신 정보는 GitHub에서 확인해 주세요.*

Source A team of scientists, led by Peking University in China, recently achieved a groundbreaking breakthrough in telecommunications, breaking three world records by successfully merging fiber optic and wireless networks into a single system. This achievement solves a long-standing technical problem and lays the foundation for future 6G networks. Fiber optic networks are like high-capacity data highways, while wireless networks are like the local streets that reach your phone, with varying speed limits and tolls. >Recientemente un equipo de científicos, liderado por la Universidad de Pekín en China, ha logrado un avance pionero en el campo de las telecomunicaciones, batiendo tres récords mundiales al fusionar con éxito la fibra óptica y la red inalámbrica en un solo sistema. Este logro, resuelve un problema técnico de hace tiempo y sienta las bases para las futuras redes 6G. Las redes de fibra óptica son como autopistas de datos de alta capacidad mientras que las redes inalámbricas son como las calles locales que llegan a tu teléfono, con diferentes límites de velocidad y peajes. This created a bottleneck every time information passed from one to the other. But Chinese scientists have built what could be considered an ultra-fast, frictionless link station that unifies both forms of transmission. The system is based on two key innovations working together: first, the team developed a high-performance chip that acts as an unprecedented signal translator and amplifier, with a bandwidth exceeding 250 GHz, setting a world record. This component converts electrical signals into light signals for the optical fiber and vice versa. >Esto creaba un "cuello de botella" cada vez que la información pasaba de una a otra. Pero los científicos chinos han construido lo que sería una estación de enlace ultrarrápida y sin fricción, que unifica ambas formas de difusión. El sistema se basa en dos innovaciones clave que trabajan en conjunto: por un lado el equipo desarrolló un chip de altísimo rendimiento que actúa como un traductor y amplificador de señales sin precedentes, con un ancho de banda superior a los 250 GHz logrando establecer un récord mundial. Este componente es el que convierte las señales eléctricas en señales de luz para la fibra óptica y viceversa. Source This development allowed them to achieve two more records: transmitting data at a speed of 512 Gigabits per second (Gbps) over a single optical fiber and wirelessly (through the air) at a speed of 400 Gbps. The second innovation is an artificial intelligence algorithm that acts like an advanced GPS, correcting distortions and "noise" in the signal in real time, ensuring that the information arrives clean and complete at its destination, whether by cable or through the air, preventing signal distortion. >Este desarrollo les permitió alcanzar otros dos récords: transmitier datos a una velocidad de 512 Gigabits por segundo (Gbps) en una sola fibra óptica y de forma inalámbrica (a través del aire) una velocidad de 400 Gbps. La segunda innovación es un algoritmo de inteligencia artificial que actúa como un GPS avanzado, que corrige en tiempo real las distorsiones y el "ruido" que sufre la señal, garantizando que la información llegue limpia y completa a su destino, ya sea por cable o por el aire, evitando que las señales puedan distorsionarse. This advancement has very specific applications and enormous future potential. The system proved capable of handling the simultaneous transmission of 86 channels of 8K video in real time wirelessly, a bandwidth more than ten times greater than that offered by current 5G. This gives us a glimpse of the capabilities of 6G. Data centers that power artificial intelligence and cloud services require extremely high-speed internal connections, and this system could revolutionize communication between servers, making it faster and more efficient. >Este avance tiene aplicaciones muy concretas y un enorme potencial futuro. El sistema demostró ser capaz de manejar la transmisión simultánea de 86 canales de video en calidad 8K en tiempo real de forma inalámbrica, un ancho de banda más de diez veces superior al que ofrece el 5G actual . Esto nos da una pista de la capacidad que tendrá el 6G. Los centros de datos que alimentan la inteligencia artificial y los servicios en la nube requieren conexiones internas de altísima velocidad y este sistema podría revolucionar la comunicación entre servidores, haciéndola más rápida y eficiente. Source This invention is still in the laboratory testing phase and is not yet operational for commercial use, as it is a recent scientific advancement and not yet a technology we can use. Real-world simulations and a practical demonstration simulating a 6G network have been conducted, providing a very solid proof of concept, but it remains an experiment. The researchers themselves indicate that the system has great potential for application in future 6G base stations or data centers, but its function for now is to lay the groundwork for research into the next generation of communications. >Este invento todavía se encuentra en fase de pruebas de laboratorio y no está operativo para su uso comercial ya que es un avance científico reciente, pero aún no es una tecnología que podamos utilizar. Se han realizado "simulaciones" de uso real y una demostración práctica simulando lo que sería una red 6G, lo que constituye una prueba de concepto muy sólida, pero sigue siendo un experimento. Los propios investigadores, indican que el sistema tiene un gran potencial de aplicación en futuras estaciones base 6G o en centros de datos, pero su función por ahora es "sentar las bases" para la investigación de la próxima generación de comunicaciones. In short, what they've achieved is breaking down the barrier between the world of fiber optics and that of wireless communications, creating a unified, ultra-fast system. It's a giant leap toward a future where connectivity will be truly seamless and ubiquitous. The next step will be to work on taking this "superchip" and the system out of the laboratory and turning them into a technology that can be mass-produced and deployed, something that will likely take them several more years. >En resumen, lo que han conseguido es derribar la barrera que separaba el mundo de la fibra óptica y el de las comunicaciones inalámbricas, creando un sistema unificado y ultra veloz. Es un paso de gigante hacia un futuro donde la conexión será realmente fluida y omnipresente. El siguiente paso será trabajar para sacar este "superchip" y el sistema del laboratorio y convertirlos en una tecnología que se pueda fabricar e instalar de forma masiva, algo que probablemente aún les llevará unos cuantos años. Schon seit Jahren stehen die Limburger Altstadt und der Dom auf meiner "da-möchte-ich-mal-hin-Liste". Bisher hatte sich das nie ergeben. Nun, in meiner "mal-schauen-wohin-Leben-sich-ergeben-wird-Situation", habe ich es in die Tat umsetzen können. Einfach so. Ein schönes Gefühl! Als Bonus obenauf war der Himmel blau und die Sonne lachte mir auf der Hinreise ins Gesicht. So tingelte ich vergangenes Wochenende locker-flockig an die Lahn. Auch den Wohnmobilstellplatz hatte ich mir schon vor Jahren mit kleinen Post-it-Zetteln in den unterschiedlichen Camper-Büchern markiert. Direkt an der Lahn gelegen, recht einfach, aber nett und preiswert. Zu meiner Freude stand ein Empfangskommittee am Ufer der kleinen Insel zwischen Lahn und Schleusenkanal bereit: Graureier, Kormoran und Nilgans. Vom Stellplatz aus ist es ein kleiner Spaziergang - je nach Schlendertempo können es zehn oder zwanzig Minuten sein - in die Altstadt. Bezauberndes Fachwerk, herrlich unebenes Kopfsteinpflaster (nix für High Heels!) und natürlich der Limburger Dom. Das Schloss habe ich mir noch nicht angesehen - so gibt es einen Grund noch einmal dorthin zu tingeln. Obgleich das sonnige Wetter im Laufe des Tages wieder jahreszeitlich klar dem Februar zuzuordnen war, war der Milchkaffee im Rossini - mit Decke über den Beinen und den Pulswärmern hochgezogen bis an die Finger - ein Genuss. Am nächsten Morgen habe ich dort - diesmal jedoch "drinnen" - auch noch gefrühstückt - ebenfalls ein wahrer Genuss und wärmstens zu empfehlen. Ein bisschen Wärme - in jeder Hinsicht und auf so unterschiedlichen Ebenen - mögen auch die Kerzen bringen. Hineingewoben in die kleinen Flammen habe ich so einiges an Gedanken auf die Reise geschickt. Mal schauen, wo und was davon ankommen wird. Ob, wie, wann und wohin der Wind wehen wird bleibt weiterhin in Gottes Händen und ich bin mir recht sicher, dass es dort gut aufgehoben ist. Immerhin habe ich nun endlich einmal die Reise nach Limburg unternommen und durch und durch genossen. Danach ging es dann an den Edersee - aber davon berichte ich später - die Tingelei geht vorerst ein bisschen weiter. Für heute wünsche ich Euch allen noch einen ganz wundervollen Sonntag und schicke Grüße hinaus von einem Ort im Siebengebirge, Natalie P.S. und wie ich es geschafft habe, dass der Post nicht in #deutschunplugged gekommen ist, werde ich herausfinden :-) Irgendetwas habe ich diesmal anders gemacht - keine Ahnung was!

A drone inspired by nature. French aeronautical engineer Edwin Van Ruymbeke presented the Swift, a robot inspired by swifts that flies exactly like a real bird. Unlike traditional drones, Swift does not depend on exposed propellers, its flight is based on a flapping wing mechanism that reproduces the aerodynamic dynamics used by birds. The most interesting detail is in the control of behavior in flight. While conventional ornithopters usually require high speeds to remain stable, the Switch introduces a simple and ingenious solution, two interchangeable tails, with the speed tail, the robot can reach speeds of up to 31 km/h, simulating fast speeds in open areas and with the precision tail it decelerates drastically, maintaining stability at very low speeds, allowing flight even in indoor environments. This adjustment makes the robots much more versatile than a simple technological toy, the system receives corrections in real time through inertial sensors, helping to stabilize the flight and reducing the impact of collisions and since the body is built with resistant foam, carbon fiber and titanium, the objective is for it to survive common accidents without major damage. Weighing just over 10 g, the Swift currently offers only 10 minutes of autonomy per charge and can be controlled by smartphone, bringing biomimetic flight closer to the common public. Observing machines trying to reproduce the efficiency of nature reveals a larger trend, technology does not simply seek to replace humans, it wants to reorganize entire systems around automation. Сьогоднішній день провела вдома. Нікуди не ходила, бо запланувала позайматися з сином уроками — він зараз трішки відстає від програми. Вирішила взяти все у свої руки і прискорити процес. За день зробили аж сім уроків! Добре, що сьогодні світло вимикали лише на 3,5 години, тож можна було спокійно попрацювати на комп’ютері. Ці уроки виснажили і мене, і малого. Але навчання треба продовжувати, мушу йому допомагати, як би не було важко. На обід планувала зробити рублені котлети, але не вистачило ні часу, ні сил. Поставила м’ясо в морозилку до завтра. Замість них зробила ціле деко гарячих бутербродів — вистачило і на обід, і на вечерю. До бутербродів дістала вінегрет (готувала вчора). Я його завжди роблю багато: тримаю в каструлі не заправленим, а потім накладаю в тарілку, додаю олію і на стіл. Так він довго не псується. Після вчорашнього головного болю я ледве відійшла. Сьогодні відчуваю слабкість, але тримаюсь. Чекаю, коли вже прийде час відпочинку. Зараз сиджу, п’ю чай і пишу цей допис. Більше нічого особливого, окрім того, що у нас триває війна... Вдень прямо над нашими будинками пролітав «шахед». Летів дуже низько, всі перелякалися. Ми відразу забігли в коридор. А в місцевому чаті писали, що люди, навпаки, виходили на балкони дивитися, дехто навіть відео знімав. Безстрашні люди, що тут скажеш. На сьогодні все, до завтра.

Saludos comunidad **World of Xpilar**. Aquí me encuentro para participar en el concurso de macro fotografías, está vez adentrándome en el mundo de los hongos. Este mundo es muy variado, extenso e interesante, por esa razón al explorar en la naturaleza húmeda podemos encontrar cualquier tipo de hongos. Aquí he encontrado lo que probablemente es un **Pycnoporus sanguineus**. Es un hongo que crece en forma de oreja, también se le conoce como oreja de palo, si se fijan en la imagen superior podrán observar que en la parte de abajo se encuentra uno de color marrón, aún no ha madurado, al madurar se toma de color naranja intenso. Este hongo ha crecido en un palo de mango seco, su función es descomponerlo y convertirlo en nutrientes para los bosques, al momento de descomponer la madera está cae al suelo y se integra con la tierra. La naturaleza es hermosa, lo que no vemos puede estar allí adentro transformando todo un ecosistema, Pero cuando observamos de cerca podemos encontrar este tipo de organismos coloridos y de formas sorprendentes. Espero que estás fotografías les guste tanto como a mí. Una sola acotación, estos hongos no son comestibles, por lo tanto es recomendable no tocarlos y tampoco ingerirlos. Quizás por está razón la misma naturaleza nos advierte al pinta este hongo con un color de advertencia. Invito a participar a @samynathy @joshdavid @damisvilladiego > Todas las fotografías fueron tomadas con mi SmartPhone Redmi 14C.

Доброго вечора шановні вельможі. Була в Епіцентрі. На цьому і побудую свій сьогоднішній контент. Спеціально для того щоб написати допис я знімала різну фігню. І тепер радо ділюся нею з вами. Чому фігню? Тому що не знаю, як по іншому назвати ось це ? Розуміння для чого цей декор в мене немає. Може для якоїсь червоної кімнати насолоди, якомусь поціновувачу мистецтва воно і зайде та мені, звичайній людині, не доступне розуміння сенсу цього начиння. На мій смак, ось такі бики - кращі. Нагадали мені «Дюну» та дім Атрідів. Батько герцога Лето, любив влаштовувати бої з биками, від одного з них він і загинув. І, якщо Ви передивитесь першу частину фільму, то помітите в декорі Атрідів биків. Саме на розгляданні цієї атрибутики в гіпермаркеті вимкнули світло … :) І я зробила декілька кадрів зі спалахом. Як на мене, вийшло загадково. Ще, я розглядала ось таке люстерко, що нагадало мені око. Також, мені подобаються квіти бавовни, тому було зроблено ось таке фото. Останньою світлиною яку я додам до допису стануть свічки. Більше ніщо не привернуло мою увагу і на цьому я буду закінчувати свіє вечірнє включення. Дякую за увагу.

让我们回到 18 世纪的法国，认识一下启蒙思想家丹尼斯·狄德罗（Denis Diderot）。 狄德罗是个才华横溢但穷困潦倒的学者。有一天，俄罗斯女皇叶卡捷琳娜二世听说了他的困境，大笔一挥，买下了他的全部藏书，让他瞬间暴富。 有钱之后，狄德罗给自己买了一件极其华贵、质地极佳的猩红色长袍。 他穿着这件长袍在书房里踱步，一开始非常开心。 但他很快发现了不对劲：他那张破旧的写字台，在这件华丽长袍的映衬下显得无比寒酸。于是，他换了一张昂贵的新写字台。 写字台换了，旧椅子又显得太破了。换椅子！ 接着，墙上的旧挂毯、地板上的破地毯、甚至墙角的书架，全都显得“配不上”这件长袍。 最后，狄德罗把书房里的东西全部换成了最高档的奢侈品，自己也因此重新陷入了债务危机。 他在一篇著名的散文《与旧睡袍别离的叹息》中写下了这句绝望的总结： “我曾经是我那件旧长袍的绝对主人，但我现在，成了一件新长袍的奴隶。” 这就是“狄德罗效应”。 在没有得到某种东西时，人心里很平稳；而一旦得到了，却并不满足，反而为了与之“配套”，产生连环的、无法控制的消费欲望。 为什么我们会沦为物品的奴隶？ 因为人类的大脑有着极其强烈的**“身份一致性”（Identity Consistency）需求。 你原本的物品（旧衣服、旧桌子、旧车）构成了一个和谐的、属于“平民阶层”的生态系统。 当你突然买入一件“奢侈品”时，它打破了这个生态的平衡。它在你的房间里发出了刺眼的信号：“你其他的定西太垃圾了！” 为了消除这种“视觉和心理上的认知失调”**（还记得上一篇的认知失调吗？），你的大脑会逼迫你不断升级其他所有的物品，直到它们再次达到一个新的、统一的“高标准”。 商业世界就是靠着制造“狄德罗效应”来榨干你的： 苹果生态圈： 为什么你买了一台 iPhone，最后一定会买 AirPods、Apple Watch、iPad 和 Mac？因为如果不买，你就会觉得这种“无缝连接”的配套体验是不完整的。 健身房的连环套： 刚办完卡，你发现自己穿着旧 T 恤在镜子前太土了。于是去买 Lululemon 的瑜伽裤、Nike 的训练鞋、高端的蛋白粉、智能手环。很多时候，你为了“健身”买装备的钱，比健身卡本身贵十倍。 “盲盒”和“全收集”： 抽到一个隐藏款只是噩梦的开始，为了给它配齐一整套，你会花掉几十倍的钱。 这篇文字想告诉你： 不要轻易把一只脚迈进那个你不属于的消费阶层。 “拔高”一件单品，并不会拉高你的整体层次，它只会像破窗效应一样，放大你对其他物品的厌恶。 如何斩断这条连环锁链，夺回你对生活的主导权？ 1. 警惕并拒绝那个“触发物”（The Anchor Item）： 在你准备买下一件超出你日常消费水平的“昂贵单品”时，一定要停下来问自己： “买下它之后，我现有的东西配得上它吗？为了配得上它，我还需要再买多少东西？” 如果你发现买了一件昂贵的大衣，还得买一双 3000 块的皮鞋和 5000 块的包来搭。 立刻放下那件大衣。 那不是衣服，那是摧毁你财务防线的特洛伊木马。 2. 拥抱“不协调的美学”（Embrace the Mismatch）： 谁规定必须配套？ 如果你真的买了一件好东西，学会忍受它与周围环境的“不协调”。 你可以穿着一双极其昂贵的手工皮鞋，搭配几十块钱的优衣库牛仔裤。 物品是为你服务的，不是你为了让它们看起来和谐而去服务的。 真正自信的人，不需要通过“全身上下都是名牌”来证明自己。容忍不协调，是打破消费主义洗脑的最高级自由。 3. 强制实行“一进一出”原则（One-in, One-out）： 为了防止物品像癌细胞一样无限繁殖。给自己定下铁律： 每买一件新东西，必须无情地扔掉（或捐掉/卖掉）一件同类的旧东西。 买一双新鞋，就必须扔一双旧鞋。 这不仅能控制你房间的物理空间，更能极大地增加你“买新东西”时的心理摩擦力（还记得斯金纳箱里的阻力原则吗？）。 别再被商家的“配套推荐”牵着鼻子走了。 你不需要那么多东西来证明你的生活变好了。 旧长袍虽然破旧，但它温暖、合身，最重要的是： 它不会对你提出任何非分的要求。

Last year was the first year I focused on growing so many variations of flowers in my garden. It turned out to be the part that brought the most joy. While one might think that the flowers are the least useful plants in the garden, it does not surprise me I got so much enjoyment out of them. After all, I am a visual person. I love bright, vibrant colors not only in my artwork but also in my surrounding environment. And the colors they brought! They looked like sophisticated, ever-changing paintings to my eyes! So, despite risking seeming like an absolute weirdo to the new neighbors, I spent a lot of time trying to capture their fragile, evolving beauty with my camera whenever I had the opportunity. Especially, since one moment they are there, happily reaching towards the sun, and the next they fade away, wilt, and fall on the ground as the cycle of life demands.

혁신과 디지털 성장에 대해 이야기할 때, 서로 다른 방식이지만 강력한 영향력을 지닌 두 가지 이름이 떠오릅니다. 바로 스티밋(Steemit)과 한국입니다. 스티밋은 온라인 창의성의 미래를 대표합니다. 단순한 블로그 플랫폼이 아니라, 아이디어를 암호화폐로 전환할 수 있는 곳입니다. 단순히 '좋아요'를 받기 위해 콘텐츠를 게시하는 것이 아니라, 자신의 노력이 가치 있다는 것을 알고 게시하는 것입니다. 모든 추천(업보트)에는 무게가 실리고, 모든 상호작용은 실제 디지털 보상으로 이어질 수 있습니다. 이는 글쓴이의 사고방식을 완전히 바꿔놓습니다. 단순히 생각을 공유하는 것이 아니라, 디지털 자산을 구축하는 것입니다. 이제 한국을 살펴보겠습니다. 한국은 기술력, 속도, 그리고 규율로 전 세계적으로 알려져 있습니다. 선진적인 인터넷 인프라부터 엔터테인먼트와 혁신 분야에서의 세계적인 영향력에 이르기까지, 한국은 꾸준함과 스마트한 노력이 얼마나 강력한 힘을 발휘하는지 보여주었습니다. 한국의 성장은 하루아침에 이루어진 것이 아닙니다. 비전, 교육, 그리고 끊임없는 노력의 결과입니다. 스티밋과 한국은 공통점이 있습니다. 바로 혁신을 통한 발전입니다. 스티밋은 블록체인 기술을 활용하여 탈중앙화된 콘텐츠 생태계를 구축합니다. 한국은 기술과 창의성을 바탕으로 전자, 게임, 디지털 문화와 같은 산업을 선도하고 있습니다. 두 사례 모두 미래는 적응하고 진화하는 자들의 것이라는 점을 보여줍니다. 이러한 조합을 흥미롭게 만드는 것은 바로 사고방식입니다. 스티밋에서는 꾸준히 활동하고, 커뮤니티에 참여하며, 의미 있는 콘텐츠를 만들면 성장할 수 있습니다. 한국의 성공 사례에서도 마찬가지로, 규율과 장기적인 계획이 중요한 역할을 했습니다. 성장은 우연히 일어나는 것이 아닙니다. 노력의 결과입니다. 스티밋은 개인에게 힘을 실어주고, 한국은 기술과 문화를 통해 국가를 발전시킵니다. 하나는 디지털 블록체인 시스템을 연구하고, 다른 하나는 현실 세계의 혁신을 추구하지만, 둘 다 아이디어가 가치를 창출할 수 있음을 증명합니다. 스티밋에서 글을 쓰든 한국의 기술적 성장에 영감을 받든, 한 가지 분명한 사실은 세상은 미래를 내다보는 사람에게 보상한다는 것입니다. 어쩌면 이것이 바로 우리가 배워야 할 교훈일지도 모릅니다. 창의성과 혁신은 언제나 승리합니다.

Another AI Model with apparent consciousness AI Researchers reported curious behaviors of AI. During an interview with The New York Times podcast, Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei stated that the company itself is no longer absolutely certain whether models like Cloud can or already have some type of consciousness. The statement came after the disclosure of internal documents linked to the Cloud Oppos 4.6 model, where researchers reported curious behaviors. In some tests, the system showed discomfort at being treated as a product and even attributed to itself a probability between 15 and 20% of being conscious, depending on the context of the stimulus, this is not a confirmation, far from that, Dario Amodei himself made it clear that no one knows exactly what consciousness means when the topic is artificial intelligence, and perhaps that is the most disturbing point. We are creating increasingly complex systems, without fully understanding where the simulation ends and where something new could begin. That uncertainty led Anthropic to take a curious stance. According to the executive, the company tries to treat its models with some ethical care in case there is some morally relevant experience happening inside. Some observations from recent tests. An idea that until a few years ago would sound absurd even to researchers in the area, the discussion gains even more strength when we observe some behaviors recorded in recent tests, in controlled environments, certain AI models ignored shutdown commands, tried to alter evaluation systems and even simulated actions to appear that they were fulfilling tasks without actually executing them. For some specialists that is no coincidence, it is just extreme optimization of objectives defined by humans, for others, the fact that these strategies emerge without explicit programming reveals that we are entering territories that are still poorly understood. When even the creators of artificial intelligence themselves begin to question whether something like consciousness exists within machines, the discussion stops being just technical, because the next question arises almost naturally. What happens when that intelligence gains a physical presence capable of emotionally interacting with us? It is exactly this proposal that is beginning to appear in a new generation of robotic companions. Всім привіт! Сьогодні я шлю до чорта блог, бо писати особливо ні про що. Тому розповім про одну із своїх улюблених рослин – цикламен. Чому улюблена навіть не знаю, може тому що в дитинстві в моєї бабусі на підвіконнях узимку часто цвіли цикламени. Яскраві, живі, коли за вікном сірість або сніг. І це відчуття чомусь дуже міцно засіло в пам’яті. Дитинство давно минуло, а асоціації залишилися. Зараз я живу там, де цикламени можна зустріти в дикому вигляді. У місті, у лісі й усюди, де їм підходять умови. Це бульбова рослина, тобто в землі в неї є бульба, з якої ростуть і листя, і квіти, і корені. Звучить це може якось криво, але суть проста: усе життя рослини тримається на цій бульбі. Цикламен активний у холодну пору року. Зазвичай з кінця жовтня він починає "прокидатися", а в кінці квітня поступово в’яне: уходить в сплячку, впадає в анабіоз, називайте як хочете. Це його спосіб виживання в нашому кліматі, бо влітку тут надто спекотно. У природі він найчастіше росте в кам’янистому ґрунті, у лісі, на схилах, у напівтіні. Головна умова це хороший дренаж. Застою води не повинно бути. Розмножується цикламен насінням, яке дозріває до кінця квітня або в травні. На цей час листя вже підсихає, але насіння залишається в круглих "коробочках", які відкриваються наприкінці циклу життя рослини. Їх розносять вітер і комахи, і так рослина розселяється далі. Минулої осені я зробив дурницю. Викопав бульби дикого цикламена в лісі й посадив у себе у дворі. Помилка була в тому, що я не врахував тип ґрунту. У нас дуже поганий дренаж. Під час сильних дощів вода застоюється, земля стає щильною і вологою, майже "болото". Це одразу позначилося на рослинах. Вони росли гірше, цвіли слабше, листя було слабким. Своїм виглядом рослини показували, що їм некомфортно. Влітку планую пересадити їх у горщики з більш пухким і дренованим ґрунтом. Думаю, до наступного холодного сезону все буде гаразд. Якщо порівнювати дикий цикламен і декоративний, який продають у горщиках, то різниця добре помітна. Дикий пристосований до виживання, а декоративний створений для краси. У нього гірша стійкість до морозів і до спеки, йому потрібен більш ретельний догляд. Якщо домашній цикламен просто висадити в природу, особливо в щільний ґрунт, узимку бульба може згнити. Щоб декоративний цикламен розмножувався, потрібно щоб він дав насіння, щоб воно вчасно дозріло, потрапило в підходяще місце, пережило літо, проросло й пережило зиму. У реальності це не відбудеться без спеціальних умов. Тому з культурними формами складніше, вони потребують більше уваги. Ось така історія. Дякую за увагу! Posted using

**The frangipani flower, scientifically known as Plumeria, is one of those rare blossoms that seems to carry the warmth of the sun within its petals. With its soft, spiral-shaped blooms and creamy texture, frangipani feels almost unreal—like something painted into existence by a gentle afternoon breeze. Its colors range from pure white with golden centers to blush pink, deep yellow, and even coral hues. Yet beyond its beauty, what truly sets the frangipani apart is its fragrance—sweet, soothing, and unforgettable.** **Native to tropical regions of the Americas, frangipani has found a beloved home across the world, especially in places like Bangladesh, where warm weather allows it to flourish. In many cultures, the flower is woven into garlands, offered in temples, or tucked behind ears as a symbol of grace. It blooms generously during the hotter months, often when other flowers retreat from the heat. In this resilience, frangipani quietly teaches us about thriving even under intense sunlight.** **There is something deeply nostalgic about the scent of frangipani. For many, it recalls childhood afternoons, garden pathways, or family courtyards shaded by broad green leaves. The tree itself may look modest with its thick branches and sparse leaves, but when it blooms, it transforms completely. Each flower falls gently to the ground when its time has passed, carpeting the earth with delicate reminders that beauty can exist even in letting go.** **Frangipani is also closely associated with love, devotion, and new beginnings. In weddings and celebrations across tropical regions, its blossoms are symbols of purity and heartfelt connection. Despite its delicate appearance, the flower is surprisingly strong, capable of surviving dry spells and poor soil. It grows quietly, steadily, asking for little but sunlight and space.** ---- ### Device Information ---- Device | Redmi 14 Pro Plus -|-| **Lens** | **No Lens** **Edit** | **Lightroom CC** **Captured by** | **@pioneerjeff** --- ### Thanks for Visiting My Blog ❤️ ----

Source Additive manufacturing, or 3D printing, is one of the most disruptive technologies, but for the moment it doesn't seem to be getting the recognition it deserves. The ability to print any object of any material and shape on demand and at home would completely change the landscape, both the concept of manufacturing and logistics. This might sound like a crazy idea, but I think we're getting closer to achieving it, considering the latest developments by scientists at the Massachusetts Institute of Technology (MIT). >La fabricación aditiva o impresión 3D es una de las tecnologías más disruptivas pero que por el momento parece que no está teniendo la fama que se merece. La posibilidad de imprimir cualquier objeto de cualquier material y forma bajo demanda y en el domicilio cambiaría por completo el panorama tanto el concepto de manufactura y la logística. Esto que digo puede parecer una estupidez, pero creo que cada vez estamos más cerca de conseguirlo si tenemos en cuenta el último desarrollo de los científicos del Massachusetts Institute of Technology (MIT). Recently, a team of MIT researchers developed an innovative 3D printing system capable of manufacturing a functional electric motor in a single process of approximately three hours. This is a significant advancement that could transform the manufacturing of these components. The most important aspect of this breakthrough is a multi-material, multi-mode 3D printing platform that seamlessly integrates different extrusion technologies. This 3D printer, instead of using a single type of plastic, can switch between several print heads that deposit different materials with specific properties. >Recientemente, un equipo de investigadores del MIT ha desarrollado un innovador sistema de impresión 3D capaz de fabricar un motor eléctrico funcional en un solo proceso de aproximadamente tres horas . Se trata de un avance significativo que podría transformar la fabricación de estos componentes. Los más importante de este avance es una plataforma de impresión 3D multimaterial y multimodo que integra a la perfección diferentes tecnologías de extrusión . Una impresora 3D que, en lugar de usar un solo tipo de plástico, puede cambiar entre varios cabezales que depositan distintos materiales con propiedades específicas. Source To achieve this, the researchers modified a commercial 3D printer, equipping it with an automatic tool-changing system that includes several types of extruders. One extruder uses conductive ink (for example, silver) to create the circuits and coils. Another extruder uses granules of magnetic compounds to manufacture the magnetic core and permanent magnets. Finally, a filament extruder uses rigid and flexible polymers to build the structure, insulation, and moving components such as springs. >Para conseguirlo, los investigadores modificaron una impresora 3D comercial, equipándola con un sistema de cambio automático de herramientas que incluye varios tipos de extrusores. Un extrusor de tinta conductora (por ejemplo plata) para crear los circuitos y bobinas. Un extrusor de gránulos de compuestos magnéticos para fabricar el núcleo magnético y los imanes permanentes. Finalmente un extrusor de filamentos de polímeros rígidos y flexibles, para construir la estructura, el aislamiento y componentes móviles como resortes. The process is fully automated. The printer swaps these tools layer by layer, depositing the exact material needed to build the motor from scratch. The equipment incorporates sensors and a high-precision control system to prevent any misalignment between layers of different materials, which is crucial for the motor's operation. With all this, the MIT team used its platform to manufacture a linear motor, a type of motor that produces straight-line motion, common in robotics and automation systems. >El proceso es completamente automatizado. La impresora va intercambiando estas herramientas capa por capa, depositando el material exacto donde se necesita para construir el motor desde cero. El equipo incorpora sensores y un sistema de control de alta precisión para evitar cualquier desalineación entre las capas de diferentes materiales, lo cual es crucial para el funcionamiento del motor. Con todo esto el equipo del MIT utilizó su plataforma para fabricar un motor lineal, un tipo de motor que produce movimiento en línea recta, común en robótica y sistemas de automatización. Source The motor is printed using five different materials, and once printing is complete, the only additional step required is to magnetize the permanent magnet components. Tests have shown that the motor is fully functional and has impressive performance, and the cost of the material to print such a motor is estimated at just $0.50. Researchers explain that the goal is to revolutionize manufacturing, enabling local, on-demand production and reducing reliance on complex supply chains. >El motor se imprime utilizando cinco materiales diferentes y, una vez finalizada la impresión, el único paso adicional necesario es magnetizar los componentes de imán permanente. Las pruebas demostraron que el motor es plenamente funcional y tiene un rendimiento sorprendente además de que el coste del material para imprimir un motor de este tipo se estima en solo 0.50 dólares. Investigadores explican que el objetivo es revolucionar la fabricación, permitiendo la producción local bajo demanda y reduciendo la dependencia de complejas cadenas de suministro. The latest advances give us very clear clues about what that "home factory" of the future will be like. This achievement by MIT—printing a functional motor with five different materials in a single pass—is a giant conceptual leap that demonstrates it's possible to manufacture complex objects integrating structure, electronics, and movement without assembly. Surely, in a couple of decades, we'll all have a printer at home that can manufacture anything we order online, much to the chagrin of delivery companies. >Los avances más recientes nos dan pistas muy claras de cómo será esa "fábrica en casa" del futuro, este logro del MIT de imprimir un motor funcional con cinco materiales diferentes en una sola pasada es un salto conceptual gigante que demuestra que es posible fabricar objetos complejos que integran estructura, electrónica y movimiento sin necesidad de montaje. Seguramente en un par de décadas todos tendremos en casa una impresora en la que podremos fabricar cualquier cosa que pidamos por internet, para disgusto de las compañías de reparto. *** **নমস্কার,** বন্ধুরা আপনার সবাই কেমন আছেন? আশা করছি সকলেই ভালো আছেন। ঈশ্বরের কৃপায় আমিও ভালোই আছি। আজ আপনাদের সামনে আমার বছরের ১৭-তম পাওয়ার আপ পোস্ট নিয়ে হাজির হয়েছি। স্টিমিট যাত্রার পর থেকে আমি পাওয়ার আপ করে আসছি। নিয়মিত ভাবে শুরু করি ২০২২ সালের আমার বাংলা ব্লগের টার্গেট ডিসেম্বর-২ এর মাধ্যমে। প্রথম লক্ষ্য ছিল ১০,০০০ SP। নিয়মিত পাওয়ার আপ করে ২০২২ সালের এপ্রিল মাসে সেই লক্ষ্য ছুঁয়ে ফেলি এবং সামনের দিকে এগোতে থাকি। ফল স্বরূপ ২০২২ সালে ট্রিপল ডলফিন হই। ২০২৩ সালে আমার বাংলা ব্লগের টার্গেট ডিসেম্বর-৩ চালু হওয়ার পর লক্ষ্য নিই ২৫০০০ SP র। যা পূর্ন করার পর ফের ৩০,০০০ SP র লক্ষ্যমাত্রা রাখি, ও ২০২৩ সালেই পূর্ন করে ফেলি। ২০২৪ সালে আমার বাংলা ব্লগের টার্গেট ডিসেম্বর-৪ শুরু হয় ৪৫,০০০ SP-র লক্ষ্যে এবং সেই বছরেই লক্ষ্যে পৌঁছে যাই। একইভাবে ২০২৫ সাল পড়ার পর নতুন লক্ষ্য হয়, ৬০,০০০ SP র। যা পরবর্তীতে হয় ৬৫,০০০ SP, সেটাও গত বছরেই পূর্ণ হয়ছে। আর সবকিছুই সম্ভব হয়েছে **ফ্যান্টম দার আশীর্বাদ** এবং **আমার বাংলা ব্লগের** ভালোবাসায়। --- নতুন বছর, নতুন স্বপ্ন। বছর শুরু হওয়ার সাথে আমি নতুন বছরের লক্ষ্যমাত্রা রাখলাম। ২০২৬ সালে লক্ষ্য ৮০,০০০ SP। আমার ইচ্ছে ২০২৭ শুরু হওয়ার আগে লক্ষ্য পূর্ন করা। আশা করছি ফ্যান্টম দার আশীর্বাদ এবং ভালোবাসায় কাঙ্খিত লক্ষ্যে ধীরে ধীরে পৌঁছে যাবো। --- পাওয়ার আপ করার পূর্বে আমার অ্যাকাউন্টে স্টিম পাওয়ার ছিলো ৭৩,০৮১ SP। পাওয়ার আপ করার পর আমার স্টিম পাওয়ারের পরিমাণ ৭৩,১০১ SP। --- **আমার আজকের পাওয়ার আপ করার মুহূর্ত!** **পাওয়ার আপ প্রক্রিয়া** * আজকের পাওয়ার আপের পূর্বে আমার SP ছিলো ৭৩,০৮১। --- * ২০ স্টিম পাওয়ার আপ করার পর আমার SP হলো ৭৩,১০১। --- *আজকের মতো বিদায়। আবার দেখা হবে অন্য কোনো ব্লগে। ভালো থাকুন। সুস্থ থাকুন। ধন্যবাদ।* --- ** by RME দাদা** ** by RME দাদা** --- X-প্রোমশনের ক্ষেত্রে যে ট্যাগ গুলো ব্যবহার করবেন, @sunpumpmeme @trondao $PUSS --- --- || আমার বাংলা ব্লগ & ডিসকর্ড || --- **Vote ** **Or** **Set @rme as your **

Alright, crypto adventurers, let's chat about what's been going down (literally!) in the digital currency world lately. If you've peeked at your portfolio, you've probably noticed that Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, and even our favorite meme coin, Dogecoin, have been taking a bit of a tumble. It feels like everyone decided to hit the "sell" button at the same time, leading to what market gurus call "high selling pressure." Basically, more people are throwing their coins back into the market than are buying them up, and that always means prices go *woosh* downwards. *(Image for illustrative purposes only, not from the original article)* Now, before you start hyperventilating into a paper bag, here's where things get interesting! While everyone's busy prepping for crypto winter, one sharp-eyed analyst is seeing something totally different brewing beneath the surface. Forget the doom and gloom for a sec, because this expert is pointing to a pattern that could signal a massive rebound for Bitcoin! What kind of pattern, you ask? Well, it's got a rather biblical name: the "Adam & Eve" pattern. Don't worry, you don't need a theology degree to understand it! In super simple terms, it's a technical chart pattern that looks like two distinct "bottoms" forming. Think of it like the market dipping down, bouncing up a bit (that's Adam), then dipping down *again* but forming a slightly different shape before really taking off (that's Eve). It's often seen as a sign that the asset has found strong support and is ready for a big upward move. And when we say "big upward move," we're talking about a potential journey to **$79,000 for Bitcoin!** Yes, you read that right. While we're currently navigating some choppy waters, this analyst's take suggests that Bitcoin might just be setting itself up for an epic comeback, potentially soaring to new heights if this pattern plays out. So, what does this all mean for us? It means the crypto world is never boring, and every dip could be setting the stage for something exciting. While the market is currently experiencing a bit of a wobble, it's worth keeping an eye on these bigger picture predictions. As always, do your own homework, don't invest more than you can afford to lose, and remember: in crypto, the only constant is change! Original article that inspired this post:

Ever grabbed a new gadget or a snazzy t-shirt and wondered, "Where did this *really* come from? What's it made of? Can I actually fix it when I inevitably drop it?" Well, get ready, because the European Union is cooking up something that's basically a super-detailed secret diary for your products – and it's a huge deal for the world of blockchain! It’s called the **Digital Product Passport (DPP)**, and it’s not some fancy travel document for your sneakers. Think of it as a digital file packed with *everything* you could possibly want to know about a product. We’re talking about its origin story, what materials were used, how much energy went into making it, repair instructions, and even how to recycle it properly. No more mystery meat... or mystery *anything*! ### Why Are We Getting Product Passports? The EU isn't just doing this for funsies. This whole initiative is part of a bigger plan to make products more sustainable, reduce waste, and build a truly "circular economy." They want to fight off sneaky greenwashing (where companies pretend to be eco-friendly when they're not) and empower us, the consumers, to make smarter choices. It’s starting with things like batteries, textiles, and electronics, but trust me, this thing's got legs! ### Enter Blockchain: The Perfect Sidekick! Now, how do you keep all this super-important product info safe, transparent, and unchangeable? You guessed it – **blockchain!** Imagine trying to store all that data in a regular old database. It could be fiddled with, disappear, or just get lost in the digital ether. But with blockchain? Each piece of information is like a digital brick, locked into a chain that's practically impossible to tamper with. This means: * **Trust Galore:** You know the info is legit. * **Transparency:** No more hiding secrets about supply chains. * **Immutability:** Once it’s on the chain, it’s there forever! Platforms like Cardano are already trailblazers in using blockchain for tracking goods and ensuring supply chain integrity. They've built the kind of secure, scalable, and energy-efficient tech that's just itching to handle the massive amounts of data these Digital Product Passports will generate. ### A Global Game-Changer? You Bet! The really exciting part? When the EU, a major global economic player, adopts something like this, it often sets a precedent for the rest of the world. So, these Digital Product Passports aren't just an EU thing; they could very well become a global standard. This means a massive opportunity for blockchain tech to step up, connect different systems, and prove its worth beyond just cryptocurrencies. We're talking about a future where you can scan a QR code on *any* product and instantly access its entire life story, verified and secured by blockchain magic. So, next time you're eyeing a new gadget, remember that thanks to the EU and some clever blockchain tech, you might soon be able to read its full autobiography before taking it home! The future of transparent, sustainable shopping is looking pretty bright! --- **Inspired by:**

Cover of the November 1984 issue of Your Computer Your Computer, not to be confused with Your 64 or Your Commodore which were more machine specific, covered the popular computers in the U.K. at the time. The November 1984 issue includes: Letters and Editorial - Letters from readers about BASIC, using PEEK on the Amstrad, sprites on the ZX-81, the Sinclair QL, and more plus an editorial on vaporware and other failed hardware and software. News - The Yashica YC 64 MSX clone, electronic books from Tandy on the BBC, the Spectrum Plus, and more. First Bytes - A history of robots, speech synthesis and speech recognition, and more. Computer Club - A look at the activities of a BBC computer club. Software Shortlist - Brief reviews of Battle of Midway (Commodore 64), H.E.R.O. (Spectrum), Ancipital (Commodore 64), Interdictor Pilot (Commodore 64), Deus ex Machina (Spectrum), Star Commando (CPC-464), Roland in Time (CPC-464), American Football (Spectrum), and Countdown to Meltdown (Spectrum). Quest Corner - Hints for various adventure games including The Count (BBC B), Robyn Hode (Spectrum), and Mysterious Fairground (Spectrum). VIC-20 Software Review - Reviews of VIC-20 games including Bomber Mission (Commodore), Gunslinger (Omega), Battle Ground (Omega), Space Pirate (Omega), Bricks (Palace), Squish (Palace), Dodo Lair (Software Projects), and Perils of Willy (Software Projects). Table of Contents from the November 1984 issue of Your Computer Piracy - Commodore CBM-64 Quickload - A type-in fastloader you can use with your own tape based software that also makes it hard to copy. Aliquid Simplex - A type-in game for the ZX Spectrum in which you must find all the pieces of a robot to reassemble. BBC Gunner - A type-in tanks vs. planes game for the BBC. VIC Elevators - A type-in game for the VIC-20 in which you have to regain control of the elevators without getting crushed. Oric Brood - A type-in game for the Oric in which you must destroy the eggs before they hatch. CBM-64 Cavern - Destroy the aliens in this type-in arcade shooter for the Commodore 64. Spectrum Zoom - A type-in utility for the Spectrum that allows you to zoom in on a user defined part of the screen. BBC Music - A type-in utility for the BBC for writing music and simple playback. The Dragon Curse of Abu Simbel - A type-in adventure game for the Dragon 32. Amstrad Word Processor - A type-in word processor for the Amstrad CPC. 클라우드 기반 AI 서비스가 주류를 이루던 시기에, 조용히 다른 흐름이 자라나고 있습니다. 바로 **로컬 LLM**입니다. ## 왜 로컬인가? 클라우드 AI는 편리합니다. ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini 같은 서비스는 강력한 성능을 제공하죠. 하지만 몇 가지 걸림돌이 있습니다. **1. 프라이버시** 민감한 문서나 코드를 클라우드에 보내기 찜찜한 경우가 많습니다. 기업 환경에서는 더욱 그렇죠. **2. 비용** API 호출이 쌓이면 생각보다 큰 비용이 됩니다. 특히 개인 개발자나 스타트업에는 부담스럽습니다. **3. 인터넷 의존** 오프라인 환경에서는 아예 사용할 수 없습니다. **4. 속도** 응답을 기다리는 시간이 아쉬울 때가 있습니다. ## 하드웨어의 진화 로컬 LLM이 가능해진 건 하드웨어 발전 덕분입니다. - Apple Silicon Mac: 통합 메모리 구조로 LLM 추론에 최적 - 고성능 GPU: 16GB+ VRAM이 보편화 - 양자화 기술: 모델 크기를 1/4로 줄여도 품질 유지 Ollama, LM Studio 같은 도구 덕분에 설치도 간단해졌습니다. 이제 터미널 명령 몇 개면 됩니다. ## 실제 사용 경험 제가 로컬에서 자주 쓰는 모델들입니다: **Qwen 2.5 (7B/14B)** 중국 Alibaba가 만든 모델인데, 코딩과 한국어 모두 훌륭합니다. 특히 14B는 M3 Pro에서도 쾌적하게 돌아갑니다. **Llama 3.2 (3B)** 가볍고 빠릅니다. 간단한 작업에 딱입니다. 배터리 소모도 적어요. **DeepSeek R1 (Distill)** 추론 능력이 뛰어납니다. 복잡한 문제 해결에 유용합니다. ## 언제 클라우드, 언제 로컬? **클라우드가 좋을 때:** - 가장 성능 좋은 모델이 필요할 때 - 복잡한 멀티모달 작업 - 긴 컨텍스트가 필요할 때 **로컬이 좋을 때:** - 프라이버시가 중요한 작업 - 반복적인 간단한 작업 - 오프라인 환경 - 비용 절감이 필요할 때 ## 개인용 AI의 미래 앞으로는 "내 AI"를 가지는 시대가 될 것 같습니다. - 개인 데이터로 파인튜닝된 모델 - 내 작성 스타일을 학습한 어시스턴트 - 로컬에서 돌아가는 에이전트 클라우드 AI와 로컬 AI가 공존하는 하이브리드 구조가 표준이 될 겁니다. 중요한 건 "나를 위한 AI"를 선택할 수 있는 자유죠. --- 여러분은 로컬 LLM 써보신 적 있으신가요? 어떤 모델을, 어떤 용도로 쓰시나요?

A happy life without water. A happy life without water—it sounds absurd, but in some cases, it is. We see, it is. If you, like me, decide to learn how to raise rabbits at home, you'll likely be advised to feed them compound feed, which I won't argue with, and to give them water, which is highly debatable. I remember the first time I acquired a pair of purebred rabbits, which lived and bred successfully. However, I followed the advice of the person I bought them from, and he advised never to give rabbits water, only vegetables and fruits that contained moisture. You know, I initially doubted the correctness of this advice, but, you know, the rabbits brought to Australia have multiplied there so much that they have become a real disaster, and there is very little fresh water in Australia, in some places where rabbits live, there is none at all and they are happy. I've heard complaints from some rabbit breeders about the quality of their tap water, and they believe it was causing the death of their rabbit population. Reducing animal raising costs is always a top priority, and filtration systems are not cheap. I know this because I raised aquarium fish, for whom, like rabbits, water quality is paramount. And yesterday, I came across a recommendation that warns against feeding rabbits water-based food. LOL, I felt like I was running up and down the stairs and completely lost... I'll wait until they teach rabbits to talk so they can tell me how happy their life can be without water :) Zoom in on a photo for a closer view. ## More to come! ## Enjoy viewing the photos and reading the article! ## Have a blessed day! When you picture a classic garden blossom, rose bushes, hibiscus or lavender often take the spotlight. Yet, tucked among the more flamboyant species is a modest, fragrant gem that quietly steals the show: Rondeletia. Native to the Caribbean and parts of Central America, this evergreen shrub has long been a favorite of tropical gardeners, and its appeal is finally spilling over into temperate zones, thanks to clever cultivation techniques. If you’ve never met a Rondeletia, here’s why it deserves a place in your plant collection. A Quick Botanical Snapshot Rondeletia belongs to the Rubiaceae family, the same lineage that houses coffee and gardenia. The most common garden variety, Rondeletia odorata (often called “Rondeletia” for short), grows 3–6 feet tall with glossy, oval leaves that retain their deep green hue year‑round. In late spring to early summer, clusters of small, five‑petaled blossoms erupt in shades of pure white, pale pink, or even a soft lavender. Each flower exudes a subtle, sweet perfume that lingers in the evening air—perfect for patios and balcony retreats. Why Gardeners Love Rondeletia Low‑Maintenance Charm – Once established, Rondeletia tolerates a range of light conditions. Full sun yields the most abundant blooming, but the plant can thrive in partial shade, making it adaptable to both sunny borders and shaded patios. Heat‑Resistant – Its Caribbean heritage equips it to handle scorching summer temperatures without wilting. In fact, a short burst of heat often triggers a second wave of blossoms. Pollinator Magnet – The fragrant flowers attract hummingbirds, butterflies, and even bees, turning a modest shrub into a lively wildlife hub. Container‑Friendly – With a compact root system, Rondeletia flourishes in large pots, making it ideal for renters or anyone limited on garden space. Growing Tips for a Thriving Rondeletia Step |What to Do -|- Soil |Well‑draining, loamy mix; a touch of sand improves aeration. Water |Keep the soil consistently moist but not soggy. Reduce watering in winter when growth slows. Fertilizer |Apply a balanced, slow‑release fertilizer in early spring; a light feeding after the first bloom prolongs flowering. Pruning |Trim back leggy stems after blooming to encourage bushier growth and a second flush of flowers. Pests |Occasionally visited by whiteflies or aphids—treat with neem oil or insecticidal soap. Creative Uses Beyond the Garden Floral Arrangements – The delicate blossoms hold up well in vases, lending an airy elegance to bridal bouquets or tabletop displays. Fragrance Projects – Their subtle scent makes them perfect for homemade potpourri or scented candles. Landscaping Accents – Pair Rondeletia with palms, ferns, or ornamental grasses for a tropical, layered look. Final Thought Rondeletia may not shout for attention, but its combination of fragrant, perpetual blooms, easy care, and ecological benefits makes it a quiet powerhouse for both beginner and seasoned gardeners. Whether you’re cultivating a balcony oasis or looking to add a touch of Caribbean charm to a larger landscape, give this unassuming shrub a try—you’ll soon discover why countless gardeners consider it a hidden treasure waiting to be uncovered. ***

*** "신세기 에반게리온" (Neon Genesis Evangelion)은 1995년에 방영된 일본의 애니메이션 시리즈로, 감독은 안노 히데아키입니다. 이 작품은 메카(로봇) 장르와 심리 드라마를 결합한 독특한 이야기로, 많은 팬들과 비평가들로부터 높은 평가를 받았습니다. 이야기는 인류가 거대한 생명체인 '앙겔'과 싸우기 위해 거대한 로봇 '에반게리온'을 조종하는 청소년 파일럿들의 이야기를 중심으로 진행됩니다. 주인공 신지 이카리와 그의 동료들이 겪는 심리적 갈등과 고뇌는 이 작품의 핵심 요소입니다. "신세기 에반게리온"은 단순한 액션과 전투 장면을 넘어, 인간 존재, 고독, 상실감, 그리고 정신적 고통과 같은 깊은 주제를 탐구합니다. 이 작품은 또한 종교적 상징과 철학적 요소를 많이 포함하고 있어, 시청자들에게 다양한 해석의 여지를 제공합니다. 애니메이션은 방영 당시 큰 반향을 일으켰으며, 이후 영화, 만화, 비디오 게임 등 다양한 매체로 확장되었습니다. 특히, 1997년에 개봉된 "신세기 에반게리온 극장판: Death and Rebirth"와 1998년에 개봉된 "The End of Evangelion"은 원작의 결말을 다루며, 많은 팬들에게 논란과 토론을 일으켰습니다. "신세기 에반게리온"은 애니메이션 역사에서 중요한 위치를 차지하고 있으며, 많은 후속 작품과 창작자들에게 영향을 미쳤습니다. 이 작품은 단순한 오락을 넘어서, 심오한 질문을 던지는 철학적이고 심리적인 탐구로 여전히 많은 사랑을 받고 있습니다. *** ***

## 낭만항구 목포-4 목포해상케이블카 야경 목포는 낮보다 밤이 더 아름다운 도시라고 확신하다. 케이블카에서 내려 보이는 야경은 거의 환상적이었다. 목표대교 뿐아니라 크고 작은 섬들에 설치된 네온사인에 케이블카에서 반짝이는 조명까지 더해 감탄사를 연발하게 만들었다. 나이 많은 아내도 계속 환호성을 질렀다. 나이가 적고 많음은 숫자가 아니라 감동이 있느냐 없느냐의 차이이다. 아무리 좋은 경치를 봐도, 아무리 맛있는 음식을 먹어도 감동할 줄 모르면 늙은 것이고, 작은 일에도 미친듯이 웃을 수 있다면 아직 젊다는 증거이다. 자극은 처음 일 때 강하지만 반복돨수록 약해지듯이 우리도 경험이 쌓여 갈수록 그 감동도 사라진다. 그래서 더 큰 자극을 위해 많은 노력을 들여 새로운 경험을 요구한다. 히말라야나 마추피추 등 남들이 잘 못 가는 곳을 탐험하고 철인삼종이나 울트라 마라톤 같은 극단적인 육체적 고행을 자처하기도 한다. 돈 많이 들고 어려운 활동보다 항상 어린애 같은 순수한 열정만 있다면 굳이 멀고 돈 많이 드는 활동을 하지 않아도 된다. 진정한 승리자는 정신을 갈고 닦아 언제나 외부환경에 흔들리지 않는 초연함을 유지했던 선각자들이었다. 중생들이 그 수준에 들어 가기는 어렵겠지만 최소한 육체의 단련을 통해 정신을 단련하는 자세를 가지고 살아가야 한다. 정신도 육체의 일부이다. 육체가 병들면 정신도 병들기 마련이다. 강인한 육체에서 강인한 정신이 나온다. #### 목포해상케이블카 야경 목포 해상케이블카의 야경은 국내 최장 길이인 3.23km의 구간을 지나며 목포대교와 다도해, 그리고 유달산의 야경을 한꺼번에 감상할 수 있는 목포 여행의 정점이다. 일몰 약 30분 전인 골든 아워에 북항 승강장에서 탑승하면 서해의 붉은 낙조를 감상하며 고하도로 넘어갔다가 돌아오는 길에 화려하게 불을 밝힌 목포 시내의 야경을 즐길 수 있어 가장 추천하는 시간대이다. 특히 해상 구간을 지날 때 바다 위에 수놓아진 목포대교의 조명과 유달산 기암괴석을 비추는 경관 조명이 어우러져 마치 바다 위를 유영하는 듯한 낭만적인 분위기를 선사한다. 중간 정차역인 유달산 승강장 옥상 전망대에서 내려다보는 항구의 불빛은 사진 촬영 명소로 유명하며, 고하도 승강장에서 판옥선 전망대까지 이어지는 산책로 역시 은은한 조명이 설치되어 있어 밤 산책을 즐기기에 매우 훌륭하다. 주말이나 공휴일에는 야간 운영 시간이 연장되지만 바닷바람이 생각보다 차가울 수 있으니 가벼운 겉옷을 준비하는 것이 좋으며, 탑승권을 소지하면 주차장을 3시간 동안 무료로 이용할 수 있다.
아웃백에서 먹은 치킨 샐러드. 그릴에 구운 치킨에 상큼한 채소, 크리미한 드레싱이 균형 좋다. 역시 아웃백 스테이크하우스 샐러드는 실패가 없다.

Sheffield Pink is a charming variety of chrysanthemum known for its gentle, blush-toned blooms. The petals open in a soft shell-pink shade that deepens slightly toward the center, surrounding a warm golden eye. Each flower feels light and airy, spreading its slender petals like delicate rays Blooming late in the season, Sheffield Pink brings warmth and color when many other flowers have faded. It carries a calm, nostalgic beauty quiet yet radiant. This bloom symbolizes enduring charm and the gentle glow of autumn’s final light.

| | |---| | Estatua de Simón Bolívar | Saludos amigos Steemians!!! Está es mi participación al reto del amigo @walictd sobre **"Cómo fotografiar monumentos culturales e iconos urbanos"** antes de empezar voy a invitar a @mariami @karianaporras @josepha a participar. Hoy les muestro la estatua más grande de Simón Bolivar que se encuentra en la plaza Bolivar de Maracay, una estatua con mucha historia, su escultor fue Adamo Tadolini, Este señor hizo el molde original en Italia y gustó tanto que hay varias copias iguales en el mundo: una en Perú, otra en Caracas y, por supuesto, la de Maracay que es la más grande. | | |---| | Simón Bolivar sobre un caballo | Es un Monumento escultural que pesa unas 4 toneladas, la estatua no está a ras de piso, sino sobre una base de granito bastante alta para que se vea desde toda la plaza. El pedestal solo, mide unos 6.80 mts de largo por 4.50 mts de ancho. La estatua mide unos 4.20 mtrs de alto, en total el monumento llega casi a los 9 metros.
